text:
Le label d'édition No More Robots et le développeur RageSquid ont révélé aujourd'hui les Descenders: Test Sessions, permettant aux joueurs de découvrir par eux-mêmes le prochain jeu de VTT Descenders pour la première fois avant la sortie publique complète.

Annoncé plus tôt cet été, Descenders est du freeride de descente extrême pour l'ère moderne, avec des mondes générés procéduralement, et où les erreurs ont de réelles conséquences. La bande-annonce de révélation a déjà cumulé plus de 500 000 vues sur YouTube et Facebook.

Le week-end de Test Sessions, qui se déroulera du 27 au 30 octobre, donnera aux joueurs un aperçu du ressenti de jeu de Descenders, et permettra aux joueurs de donner leur avis sur leur expérience, ce qui aidera à façonner le jeu final.

Les participants aux Test Sessions pourront choisir une équipe, explorer le monde ouvert, puis s'affronter à travers un certain nombre de mondes Descenders générés procéduralement, en grimpant dans les classements, en débloquant des vélos et des équipements, et peut-être en trouvant un ou deux secrets.

Les joueurs peuvent s'inscrire aux Descenders Test Sessions dès maintenant, en se rendant sur le canal Discord officiel de Descenders à l'adresse http://discord.gg/Descenders, en choisissant une équipe et en cliquant sur le lien d'inscription à la Beta.

Descenders est développé par le studio néerlandais RageSquid et publié par No More Robots, le nouveau label d'édition britannique de Mike Rose, avec un financement du creative industries fund nl, et une conception sonore de Power Up Audio, mieux connu pour son travail sur des titres comme Crypt of the Necrodancer et Towerfall Ascension.
translation:
The publishing label No More Robots and developer RageSquid today revealed Descenders: Test Sessions, allowing players to discover the next Descenders downhill MTB game for the first time before the full public release.

Announced earlier this summer, Descenders is extreme downhill freeride for the modern era, featuring procedurally generated worlds, and where mistakes have real consequences. The reveal trailer has already accumulated over 500,000 views on YouTube and Facebook.

The Test Sessions weekend, taking place from October 27th to 30th, will give players a glimpse of the Descenders gameplay feel, and allow players to give feedback on their experience, which will help shape the final game.

Participants in the Test Sessions will be able to choose a team, explore the open world, and then compete through a number of procedurally generated Descenders worlds, climbing the leaderboards, unlocking bikes and gear, and perhaps finding one or two secrets.

Players can sign up for the Descenders Test Sessions now by going to the official Descenders Discord channel at http://discord.gg/Descenders, choosing a team, and clicking the Beta sign-up link.

Descenders is developed by the Dutch studio RageSquid and published by No More Robots, Mike Rose's new British publishing label, with funding from the creative industries fund nl, and sound design by Power Up Audio, better known for their work on titles like Crypt of the Necrodancer and Towerfall Ascension.

text:
Bon vendredi tout le monde !
Le week-end est presque là et vous savez ce que ça veut dire…….. l'heure de bosser ! Les vacances sont finies pour moi, donc c'est le moment d'encaisser et de se faire un peu de thune dont j'ai bien besoin ! Cette semaine, j'ai enfin rassemblé assez d'énergie et de courage pour m'attaquer au nettoyage de ma chambre et j'ai trouvé que mon maquillage était le truc le plus difficile à ranger. Heureusement pour moi, Pinterest avait plein d'idées et j'ai décidé d'acheter des tiroirs de rangement en plastique. Ces tiroirs sont extrêmement fonctionnels mais ce n'est pas la chose la plus esthétique de la planète, donc si vous envisagez d'acheter ces tiroirs comme solution de rangement et que vous voulez quand même les exposer (les miens sont cachés), j'ai inclus un lien sous la photo vers un super tutoriel pour peindre l'extérieur et l'intérieur du meuble.
Parmi mes autres coups de cœur de la semaine, il y a ces baumes à lèvres EOS que BEAUCOUP de gens ont déjà découverts, mais je les ai trouvés vraiment pas chers dans le nord et je les ai essayés. Après en avoir acheté un…. j'y suis retournée pour en prendre deux de plus…
Pour comprendre pourquoi c'est un coup de cœur, voir le post précédent.
J'espère que vous passerez tous un super week-end !
translation:
Happy Friday everyone!
The weekend is almost here and you know what that means... time to work! Vacation is over for me, so it's time to earn some money and get some cash I really need! This week, I finally gathered enough energy and courage to tackle cleaning my room and I found that my makeup was the hardest thing to organize. Luckily for me, Pinterest had tons of ideas and I decided to buy plastic storage drawers. These drawers are extremely functional but they are not the most aesthetic thing on the planet, so if you're considering buying these drawers as a storage solution and you still want to display them (mine are hidden), I included a link under the photo to a great tutorial on how to paint the inside and outside of the furniture.
Among my other favorites this week, there are these EOS lip balms that MANY people have already discovered, but I found them really cheap in the north and I tried them. After buying one... I went back for two more...
To understand why it's a favorite, see the previous post.
I hope you all have a great weekend!

text: Auteur : Chef Robert Voorhees Département : Département de police de Rockingham Lieu : Rockingham, Caroline du Nord Ancien chef de police Robert Voorhees Your Daily Journal : Voorhees plaide coupable de vol, condamné à 100 $ d'amende : L'ancien chef de la police de Rockingham est accusé d'avoir détourné 33 000 $ (10 oct. 2013) L'ancien chef de la police de Rockingham, Robert Voorhees, a plaidé coupable lundi devant la Cour supérieure du comté de Richmond de quatre chefs d'accusation de vol (délits mineurs). Voorhees, 43 ans, a été condamné à une amende de 100 $, a vu son séjour de 45 jours en prison suspendu, a été condamné à 12 mois de probation sans surveillance et a été tenu de rendre sa licence d'agent de la force publique. Le juge Mark Klass a également ordonné à Voorhees, initialement accusé d'un seul chef d'accusation criminel pour détournement de 33 000 $ d'argent municipal, de payer des frais de justice de 584,50 $. Voorhees a démissionné de son poste de chef — poste qu'il a occupé pendant près de 10 ans — en février 2012... Voorhees a été inculpé en novembre 2012. Sous le chef d'accusation criminel unique, Voorhees risquait un maximum de 25 mois de prison. Il a toutefois été noté que Voorhees avait remboursé la totalité des 33 000 $.
translation: Author: Chief Robert Voorhees Department: Rockingham Police Department Location: Rockingham, North Carolina Former Police Chief Robert Voorhees Your Daily Journal: Voorhees pleads guilty to theft, sentenced to $100 fine: Former Rockingham Police Chief accused of embezzling $33,000 (Oct. 10, 2013) Former Rockingham Police Chief Robert Voorhees pleaded guilty Monday in the Richmond County Superior Court to four misdemeanor theft charges. Voorhees, 43, was sentenced to a $100 fine, had his 45-day prison term suspended, was sentenced to 12 months of unsupervised probation, and was required to surrender his public servant license. Judge Mark Klass also ordered Voorhees, initially charged with a single felony count for embezzling $33,000 in municipal funds, to pay $584.50 in court costs. Voorhees resigned from his chief position—a post he held for nearly 10 years—in February 2012... Voorhees was indicted in November 2012. Under the single felony charge, Voorhees faced a maximum of 25 months in prison. It was noted, however, that Voorhees had repaid the full $33,000.

text: Selon le Daily Mail, un bébé que les médecins avaient prévenu serait sourd, aveugle et ne vivrait que quelques heures est né en bonne santé physique et mentale. Les médecins ont pressé Becky et Kriss Kramer de Pembroke Dock, dans le sud du Pays de Galles, d'avorter leur bébé, mais le couple a défié les conseils des médecins, et leur fils Brandon est né en bonne santé le 1er octobre 2007. La mère de 24 ans a déclaré : « Le fait qu'il soit là maintenant, bien vivant, est véritablement un miracle. Je me sens incroyablement coupable de penser que j'aurais pu le tuer, et je me demande ensuite combien d'autres bébés sont tués alors qu'ils se seraient révélés être complètement en bonne santé. » La réponse, en Amérique, est de plus de cinquante millions.
translation: According to the Daily Mail, a baby that doctors had warned would be deaf, blind, and would only live for a few hours was born physically and mentally healthy. The doctors urged Becky and Kriss Kramer of Pembroke Dock, in South Wales, to abort their baby, but the couple defied the doctors' advice, and their son Brandon was born healthy on October 1, 2007. The 24-year-old mother said: "The fact that he is here now, alive, is truly a miracle. I feel incredibly guilty thinking that I could have killed him, and then I wonder how many other babies are killed when they would have turned out to be completely healthy." The answer, in America, is over fifty million.

text:
La police a arrêté un homme de 24 ans en lien avec le poignardage et le passage à tabac d'une femme de 18 ans qui a été retrouvée à peine vivante chez elle dans le New Jersey au cours du week-end, selon la police.

Une voiture avait été volée au domicile de la femme après l'attaque de Franklin Township, et les enquêteurs ont remonté la piste du véhicule lundi jusqu'à un immeuble d'appartements à Edison, où ils ont mis en place une surveillance. Winston Wilson, de Linden, a été arrêté lundi soir dans l'immeuble et inculpé de tentative de meurtre.

Les procureurs affirment qu'ils pensent que Wilson connaissait la victime et que l'attaque était ciblée. Il fait également face à des accusations de vol et de possession illégale d'une arme à feu. On ne sait pas s'il a un avocat.

La femme a été attaquée samedi dans une maison sur Vanderbilt Avenue dans le secteur de Somerset à Franklin Township. Les policiers répondant à un signalement d'une femme souffrant d'un traumatisme crânien ont trouvé la victime devant chez elle avec une grave blessure à la tête et des plaies par couteau aux bras et au haut du corps.

Les autorités ont déclaré que le personnel d'urgence a « pratiqué des mesures de sauvetage » sur la victime et l'a transportée d'urgence vers un hôpital de la région où elle a subi une chirurgie d'urgence.

La police a précisé que la victime était seule chez elle lorsqu'elle a été attaquée.
translation:
Police arrested a 24-year-old man in connection with the stabbing and beating of an 18-year-old woman who was found barely alive at her home in New Jersey over the weekend, according to police.

A car had been stolen from the woman's home after the attack in Franklin Township, and investigators tracked the vehicle on Monday to an apartment building in Edison, where they set up surveillance. Winston Wilson, from Linden, was arrested Monday evening in the building and charged with attempted murder.

Prosecutors state that they believe Wilson knew the victim and that the attack was targeted. He also faces charges of theft and illegal possession of a firearm. It is unknown if he has a lawyer.

The woman was attacked on Saturday in a house on Vanderbilt Avenue in the Somerset area of Franklin Township. Police responding to a report of a woman suffering from a head trauma found the victim in front of her home with a serious head injury and knife wounds to her arms and upper body.

Authorities stated that emergency personnel "performed rescue measures" on the victim and urgently transported her to a local hospital where she underwent emergency surgery.

Police specified that the victim was alone at home when she was attacked.

Si rien n'apparaît sur un vag-com, ou un autre outil de diagnostic spécifique à VW capable de communiquer avec le calculateur de transmission...
et que la voiture passe bien les vitesses. C'est-à-dire des passages fermes, pas brutaux. Pas de "flare" entre les rapports, ce qui signifie qu'elle ne patine pas et que le régime ne monte pas pendant un changement de vitesse...
alors la voiture devrait être en bon état pour au moins 50 000 miles de plus...
Et possiblement plus longtemps.
À ce kilométrage, je ne recommande pas de vidange d'huile ou de changement de filtre, mais le niveau devrait au moins être vérifié
et seul l'huile VW doit être utilisée s'il faut faire l'appoint. Les procédures de vérification et d'appoint sont assez complexes, et nécessitent également un outil de diagnostic spécifique à VW.
Et j'espère que ça aide.
Si je vérifie le véhicule et qu'il passe bien les vitesses, alors je devrais être OK pour rXXXXX rentrer à la base et chez mon concessionnaire VW ??? Le seul diagnostic valable pour la transmission est un ordinateur spécifique basé sur VW, et non un ordinateur généraliste d'Auto Zone ?
Oui, c'est exact. Si le passage des vitesses semble bon, alors leXXXXX ne devrait pas poser de problème. Et oui, seuls les outils de diagnostic spécifiques à VW peuvent communiquer avec le module de commande de la transmission. Pas un scanner OBD générique de magasin de pièces détachées.
La plupart des garages VW indépendants auront l'outil de diagnostic Vag-Com, c'est ce que j'utilise.
Génial !! Je suppose que la 2001 est pré-triptonic et donc un peu plus simple ?
Correct. La '01 utilise ce qu'on appelle la transmission 01M, et elle est beaucoup plus facile à réparer que la 09G plus récente.
Dieu merci !!!!
translation:
Do you have questions about Volkswagen? Ask an expert now.
Hi, I'm Jason. I will do my best to answer your question quickly and accurately using the information you provided.
If nothing shows up on a vag-com, or another VW-specific diagnostic tool capable of communicating with the transmission control unit...
and the car shifts gears properly. Meaning firm shifts, not jerky ones. No "flare" between gears, which means it's not slipping and the RPM doesn't rise during a gear change...
then the car should be in good condition for at least another 50,000 miles...
And possibly longer.
At this mileage, I don't recommend an oil change or filter change, but the level should at least be checked
and only VW oil should be used if topping up is necessary. The checking and topping up procedures are quite complex, and also require a VW-specific diagnostic tool.
And I hope that helps.
If I check the vehicle and it shifts gears properly, then I should be okay to rXXXXX go back to the base and to my VW dealer ??? Is the only valid diagnosis for the transmission a specific VW-based computer, and not a general-purpose Auto Zone computer?
Yes, that's correct. If the gear shifting seems fine, then theXXXXX shouldn't be a problem. And yes, only VW-specific diagnostic tools can communicate with the transmission control module. Not a generic OBD scanner from a parts store.
Most independent VW garages will have the Vag-Com diagnostic tool, that's what I use.
Great!! I assume the 2001 is pre-Tiptronic and therefore a bit simpler?
Correct. The '01 uses what is called the 01M transmission, and it is much easier to repair than the newer 09G.
Thank goodness!!!!

text:
Je voulais être un écrivain geek comme Ignacio Ortega quand internet est apparu, et sont également apparus ses premiers pajerocultos dans leurs efforts pour conquérir la nouvelle Galaxie depuis l'ombre. Ainsi, pendant que je testais des mots maladroits sur mon ordinateur, ils testeaban l'internet d'où ils transgressaient la grammaire de l'ordre conventionnel, introduisant la sagesse future de google. Jusqu'à récemment, je pensais que les geeks, mis à part la contamination linguistique imposée par leur usage, n'étaient qu'une partie d'un groupe d'élite d'inadaptés sociaux, à la peau blafarde et amoureux du manga et de la pop, enterrés dans leurs chambres sous une montagne de comics et de chaussettes sales. Je me trompais dans mes vues, ils appartiennent au monde des Libéraux hipercultos et humanistes que nous voulons tous être, ceux qui portent des vêtements lourds, propriétaires des wargames, capables de faire fondre tes ETS en un clin d'œil avec un mail bombing, s'ils le décident. Assailli d'offres, Ray Kurzweil évalue actuellement ses choix futurs. Tandis que Joyce, Valle Inclan, l'Ulysse ou les Luces de Bohemia EMBUEaient mes lunettes entre les brumes de cigarettes ducados et le vin dépravé, ils se desvivian pour l'informatique, le manga, le jeu de rôle et la science-fiction ; ils parlaient anglais avec fierté, ceux qui savaient qu'ils allaient subjuguer la Galaxie, conscients des préoccupations principales du pays qui irait vers la nouvelle Galaxie, tuiterizada et feisbuquerizada aujourd'hui dans la blogosphère.

Ceux qui appartiennent à la génération sans Internet n'avaient alors que l'honneur de vivre dans une terre plate, parallèle au ciel dans lequel vivait un Dieu que nous n'avons jamais vu. Nous charlabamos avec des écrivains de brocante et des peintres de comas pendant que nous mamabamos la vie de Bogart à Sean Connery jusqu'à ce que la nuit nous manque, sans même nous demander ce que l'on ressentait quand l'eau nous arrivait au cou. Eux, mieux que cette génération, ont réussi à transcender ce monde à travers leurs fantasmes les plus intimes, défiant le monde avec des lunettes en plastique et linux. Peu importe que les fils de geeks délaissent les livres pour regarder des dessins animés, ou que les filles lisent plus de livres que les garçons. Accroupis comme des guirlocheros et des gens du trile devant leur ordinateur, ils dominent le web. Face à eux, mon monde est un cigarral journalistique s'éclairant d'adjectifs qui ressemblent à des paillettes dans des journaux où, à force de nuits, s'insère ma vie de scribe et je-ne-sais-combien de bohemiadas.
translation:
I wanted to be a geek writer like Ignacio Ortega when the internet appeared, and his first pajerocultos also appeared in their efforts to conquer the new Galaxy from the shadows. Thus, while I was testing clumsy words on my computer, they were testing the internet where they transgressed the grammar of the conventional order, introducing the future wisdom of Google. Until recently, I thought that geeks, apart from the linguistic contamination imposed by their usage, were just part of an elite group of social maladjusted, with pale skin and lovers of manga and pop, buried in their rooms under a mountain of comics and dirty socks. I was wrong in my views; they belong to the world of hypercultured and humanist Liberals that we all want to be, those who wear heavy clothes, owners of wargames, capable of melting your ETS in the blink of an eye with a mail bombing, if they decide to. Assailed by offers, Ray Kurzweil is currently evaluating his future choices. While Joyce, Valle Inclan, Ulysses, or Bohemia Lights EMBUED my glasses in the mists of ducado cigarettes and depraved wine, they lived for computing, manga, role-playing, and science fiction; they spoke English with pride, those who knew they were going to subjugate the Galaxy, aware of the main concerns of the country that was heading towards the new Galaxy, twitterized and feisbuquerized today in the blogosphere.

Those who belonged to the generation without the Internet only had the honor of living in a flat earth, parallel to the sky in which lived a God we never saw. We chatted with bargain writers and coma painters while we mimicked Bogart's life to Sean Connery until night overtook us, without even asking what we felt when the water reached our necks. They, better than this generation, managed to transcend this world through their most intimate fantasies, defying the world with plastic glasses and Linux. It doesn't matter if the sons of geeks abandon books to watch cartoons, or if girls read more books than boys. Crouched like guirlocheros and trile people in front of their computer, they dominate the web. Facing them, my world is a journalistic cigarral lighting up with adjectives that resemble glitter in newspapers where, after nights, my life as a scribe and I-don't-know-how-many bohemiadas are inserted.

text:
Tu auras besoin de :
Avant d'effectuer ce test, assure-toi que l'étincelle au fil central de la bobine est bien absente. Après cela, débranche le connecteur qui est relié à l'interrupteur. Connecte l'appareil de mesure aux bornes 1 et 2 des plages, puis insère la clé et mets le contact. Regarde attentivement le voltmètre : il doit afficher la valeur égale à la tension de la batterie.
Si la valeur ne correspond pas à ce que tu t'attends à voir, vérifie l'intégrité du fil qui va de l'interrupteur d'allumage à la bobine. Si nécessaire, remplace les composants endommagés. Après cela, connecte-toi aux connecteurs 2 et 4 du bloc. Mets à nouveau le contact et regarde l'échelle de l'instrument. La tension affichée par le testeur doit correspondre à la tension de la batterie.
Sinon, débranche les fils de la batterie, débranche le connecteur de l'interrupteur et mesure la résistance entre le "plus" de la batterie 4 et la sortie de l'interrupteur, ainsi qu'entre celle-ci et la borne 3. Additionne les données reçues ; en résultat, tu devrais obtenir une valeur de résistance égale à 0,2 Ohm. Rappelle-toi que ces mesures doivent être effectuées lorsque le contact est mis.
Après cela, fais un pont entre les connecteurs qui relient le capteur à effet Hall et l'interrupteur. Connecte le voltmètre aux broches 3 et 5 de l'interrupteur. Ici, les lectures doivent être de 1 à 4 Volts inférieures au niveau de tension de la batterie.
Inspecte la bobine et vérifie que le tube dans la partie supérieure est bien en place. Mesure ensuite la résistance de l'enroulement primaire, qui doit se situer entre 0,6 et 0,9 Ohm. Répète la même procédure avec le circuit secondaire. Ici, les valeurs de résistance varient de 6 à 9 kω.
translation:
You will need:
Before performing this test, make sure that the spark on the central wire of the coil is completely absent. After that, disconnect the connector connected to the switch. Connect the measuring device to terminals 1 and 2 of the sockets, then insert the key and turn the ignition on. Look closely at the voltmeter: it must display a value equal to the battery voltage.
If the value does not match what you expect to see, check the integrity of the wire running from the ignition switch to the coil. If necessary, replace the damaged components. After that, connect to connectors 2 and 4 of the block. Turn the ignition on again and look at the instrument's scale. The voltage displayed by the tester must match the battery voltage.
Otherwise, disconnect the battery wires, disconnect the switch connector, and measure the resistance between the battery's "plus" 4 and the switch output, as well as between that and terminal 3. Add the received data; as a result, you should obtain a resistance value equal to 0.2 Ohm. Remember that these measurements must be taken with the ignition on.
After that, bridge the connectors connecting the Hall effect sensor and the switch. Connect the voltmeter to pins 3 and 5 of the switch. Here, the readings must be 1 to 4 Volts lower than the battery voltage level.
Inspect the coil and check that the tube in the upper part is properly in place. Then measure the resistance of the primary winding, which should be between 0.6 and 0.9 Ohm. Repeat the same procedure with the secondary circuit. Here, the resistance values range from 6 to 9 kΩ.

text:
Halestorm parle de son nouvel album, de Lady Gaga, de sa tournée avec Dio et plus encore
Les rockeurs de Red Lion, PA et favoris de GRD, Halestorm, étaient en ville mercredi soir au DeltaPlex pour l'Avalanche Tour. Le groupe a eu la gentillesse de discuter avec moi de divers sujets, dont le karaoké, et a joué quelques morceaux acoustiques pour notre GRD Live Blitz.
Halestorm a tourné presque sans arrêt ces deux dernières années pour soutenir son premier album. Je leur ai demandé où en était le nouveau disque.
« On a déjà enregistré deux chansons pour le nouvel album », a déclaré la chanteuse Lzzy Hale. « Juste après cette tournée, on retourne au studio, on enregistre rapidement le reste, et on repart aussitôt sur la route. »
« Donc on fait plusieurs choses à la fois en ce moment », a ri Lzzy.
Nous avons également parlé du dernier EP de reprises de Halestorm, ReAnimate, qui comprend une version de « Bad Romance » de Lady Gaga choisie par les fans, de leur passage dans un vrai bar karaoké au Japon, et de leur tournée avec le regretté Ronnie James Dio. Regardez l'interview complète ci-dessous.
Je dois avouer que j'étais un peu nerveux à côté de Lzzy. Heureusement, je n'ai pas eu l'air trop stupide. Blague à part, j'adore ce groupe et je suis fier de tout ce qu'ils ont accompli jusqu'à présent. J'ai le sentiment que Halestorm sera là pour très longtemps.
Abonnez-vous à 97.9 WGRD sur
translation:
Halestorm talks about their new album, Lady Gaga, their tour with Dio, and more
The rockers from Red Lion, PA and GRD favorites, Halestorm, were in town Wednesday night at the DeltaPlex for the Avalanche Tour. The band kindly chatted with me about various topics, including karaoke, and played some acoustic tracks for our GRD Live Blitz.
Halestorm has been touring almost non-stop these past two years to support their first album. I asked them about the new record.
"We've already recorded two songs for the new album," said singer Lzzy Hale. "Right after this tour, we're heading back to the studio, quickly record the rest, and hit the road again."
"So we're doing several things at once right now," Lzzy laughed.
We also talked about Halestorm's latest cover EP, ReAnimate, which includes a fan-chosen version of Lady Gaga's "Bad Romance," their trip to a real karaoke bar in Japan, and their tour with the late Ronnie James Dio. Watch the full interview below.
I have to admit I was a little nervous next to Lzzy. Luckily, I didn't look too stupid. Jokes aside, I love this band and I'm proud of everything they've accomplished so far. I have a feeling Halestorm will be around for a long time.
Tune in to 97.9 WGRD on

text:
Miami, Floride, 24 août 2012 / 11h04 (CNA).- Carl Anderson, Chevalier Suprême des Chevaliers de Colomb, s'adressera ce soir dans une église de Miami à un groupe national de catholiques latinos sur la manière dont les catholiques hispaniques peuvent transformer la politique américaine pour le mieux.

Anderson dira que les catholiques « devraient s'efforcer de garantir que les futures générations d'immigrés trouvent un pays qui soutient leurs valeurs et non un pays qui leur demande de renoncer à leurs valeurs religieuses à la frontière comme prix de leur admission ».

Ce n'est pas le multiculturalisme, mais son opposé, qui force les immigrés à « renoncer à leurs valeurs à la frontière », déclarera-t-il.

Son discours lors de la conférence annuelle de l'Association catholique des leaders latinos aura lieu le vendredi 24 août au soir à 19h au Centre Familial de l'église catholique St. Thomas the Apostle. L'événement réunira plus de 100 dirigeants civils et d'affaires hispaniques.

Anderson parlera de l'importance de la réforme de l'immigration et donnera des conseils pour juger comment voter lors des prochaines élections. Le soutien des politiciens à la réforme de l'immigration, selon lui, ne suffit pas à justifier un vote pour eux s'ils préconisent également des politiques en contradiction avec les croyances catholiques fondamentales.

Il conseillera aux catholiques hispaniques de prendre en compte de nombreuses questions lors du vote et de fixer une limite en refusant de voter pour un politicien qui soutient des politiques opposées aux croyances catholiques fondamentales. Ces politiques incluent le soutien à l'avortement ou les limites à la liberté religieuse.

Les Chevaliers de Colomb sont une organisation caritative fraternelle catholique comptant 1,8 million de membres. Depuis sa fondation il y a 130 ans à New Haven, Connecticut, elle a établi des conseils à travers le monde, y compris au Mexique et à Cuba.

L'organisation a co-parrainé avec l'archidiocèse de Los Angeles la célébration de Guadalupe du 5 août à Los Angeles, qui a rassemblé des dizaines de milliers de catholiques pour honorer Notre-Dame de Guadalupe.

Anderson est le coauteur d'un livre à succès sur la sainte patronne des Amériques, « Our Lady of Guadalupe: Mother of the Civilization of Love ».
translation:
Miami, Florida, August 24, 2012 / 11:04 AM (CNA).- Carl Anderson, Supreme Knight of the Knights of Columbus, will speak tonight in a Miami church to a national group of Latino Catholics on how Hispanic Catholics can transform American politics for the better.

Anderson will say that Catholics "should strive to ensure that future generations of immigrants find a country that supports their values and not a country that asks them to renounce their religious values at the border as a price for admission."

It is not multiculturalism, but its opposite, that forces immigrants to "renounce their values at the border," he will declare.

His speech at the annual conference of the Catholic Association of Latino Leaders will take place on the evening of Friday, August 24, at 7 p.m. at the St. Thomas the Apostle Catholic Church Family Center. The event will bring together more than 100 Hispanic civic and business leaders.

Anderson will discuss the importance of immigration reform and give advice on how to judge how to vote in the next elections. The support of politicians for immigration reform, according to him, is not enough to justify a vote for them if they also advocate for policies contrary to fundamental Catholic beliefs.

He will advise Hispanic Catholics to consider many issues when voting and to set a limit by refusing to vote for a politician who supports policies opposed to fundamental Catholic beliefs. These policies include support for abortion or limits on religious freedom.

The Knights of Columbus is a fraternal Catholic charitable organization with 1.8 million members. Since its founding 130 years ago in New Haven, Connecticut, it has established councils around the world, including in Mexico and Cuba.

The organization co-sponsored with the Archdiocese of Los Angeles the celebration of Guadalupe on August 5 in Los Angeles, which gathered tens of thousands of Catholics to honor Our Lady of Guadalupe.

Anderson is the co-author of a successful book on the patron saint of the Americas, "Our Lady of Guadalupe: Mother of the Civilization of Love."

text:
Un homme de Fort Dodge accusé d'avoir utilisé une hachette pour tuer un autre homme a plaidé coupable d'un chef d'accusation réduit de meurtre au second degré.
Ronald Dilley, vingt-neuf ans, avait été inculpé de meurtre au premier degré pour la mort de Steven Fisher, 22 ans, dont les restes décomposés ont été retrouvés par un agriculteur d'Otho dans un fossé le 10 juillet.
Dilley et Holly Ekstrom, 23 ans, de Fort Dodge, ont été inculpés dans la mort de Fisher. Ekstrom a plaidé non coupable de meurtre au premier degré et son procès est prévu pour le 22 juillet.
Le Fort Dodge Messenger rapporte que Dilley a déclaré à un juge vendredi qu'il avait frappé Fisher quatre fois à la tête avec une hachette après que Fisher a fait un commentaire qui a contrarié Dilley.
Dilley risque jusqu'à 50 ans de prison lors de son jugement le 5 mai.
translation:
A man from Fort Dodge accused of using an hatchet to kill another man pleaded guilty to a reduced charge of second-degree murder.
Ronald Dilley, twenty-nine, had been charged with first-degree murder for the death of Steven Fisher, 22, whose decomposed remains were found by a farmer in Otho in a ditch on July 10.
Dilley and Holly Ekstrom, 23, from Fort Dodge, were charged in Fisher's death. Ekstrom pleaded not guilty to first-degree murder and her trial is scheduled for July 22.
The Fort Dodge Messenger reports that Dilley told a judge on Friday that he hit Fisher four times on the head with an hatchet after Fisher made a comment that angered Dilley.
Dilley faces up to 50 years in prison at his trial on May 5.

text:
Pisciare in un'Olla è una buona idea? Pisciare direttamente sulle piante non va bene, ma in un'Olla la pipì dovrebbe essere filtrata lasciando uscire solo l'acqua, e se passa anche un po' di ammoniaca è ancora meglio.

Alla fine l'urea si accumulerà sulla superficie interna dell'Olla impedendo la filtrazione e dovrò scavarla fuori e pulirla, quindi la domanda è: quanta pipì può filtrare la terracotta?

Immagino che dovrebbe funzionare bene, proprio come il filtro a sabbia in un impianto acquaponico ma più lentamente. I batteri scomporranno l'urea in nitrati, quindi non dovresti preoccupartene. Se dovessi provarci, sceglierei piante che hanno bisogno di molto azoto come le patate o il mais.
translation:
Is peeing in a pot a good idea? Peeing directly on plants is not good, but in a pot the pee should be filtered letting only the water out, and if some ammonia gets through it's even better.

In the end, the urea will accumulate on the inner surface of the pot preventing filtration and I will have to dig it out and clean it, so the question is: how much pee can terracotta filter?

I imagine it should work well, just like the sand filter in an aquaponics system but slower. Bacteria will break down the urea into nitrates, so you shouldn't worry about it. If I were to try it, I would choose plants that need a lot of nitrogen like potatoes or corn.

text: Volevo solo salutare, per prima cosa. Ho trovato questo sito cercando "Cosa fare con un adolescente con disturbo della condotta". Devo dire di più? Mio figliastro ha 16 anni, quasi 17. Abbiamo avuto problemi con lui da quando aveva circa 11 anni, ma il quadro generale non è stato davvero delineato fino al 2009. Gli è stato diagnosticato ufficialmente un disturbo dell'umore, ma la sua mancanza di cooperazione ha impedito ulteriori diagnosi. Ci troviamo in un circolo vizioso: lo portiamo dal suo psicologo, psichiatra o terapeuta e lui dice loro di non avere nulla da dire e resta seduto in silenzio. E quando si stanca di fare questo gioco, dice quello che sa che "dovrebbe" dire (non la verità) in modo da ottenere un certificato di buona salute senza la necessità di fissare un altro appuntamento. Risciacqua, ripeti. Non abbiamo ancora trovato un professionista della salute mentale che non veda attraverso la sua recita. <sospiro> Più recentemente (ieri), abbiamo chiamato la linea di accoglienza per le crisi del nostro ospedale di salute mentale locale per pura disperazione in cerca di aiuto. Lo psicologo di turno è stato molto utile e ha chiesto cosa avessimo osservato in lui nell'ultimo anno. Dopo che ho finito di parlare, ha detto che ovviamente non poteva fare una diagnosi, ma che se mi avesse aiutato a concentrare i miei sforzi... l'area in cui avrei dovuto cercare informazioni sarebbe quella del "Disturbo Antisociale di Personalità" o di un Disturbo della Condotta. Un rapido giro sul sito della Mayo Clinic... e penso che ci siamo vicini. Direi che DSS abbia l'80% (se non di più, presumendo che abbia fatto cose che non sappiamo) dei sintomi presentati della Personalità Antisociale. Ora non so da dove iniziare. Vogliamo inserirlo in un programma di ricovero per la sicurezza della nostra famiglia (abbiamo trovato porno con minorenni sul suo iPod, e abbiamo una figlia di 9 anni in casa). Fare telefonate non mi porta da nessuna parte. Tutti si rimpallano la responsabilità su chi dovrebbe essere in grado di aiutare... e sento di girare a vuoto e sprecare tempo prezioso. Qualcuno può aiutarmi? Guidarmi verso risorse e siti web che possano aiutare..?
translation: I just wanted to say hello, first of all. I found this site searching for "What to do with an adolescent with conduct disorder." Should I say more? My stepson is 16, almost 17. We've had problems with him since he was about 11, but the overall picture wasn't really clear until 2009. He was officially diagnosed with a mood disorder, but his lack of cooperation prevented further diagnoses. We are in a vicious cycle: we take him to his psychologist, psychiatrist, or therapist, and he tells them he has nothing to say and sits in silence. And when he gets tired of playing this game, he says what he knows he "should" say (not the truth) in order to get a clean bill of health without the need to schedule another appointment. Rinse, repeat. We still haven't found a mental health professional who doesn't see through his act. <sigh> More recently (yesterday), we called the crisis hotline for our local mental health hospital out of sheer desperation in search of help. The on-call psychologist was very helpful and asked what we had observed in him over the last year. After I finished speaking, he said that obviously he couldn't make a diagnosis, but that if he could help me focus my efforts... the area where I should be looking for information would be "Antisocial Personality Disorder" or a Conduct Disorder. A quick look at the Mayo Clinic website... and I think we are close. I would say that DSS has 80% (if not more, assuming he has done things we don't know about) of the symptoms presented of Antisocial Personality. Now I don't know where to start. We want to put him in a residential program for the safety of our family (we found child pornography on his iPod, and we have a 9-year-old daughter at home). Making phone calls isn't getting me anywhere. Everyone passes the responsibility onto whoever should be able to help... and I feel like I'm going in circles and wasting precious time. Can someone help me? Guide me toward resources and websites that can help..?

text:
Merlin è stato colui che mi ha dato la mania di possedere degli uccellini. Questo bellissimo maschio americano color cobalto era così facile da addestrare. Cominciavo a grattargli la testa e lui mi mordicchiava l'orecchio per dirmi che voleva un po' di miglio. Mi fidavo che non avrebbe morso i miei figli e stava appollaiato sulla mia spalla per tutto il tempo necessario a pulire la casa. Beh, poiché mi sentivo in colpa per averlo allontanato dai suoi simili, gli comprai un amico di nome Magic. Magic in un certo senso ha preso tutta quell'attenzione che lui mi dava, ma ogni volta che restava a trovarmi sulla spalla mi mordicchiava sempre l'orecchio. Lo trovavo così divertente.
Poiché mi piace dare ai miei uccellini un po' di spazio per volare nel pomeriggio, li ho lasciati uscire entrambi ed è così che Merlin è spirato tra le fauci di un cane di cui stavo facendo il dog-sitting; non mi perdonerò mai per un errore così stupido. Comunque, vorrei solo dire a Merlin che io e Magic ci manchi moltissimo. Sono passate solo 2 settimane da quando ci ha lasciati, e se può servire a qualcosa, prometto di non fare più il dog-sitting. E il cane che lo ha ucciso si è fratturato la zampa e il proprietario ha dovuto farlo abbattere... spero che ovunque siano i due, stiano risolvendo le loro divergenze.
Addio, mio caro amico.
- Inviato da Equinebd@aol.com
translation:
Merlin was the one who gave me the craze for owning little birds. This beautiful cobalt American male was so easy to train. I would start scratching his head and he would nip my ear to tell me he wanted some millet. I trusted that he wouldn't bite my children and he perched on my shoulder for the entire time it took to clean the house. Well, because I felt guilty for keeping him away from his kind, I bought him a friend named Magic. Magic in a way took all the attention he gave me, but every time he stayed to visit me on my shoulder, he would always nip my ear. I found it so funny.
Since I like to give my little birds some space to fly in the afternoon, I let them both out and that's how Merlin flew into the jaws of a dog I was dog-sitting for; I will never forgive myself for such a stupid mistake. Anyway, I just want to tell Merlin that Magic and I miss him very much. It's only been 2 weeks since we left him, and if it helps with anything, I promise not to dog-sit anymore. And the dog that killed him broke its leg and the owner had to have it put down... I hope wherever the two are, they are resolving their differences.
Goodbye, my dear friend.
- Sent from Equinebd@aol.com

text:
Il prequel della serie di Ava Lee, popolarissima.
La giovane Ava Lee è una contabile forense che ha appena aperto il proprio studio privato. Uno dei suoi clienti, Hedrick Lo, è stato truffato di oltre un milione di dollari da un importatore cinese di nome Johnny Kung. Disperato, Lo convince Ava a trovare e recuperare i soldi dovuti. Ava si reca a Hong Kong, dove si tuffa nel pericoloso business sotterraneo del recupero crediti e incontra un uomo che cambierà per sempre la sua vita . . .
translation:
The prequel to Ava Lee's very popular series.
Young Ava Lee is a forensic accountant who has just opened her own private practice. One of her clients, Hedrick Lo, was defrauded of over a million dollars by a Chinese importer named Johnny Kung. Desperate, Lo convinces Ava to find and recover the owed money. Ava goes to Hong Kong, where she dives into the dangerous underground business of debt collection and meets a man who will change her life forever...

translation: Israel is the only country in the world that should be allowed to have atomic bombs, because we are the only ones who know how to use them.

text:
Abbiamo già riferito di come l'iPhone o l'iPad che utilizzano iOS 4.x abbiano tracciato segretamente tutti i tuoi spostamenti. I ricercatori della sicurezza hanno rivelato che l'iPhone traccia la posizione dell'utente e la memorizza in un file segreto e nascosto che viene replicato sul computer una volta sincronizzato con il dispositivo.

Il file contiene dati sulla tua latitudine e longitudine insieme alla marca temporale. A queste informazioni si può accedere facilmente facendo il jailbreak del telefono, sfortunatamente, sul computer si può fare anche senza. Inoltre, il file non è crittografato e può essere letto da chiunque utilizzando una semplice app.

Ora, grazie a una nuova app di Cydia chiamata Untrackerd, puoi impedire facilmente al tuo iPhone con jailbreak di tracciare tutti i tuoi passi e di salvarli in un file di database segretamente nascosto.

Pulisce continuamente i dati della cronologia di locationd in background.
Questo pacchetto installa un daemon (un processo che può essere eseguito in background) per pulire il file consolidated.db.

Disponibile gratuitamente su Cydia nel repository BigBoss, basta cercare Untrackerd su Cydia e installarlo per impedire al tuo iPhone di tracciare la tua posizione.

Avrai, ovviamente, bisogno di un iPhone, iPad o iPod touch con jailbreak per installarlo. Segui la nostra guida passo passo pubblicata qui per fare il jailbreak del tuo iPhone, iPad o iPod touch con Redsn0w su iOS 4.2.1 (o untethered con GreenPois0n RC5), oppure con Limera1n su iOS 4.1, o su iOS 4.3.1 con Redsn0w, PwnageTool 4.3 (untethered | tethered), o con Sn0wbreeze su Windows, oppure su iOS 4.3.2 con Redsn0w, PwnageTool 4.3 (tethered), o con Sn0wbreeze su Windows, se non l'hai già fatto.
translation:
We have already reported how the iPhone or iPad running iOS 4.x has secretly tracked all your movements. Security researchers revealed that the iPhone tracks the user's location and stores it in a secret, hidden file that is replicated to the computer once synced with the device.

The file contains data on your latitude and longitude along with a timestamp. This information can be easily accessed by jailbreaking the phone, unfortunately, it can also be done on the computer without it. Furthermore, the file is not encrypted and can be read by anyone using a simple app.

Now, thanks to a new Cydia app called Untrackerd, you can easily prevent your jailbroken iPhone from tracking all your steps and saving them in a secretly hidden database file.

It continuously cleans the locationd history data in the background.
This package installs a daemon (a process that can run in the background) to clean the consolidated.db file.

Available for free on Cydia in the BigBoss repository, just search for Untrackerd on Cydia and install it to prevent your iPhone from tracking your location.

You will, of course, need an iPhone, iPad, or iPod touch with a jailbreak to install it. Follow our step-by-step guide published here to jailbreak your iPhone, iPad, or iPod touch with Redsn0w on iOS 4.2.1 (or untethered with GreenPois0n RC5), or with Limera1n on iOS 4.1, or on iOS 4.3.1 with Redsn0w, PwnageTool 4.3 (untethered | tethered), or with Sn0wbreeze on Windows, or on iOS 4.3.2 with Redsn0w, PwnageTool 4.3 (tethered), or with Sn0wbreeze on Windows, if you haven't already done so.

text:
La mia valutazione: 3,5 su 5 stelle
Questo non è il solito libro che leggo, ma sono stata incuriosita quando ne ho sentito parlare. Ho seguito il canale YouTube di Mr. Kate e ha dei progetti fai-da-te e dei consigli di arredamento molto cool. La struttura del libro non è insolita, dato che racconta una breve storia e poi la interrompe con delle foto – tranne che in questo libro, le foto sono un progetto fai-da-te che puoi realizzare.
Ci sono 50 storie diverse con i relativi progetti. Sebbene i fai-da-te dovrebbero essere collegati alla storia che Mr. Kate ha appena finito di raccontare, in generale sono piuttosto nebulosi e correlati solo vagamente. Personalmente ne ho trovati circa 10 interessanti, ma questo varierà da persona a persona. Non sono solo progetti di artigianato, ma anche consigli di bellezza e moda.
Anche le storie in sé sono molto varie, da racconti carini sull'incontro con suo (attuale) marito a storie volgari che non piaceranno a tutti. Inoltre, proviene da una famiglia molto benestante, quindi i lettori potrebbero essere infastiditi dal suo continuo fare nomi di persone importanti o dai suoi problemi da ricca. Non mi ha respinta completamente, ma ero lì al 99% per l'artigianato e non ho preso in prestito il libro per lasciarmi assorbire dalle storie.
Nel complesso è stato un libro carino, ma probabilmente non uno che andrei a comprare. Lo prenderò in prestito dalla biblioteca se mai decidessi di voler realizzare uno dei progetti.
C'è un fai-da-te nel caso in cui volessi una palla stroboscopica che trovi casa nella tua stanza... come lampada.
Oppure magari diventare una sorta di ninfa dei boschi. Questa mi incuriosisce, ma non sono sicura che metterei mai delle catenelle nei capelli. Sembra il modo migliore per trovarsi i capelli tutti aggrovigliati.
Oh sì. mettiamo teste di animali giocattolo decapitate sulle dita. Sembra un'idea meravigliosa...
Ok, non sono fan del cesto, ma l'idea del baldacchino è davvero carina e potrei farlo per dare un tocco alla Harry Potter alla mia stanza.
Un altro esempio del lato beauty dei suoi fai-da-te rispetto a quello artigianale.
translation:
My rating: 3.5 out of 5 stars
This is not the usual book I read, but I was curious when I heard about it. I followed Mr. Kate's YouTube channel and he has very cool DIY projects and decorating tips. The structure of the book is not unusual, as it tells a short story and then interrupts it with photos – except in this book, the photos are a DIY project you can make.
There are 50 different stories with related projects. Although the DIYs should be connected to the story Mr. Kate has just finished telling, in general they are quite vague and only loosely related. Personally, I found about 10 interesting, but this will vary from person to person. They are not just craft projects, but also beauty and fashion tips.
The stories themselves are also very varied, from sweet tales about meeting his (current) husband to vulgar stories that won't please everyone. Furthermore, he comes from a very wealthy family, so readers might be annoyed by his constant naming of important people or his rich person problems. It didn't completely repel me, but I was there 99% for the crafts and I didn't borrow the book to get absorbed in the stories.
Overall it was a nice book, but probably not one I would buy. I'll borrow it from the library if I ever decide I want to make one of the projects.
There is a DIY in case you want a strobe ball to find a home in your room... as a lamp.
Or maybe become some kind of forest nymph. This interests me, but I'm not sure I would ever put chains in my hair. It seems like the best way to get your hair all tangled.
Oh yes. put decapitated toy animal heads on your fingers. Sounds like a wonderful idea...
Okay, I'm not a fan of the basket, but the canopy idea is really cute and I could do it to give a Harry Potter touch to my room.
Another example of the beauty side of his DIYs compared to the craft side.

text:
L'ultimo imputato in una truffa milionaria è stato condannato al carcere. Per la sua parte nel piano, Teang Liu è stato condannato alla prigione e a pesanti sanzioni.

Cloni contraffatti sono stati inviati da Hong Kong con numeri IMEI e seriali falsificati che corrispondevano a prodotti Apple originali. Liu e altri cospiratori restituivano poi questi gadget falsi ad Apple, sostenendo che fossero ancora coperti da garanzia. L'idea era di ottenere in sostituzione degli iPhone veri.

Modelli sostitutivi autentici venivano successivamente inviati a cospiratori in tutto il mondo, inclusa Hong Kong, dove venivano ricevuti.

Liu era stato persuaso da Haiteng Wu, già condannato, a partecipare al piano. Wu e Liu avevano inoltre ottenuto documenti d'identità falsi, aperto numerose caselle postali commerciali e pianificato che i partecipanti alla cospirazione viaggiassero per gli Stati Uniti come parte del complotto.

Apple è stata multata per oltre 1 milione di dollari a seguito dell'incidente. A dicembre 2019 sono avvenuti gli arresti dei cospiratori.

Nel febbraio 2021, Liu ha ammesso il reato. Oltre a 577.780 dollari in multe e risarcimenti, il giudice Emmet G. Sullivan ha inoltre imposto a Liu un provvedimento di confisca di 57.780 dollari.

Il caso è stato indagato dal Dipartimento della Sicurezza Interna degli Stati Uniti, dalle Indagini della Sicurezza Interna e dal Servizio Ispettorato Postale degli Stati Uniti.
translation:
The last defendant in a million-dollar fraud was sentenced to prison. For his part in the scheme, Teang Liu was sentenced to jail and heavy penalties.

Counterfeit clones were sent from Hong Kong with fake IMEI and serial numbers that matched original Apple products. Liu and other conspirators then returned these fake gadgets to Apple, claiming they were still under warranty. The idea was to receive real iPhones in exchange.

Authentic replacement models were subsequently sent to conspirators around the world, including Hong Kong, where they were received.

Liu had been persuaded to participate in the scheme by Haiteng Wu, who was already convicted. Wu and Liu had also obtained fake identification documents, opened numerous commercial mailboxes, and planned for the conspiracy participants to travel throughout the United States as part of the plot.

Apple was fined over $1 million following the incident. The arrests of the conspirators took place in December 2019.

In February 2021, Liu pleaded guilty. In addition to over $577,780 in fines and restitution, Judge Emmet G. Sullivan also imposed a forfeiture order of $57,780 on Liu.

The case was investigated by the U.S. Department of Homeland Security, Homeland Security Investigations, and the United States Postal Inspection Service.

text:
Dayne Benoit ha lasciato un bambino piccolo e un neonato in auto al Walmart, dicono la polizia
Il video della sorveglianza mostra il padre che restituisce delle scarpe, lasciando i bambini fuori
La polizia di Port St. Lucie, intervenendo per una chiamata al 911 rimasta in sospeso al Walmart di Gatlin Boulevard, ha notato martedì mattina un'auto parcheggiata nella corsia antincendio con il motore acceso e i finestrini abbassati.
All'interno? Un bambino di 2 anni e un neonato di 7 mesi allacciati ai seggiolini, senza alcun genitore a vista.
La polizia ha arrestato il 24enne Dayne Benoit dopo che è uscito dal negozio e gli hanno spiegato che è illegale lasciare bambini incustoditi in auto.
"È molto grave," ha detto il sergente Frank Sabol. "Chiunque avrebbe potuto entrare, saltare in auto e scappare, e ora avresti due bambini potenzialmente rapiti solo a causa della negligenza del genitore."
Benoit ha detto alla polizia di essere entrato al Walmart solo per pochi minuti per cambiare delle scarpe.
Sua moglie ha recuperato i bambini, che non avevano riportato danni, prima che la polizia portasse Benoit in prigione.
translation:
Dayne Benoit left a small child and a newborn in a car at Walmart, police say
Surveillance video shows the father returning shoes, leaving the children outside
Port St. Lucie police, responding to a 911 call that went unanswered at the Gatlin Boulevard Walmart, noticed a car parked in the fire lane on Tuesday morning with the engine running and the windows down.
Inside? A 2-year-old child and a 7-month-old newborn strapped into car seats, with no parent in sight.
Police arrested 24-year-old Dayne Benoit after he left the store and explained to him that it is illegal to leave children unattended in a car.
"It is very serious," said Sergeant Frank Sabol. "Anyone could have gotten in, jumped in the car and run away, and now you would have two potentially kidnapped children just because of parental negligence."
Benoit told the police that he had only gone into Walmart for a few minutes to change shoes.
His wife retrieved the children, who had not sustained any injuries, before the police took Benoit to jail.

text:
Inviateci un'email per ricevere aiuto
La conduttrice Kathy Sipple parla con Jennifer Shelhart della Green Research Corporation riguardo al lavoro dell'organizzazione.
Deviano i computer indesiderati e rotti dal flusso dei rifiuti, li rigenerano e installano su di essi programmi della Berkeley Open Infrastructure for Network Computing (BOINC). I programmi permettono a BOINC di utilizzare il tempo di inattività dei computer di Green Research per comunicare con BOINC e aiutare a curare malattie, studiare il riscaldamento globale, scoprire pulsar e svolgere molti altri tipi di ricerca scientifica.
Green Research utilizza solo energia verde per eseguire i compiti di calcolo. Il loro obiettivo è quello di creare col tempo la propria energia verde da utilizzare per la loro causa e di fornire energia verde ad altri.
translation:
Email us to receive help
Host Kathy Sipple speaks with Jennifer Shelhart of Green Research Corporation about the organization's work.
They divert unwanted and broken computers from the waste stream, regenerate them, and install Berkeley Open Infrastructure for Network Computing (BOINC) programs on them. The programs allow BOINC to use the idle time of Green Research's computers to communicate with BOINC and help cure diseases, study global warming, discover pulsars, and conduct many other types of scientific research.
Green Research uses only green energy to run its computing tasks. Their goal is to eventually create their own green energy to use for their cause and to provide green energy to others.

text:
Con le tempeste primaverili nel pieno del loro vigore, fate attenzione alle truffe sui tetti.

Diffidate del venditore porta a porta che dice che vi "guiderà attraverso la richiesta di risarcimento" per i danni da grandine. In pratica, ispezioneranno il vostro tetto (vecchio di 20 anni) e, se troveranno danni, "lavoreranno con la compagnia assicurativa" per far sì che paghi per un tetto nuovo. In cambio, otterranno l'appalto per fare il lavoro.

Fate attenzione alle aziende che vanno di porta in porta. Se sono un'azienda di copertura professionale, di solito non vanno di casa in casa cercando di accaparrarsi clienti. Volete sempre controllare il BBB prima di assumere un appaltatore che non conoscete. Ed è meglio chiedere referenze. Le persone che hanno lavorato con loro in passato saranno in grado di dirvi se sono affidabili e degne di fiducia.

Quando subite danni da tempesta, a volte vi sentite vulnerabili e tutto ciò che volete è che venga riparato, e in fretta! Le truffe sui tetti a volte sono difficili da individuare. Pensateci in questo modo... potrebbe non essere tanto una truffa quanto una frode soft; se la compagnia assicurativa non accetta di pagare, beh, non hanno investito molto tempo. Se la compagnia assicurativa paga, beh, loro ottengono il lavoro, voi ottenete un tetto nuovo e la compagnia assicurativa ottiene i premi esorbitanti che dovrete iniziare a pagare dopo aver presentato una richiesta di risarcimento alla vostra assicurazione.

Quindi, la prossima volta che avrete danni da tempesta o penserete di aver bisogno di riparare il tetto, contattate un professionista delle coperture di cui potete fidarvi. Non aspettate che qualcuno bussi alla vostra porta. E ogni volta che avete dubbi, fate le vostre verifiche prima di firmare sulla linea tratteggiata.

Per maggiori informazioni, o per programmare una valutazione gratuita dei danni, contattate:
Saratoga Roofing & Construction
Al servizio di OKC * Tulsa * DFW Metroplex * Kansas City * Wichita
translation:
With spring storms in full swing, watch out for roof scams.

Be wary of the door-to-door salesperson who says they will "guide you through the claim process" for hail damage. In practice, they will inspect your roof (20 years old) and, if they find damage, "work with the insurance company" to get them to pay for a new roof. In return, they will get the contract to do the work.

Be careful of companies that go door-to-door. If they are a professional roofing company, they usually don't go from house to house trying to poach customers. You should always check the BBB before hiring a contractor you don't know. And it's best to ask for references. People who have worked with them in the past will be able to tell you if they are reliable and trustworthy.

When you suffer storm damage, you sometimes feel vulnerable and all you want is for it to be fixed, and fast! Roof scams can sometimes be hard to spot. Think of it this way... it might not be so much a scam as a soft fraud; if the insurance company doesn't agree to pay, well, they haven't invested much time. If the insurance company pays, well, they get the job, you get a new roof, and the insurance company gets the exorbitant premiums you will have to start paying after filing a claim with your insurance.

So, next time you have storm damage or think you need a roof repair, contact a roofing professional you can trust. Don't wait for someone to knock on your door. And every time you have doubts, do your research before signing on the dotted line.

For more information, or to schedule a free damage assessment, contact:
Saratoga Roofing & Construction
Serving OKC * Tulsa * DFW Metroplex * Kansas City * Wichita

text:
L'autore Mark Ferdinand si è espanso nei libri sui tiki. In realtà si tratta di un unico libro in due versioni diverse. “Every Tiki has a Spirit” è la nuova proposta di Mark del 2018. Ha reso disponibile una versione a colori e una in bianco e nero.

Un racconto immaturo delle opere di un intagliatore di tiki, e un resoconto serio delle origini della terra e dell'umanità. L'autore si concede la sua ricerca per creare arte oceanica che spacca, accanto alla quale si possa sorseggiare un cocktail. A questo alterna uno schema mitologico conciso su come tutto questo sia nato e cosa ci sia stato dato per orientarci. Un libro per tikifili, appassionati di mitologia e intagliatori di legno.

Mark Ferdinand vive sulla costa del Texas meridionale con la moglie, la figlia e il figlio. La pesca a surf, la caccia, il giardinaggio, l'intaglio di tiki e i progetti fai-da-te occupano il suo tempo libero. Ha scritto su temi come il disturbo dello spettro autistico, il lavoro con i serpenti velenosi e la mitologia tiki.

Mark ha iniziato a intagliare i tiki per avere un grande tiki per decorare il suo giardino. Dieci anni dopo, non ha ancora nessun tiki permanente nel suo giardino, poiché ne ha creati e venduti più di cento senza riuscire a tenerne uno per sé.

Mark è l'autore del romanzo d'avventura “Fortune on the Spectrum”, delle storie di erpetologia di “You’re Gonna’ Get Bit!” e delle storie sull'autismo di “The Autistic Prankster”.

Oltre al formato tascabile, i libri di Mark possono essere acquistati per dispositivi Kindle, Android e Apple.
translation:
The author Mark Ferdinand has expanded into tiki books. In reality, it is a single book in two different versions. "Every Tiki has a Spirit" is Mark's new 2018 offering. He made a color version and a black and white version available.

An immature tale of a tiki carver's works, and a serious account of the origins of the earth and humanity. The author indulges his research to create mind-blowing oceanic art, alongside which one can sip a cocktail. He alternates this with a concise mythological schema on how all this came to be and what has been given to guide us. A book for tikifiles, mythology enthusiasts, and wood carvers.

Mark Ferdinand lives on the southern coast of Texas with his wife, daughter, and son. Surf fishing, hunting, gardening, tiki carving, and DIY projects occupy his free time. He has written on themes such as autism spectrum disorder, working with venomous snakes, and tiki mythology.

Mark started carving tiki to have a large tiki to decorate his garden. Ten years later, he still doesn't have a permanent tiki in his garden, as he has created and sold over a hundred without being able to keep one for himself.

Mark is the author of the adventure novel "Fortune on the Spectrum," the herpetology stories "You’re Gonna’ Get Bit!", and the autism stories "The Autistic Prankster."

In addition to the paperback format, Mark's books can be purchased for Kindle, Android, and Apple devices.

text:
La poesia sensuale e arguta di Ovidio riunisce una sfolgorante serie di racconti mitologici ingegnosamente legati dall'idea della trasformazione, spesso come risultato dell'amore o della lussuria, in cui uomini e donne si ritrovano magicamente trasformati in nuovi e a volte straordinari esseri. Iniziando con la creazione del mondo e terminando con la deificazione di Augusto, Ovidio intreccia molti dei miti e delle leggende più noti dell'antica Grecia e di Roma, tra cui Dedalo e Icaro, Piramo e Tisbe, Pigmalione, Perseo e Andromeda, e la caduta di Troia. I mortali diventano dei, gli animali si trasformano in pietra e gli esseri umani cambiano in fiori, alberi o stelle.

Pubblicate per la prima volta nell'8 d.C., le Metamorfosi di Ovidio rimangono una delle introduzioni più accessibili e stimolanti alla mitologia greca. Scarica e inizia ad ascoltare ora!
translation:
Ovid's sensual and sharp poetry brings together a dazzling series of mythological tales ingeniously linked by the idea of transformation, often as a result of love or lust, in which men and women find themselves magically transformed into new and sometimes extraordinary beings. Beginning with the creation of the world and ending with the deification of Augustus, Ovid weaves together many of the most famous myths and legends of ancient Greece and Rome, including Daedalus and Icarus, Pyramus and Thisbe, Pygmalion, Perseus and Andromeda, and the fall of Troy. Mortals become gods, animals turn to stone, and human beings change into flowers, trees, or stars.

First published in 8 AD, Ovid's Metamorphoses remain one of the most accessible and stimulating introductions to Greek mythology. Download and start listening now!

text:
Joe Lavin, residente di Sommerville, MA, sostiene di essersi procurato una copia dell'ultimo libro di vendetta letteraria di Jose Canseco, “Vindicated”. Insieme a una serie di attacchi mirati a Roger Clemens, la rivelazione più grande (?) del tomo conferma l'accusa spesso suggerita da Jose secondo cui Alex Rodriguez “non è il santo che tutti pensano”. Da Joe Lavin.com:
Canseco dice di non aver iniettato Rodriguez, ma di averlo “presentato ad un noto fornitore di steroidi”. Canseco non ha menzionato Rodriguez nel primo libro perché “odiava quel bastardo”. Temeva che la gente avrebbe “messo in dubbio i [suoi] motivi” se avesse incluso Rodriguez.
Perché tutto questo odio, vi chiederete. Beh, Canseco sostiene che A-Rod stesse cercando di scopare con la moglie di Canseco. Apparentemente, anche dopo che Canseco era stato così gentile da aiutare A-Rod a trovare un fornitore di steroidi amichevole, A-Rod ha continuato a chiamare la moglie di Canseco.
E, nel caso ci fosse ulteriore confusione sui veri sentimenti di Canseco, chiude il capitolo dicendo:
“Quindi A-Rod, se stai leggendo questo libro, e se non riesco a raggiungerti, chiariamo una cosa: odio profondamente ogni tuo cazzo di centimetro.”
Con una prosa del genere, chi ha bisogno di Don Yaeger?
translation:
Joe Lavin, a resident of Sommerville, MA, claims to have obtained a copy of Jose Canseco's latest literary revenge book, "Vindicated." Along with a series of targeted attacks on Roger Clemens, the biggest revelation (?) in the volume confirms the accusation often suggested by Jose that Alex Rodriguez "is not the saint everyone thinks he is." From JoeLavin.com:
Canseco says he did not inject Rodriguez, but rather "introduced him to a known steroid supplier." Canseco did not mention Rodriguez in the first book because he "hated that bastard." He feared people would "question his motives" if he included Rodriguez.
Why all this hatred, you might ask. Well, Canseco claims A-Rod was trying to sleep with Canseco's wife. Apparently, even after Canseco was kind enough to help A-Rod find a friendly steroid supplier, A-Rod kept calling Canseco's wife.
And, in case there is further confusion about Canseco's true feelings, he closes the chapter by saying:
"So A-Rod, if you are reading this book, and if I cannot reach you, let's clarify one thing: I deeply hate every single one of your fucking inches."
With prose like that, who needs Don Yaeger?

text:
Mortada Mansour: Consiglio a Kahraba di non ignorare le sanzioni. Grazie per aver letto questo post, non dimenticate di iscrivervi!
Mortada Mansour, Presidente dello Zamalek Club, ha consigliato a Mahmoud Abdel Moneim “Kahraba”, attuale giocatore dell'Al-Ahly, di non ignorare le sanzioni a lui imposte dalla Federazione Internazionale di Calcio (FIFA), sottolineando il suo sostegno ai giovani arbitri.
Mortada Mansour ha dichiarato in interviste a Zamalek TV: “Congratulo Hossam Hassan, l'allenatore dell'Al-Masri, per ciò che sta offrendo al gruppo di giocatori che lo accompagna.”
Ha aggiunto sarcasticamente: “Sayed Abdel Hafeez aveva ragione quando voleva attaccare l'arbitro nella partita dell'Al-Masri perché l'arbitro non dovrebbe dare il fischio finale finché l'Al-Ahly non segna un gol.”
Ha continuato: “Sostengo l'affidamento a giovani arbitri perché la corruzione non li ha ancora infettati, incluso l'arbitro della partita tra Al-Ahly e Al-Masri.”
E ha proseguito: “La differenza tra Al-Ahly e Zamalek è di 6 punti, che è lo stesso numero di punti disponibili nelle due partite tra le due squadre. Speriamo solo che la magia e la stregoneria si allontanino da noi.”
E ha aggiunto: “L'arbitraggio non ha fatto inciampare l'Al-Ahly, a differenza di quanto accaduto allo Zamalek, specialmente nelle ultime 3 partite.”
E ha continuato: “Oggi la commissione anti-doping è venuta allo Zamalek club e ha prelevato campioni dai giocatori normalmente. Non stiamo nascondendo nessuno. Ahmed Fatuh si sta preparando a partecipare con la squadra nella prossima partita contro i Pyramids.”
E ha continuato: “Consiglio a Kahraba, per l'amor di Dio. Se verrai punito di nuovo e non rispetterai la decisione del tribunale, affronterai gravi conseguenze.”
E ha concluso: “Consiglio a Kahraba di venire con la sua famiglia al club per girare un video di 3 minuti per smascherare la persona che lo ha istigato a fuggire dallo Zamalek, allora accetterò il pagamento della multa a rate.”
#Mortada #Mansour #advise #Kahraba #ignore #sanctions
translation:
Mortada Mansour: Advice to Kahraba not to ignore the sanctions. Thanks for reading this post, don't forget to subscribe!
Mortada Mansour, President of Zamalek Club, advised Mahmoud Abdel Moneim “Kahraba”, current Al-Ahly player, not to ignore the sanctions imposed on him by the International Football Federation (FIFA), emphasizing his support for young referees.
Mortada Mansour stated in interviews with Zamalek TV: “I congratulate Hossam Hassan, the coach of Al-Masri, for what he is offering to the group of players accompanying him.”
He added sarcastically: “Sayed Abdel Hafeez was right when he wanted to attack the referee in the Al-Masri match because the referee should not blow the final whistle until Al-Ahly scores a goal.”
He continued: “I support relying on young referees because corruption has not yet infected them, including the referee of the match between Al-Ahly and Al-Masri.”
And he went on: “The difference between Al-Ahly and Zamalek is 6 points, which is the same number of points available in the two matches between the two teams. We just hope that magic and witchcraft stay away from us.”
And he added: “The refereeing did not make Al-Ahly stumble, unlike what happened to Zamalek, especially in the last 3 matches.”
And he continued: “Today the anti-doping commission came to Zamalek club and took samples from the players as usual. We are not hiding anyone. Ahmed Fatuh is preparing to participate with the team in the next match against Pyramids.”
And he continued: “I advise Kahraba, for God's sake. If you are punished again and do not respect the court's decision, you will face serious consequences.”
And he concluded: “I advise Kahraba to come to the club with his family to film a 3-minute video to expose the person who incited him to flee Zamalek, then I will accept the fine payment in installments.”
#Mortada #Mansour #advise #Kahraba #ignore #sanctions

text:
Jm-airbus320 Dalla Giamaica, iscritto Ago 2000, 304 post, RR: 0 Pubblicato (13 anni 8 mesi 8 ore fa) e letto 1088 volte:
A tutti quelli che si chiedevano dove fossi.........sono tornato!!
Comunque, durante il mio breve esilio, un mio amico mi ha raccontato cosa è successo quando è andato a un addio al celibato per un altro amico. È venuto fuori che a questo addio al celibato il (futuro sposo) ha scoperto che la sua fidanzata aveva recitato in due film pornografici prima che iniziassero a frequentarsi e uno dei nastri è stato mostrato alla festa, con lei che faceva non esattamente ciò che potrebbe fare con lui. Lui, ovviamente, ha distrutto il nastro e l'ha chiamata per dirle che il matrimonio era annullato e che non doveva chiamarlo. Lei era in lacrime mentre diceva che era stato un errore commesso un paio di anni prima, quando stava con un altro ragazzo.
Mi sento imbarazzato per il tipo con tutto quello che è successo, ma mi sono sentito costretto a porre la domanda: Voi cosa avreste fatto?
Aloha 737-200 Da , iscritto Dic 1969, post, RR:
Risposta 2, pubblicata (13 anni 8 mesi 7 ore fa) e letta 1046 volte:
Io avrei distrutto il nastro, anzi, non avrei nemmeno permesso che me lo mostrassero.
Se scoprissi che lei era in un film pornografico, ne parlerei con lei e farei un patto. Lei finge che non sia mai successo, e lo farò anche io. Se è stato un errore che ha commesso, è comprensibile, tutti commettiamo errori. Non molto tempo fa ero molto innamorato di una ragazza in Australia, che aveva perso la verginità mentre visitava gli USA, e all'inizio mi ha scioccato, ma non l'ho amata meno per questo. Ne ho parlato con lei e ho scoperto che il tipo era un enorme stronzo e l'aveva solo usata. Quando sento una cosa del genere, come posso colpevolizzarla?
Non posso, e non lo faccio. E la amo ancora, anche se al momento siamo solo amici.
Non le avrei detto che il matrimonio era annullato, piuttosto, avrei passato un po' di tempo a pensare a quanto di più posso darle io rispetto a quel coglione del porno, a quanto io sia migliore di lui e di come fosse, e a quanto io l'ami di più.
translation:
Jm-airbus320 From Jamaica, registered Aug 2000, 304 posts, RR: 0 Posted (13 years 8 months 8 hours ago) and read 1088 times:
To everyone who was wondering where I was.........I'm back!!
Anyway, during my short exile, a friend told me what happened when he went to a bachelor party for another friend. It turned out that at this bachelor party, the (future groom) discovered that his girlfriend had acted in two pornographic films before they started dating, and one of the tapes was shown at the party, with her doing not exactly what she could do with him. He, obviously, destroyed the tape and called her to tell her that the marriage was canceled and that she shouldn't call him. She was in tears while saying that it was a mistake made a couple of years ago, when she was with another guy.
I feel embarrassed for the guy with everything that happened, but I felt forced to ask the question: What would you have done?
Aloha 737-200 Da, registered Dec 1969, posts, RR:
Reply 2, posted (13 years 8 months 7 hours ago) and read 1046 times:
I would have destroyed the tape, in fact, I wouldn't even have let them show it to me.
If I found out she was in a pornographic film, I would talk to her and make a pact. She pretends it never happened, and I will too. If it was a mistake she made, it's understandable, we all make mistakes. Not long ago I was very in love with a girl in Australia, who had lost her virginity while visiting the USA, and at first it shocked me, but I didn't love her any less for it. I talked to her and found out that the guy was a huge asshole and had just used her. When I hear something like that, how can I blame her?
I can't, and I don't. And I still love her, even if right now we are just friends.
I wouldn't have told her the marriage was canceled, rather, I would have spent some time thinking about how much more I can give her than that porn bastard, how I am better than him and how he was, and how much I love her more.

text:
Sapere come funziona il sistema vocalico inglese, con le vocali lunghe e le vocali brevi, può aiutare ad allenare il cervello a lavorare con l'inglese in un modo simile a come i madrelingua elaborano la lingua. Può aiutarti a migliorare l'ortografia e a essere più sicuro nel capire come pronunciare parole nuove. Al… Leggi di più Simboli IPA delle vocali brevi
Conosci il numero totale di suoni vocalici diversi in inglese? I principianti spesso pensano che la risposta sia "cinque", perché ci sono cinque lettere vocaliche nell'alfabeto. Naturalmente, chiunque conosca questo blog sa già che ogni lettera vocalica ha almeno un suono di vocale lunga e uno di vocale breve. Quindi sono dieci vocali… Leggi di più Panoramica delle vocali
Un errore di pronuncia molto comune è usare il suono della O lunga in ogni parola che ha la lettera "O". Tuttavia, la "O" usa regolarmente tre suoni diversi, quindi se usi sempre la O lunga, ciò può sicuramente causare confusione o semplicemente rendere più difficile per le persone capirti. Ecco alcuni esempi di parole che… Leggi di più O lunga vs O breve
Ho scoperto che dall'80% al 90% degli studenti non sa che la lettera inglese "O" ha più di un suono! La lettera "O" usa regolarmente tre suoni diversi, ma molti studenti pronunciano molte parole in modo errato perché usano un solo suono di "O" per tutto il tempo. I suoni base sono: O lunga, O breve,… Leggi di più I suoni della O
La tensione della lingua è importante per pronunciare bene le vocali brevi inglesi. Tutte le vocali brevi dell'inglese americano richiedono una lingua rilassata. Infatti, alcuni libri e dizionari chiamano queste vocali "vocali lasso". LA CHIAVE SEGRETA per le vocali lasso La maggior parte degli studenti di inglese non sembra conoscere la tensione della lingua. Molti dei miei studenti… Leggi di più Tensione della lingua – una chiave segreta
Quelle due parole ti sembrano identiche? Se è così, non sei solo. Molti studenti di inglese hanno difficoltà con la differenza tra la O breve e la U breve. Questi due suoni vocalici sono simili per certi versi, ma in inglese sono decisamente diversi. La differenza tra loro può sembrare piccola all'orecchio di un… Leggi di più Boss o bus?
Schwa è il nome del suono vocalico più frequentemente usato in inglese. Viene usato per la U breve, la O breve alternativa e le vocali ridotte. U breve Il suono della U breve si trova in molte parole che si scrivono con una "U", come: fun, up, just, much, under, bug, shut, must, such, us, but, luck, mud, number, rush,… Leggi di più Cos'è la Schwa?
translation:
Knowing how the English vowel system works, with long vowels and short vowels, can help train the brain to work with English in a way similar to how native speakers process the language. It can help you improve spelling and be more confident in understanding how to pronounce new words. Read more IPA symbols for short vowels
Do you know the total number of different vowel sounds in English? Beginners often think the answer is "five" because there are five vowel letters in the alphabet. Naturally, anyone who knows this blog already knows that every vowel letter has at least one long vowel sound and one short vowel sound. So there are ten vowels... Read more Vowel overview
A very common pronunciation mistake is using the long O sound in every word that has the letter "O". However, "O" regularly uses three different sounds, so if you always use the long O, it can definitely cause confusion or simply make it harder for people to understand you. Here are some examples of words that... Read more Long O vs Short O
I found that 80% to 90% of students do not know that the English letter "O" has more than one sound! The letter "O" regularly uses three different sounds, but many students pronounce many words incorrectly because they use only one "O" sound all the time. The basic sounds are: long O, short O,... Read more The sounds of O
Tongue tension is important for pronouncing English short vowels correctly. All English short vowels require a relaxed tongue. In fact, some books and dictionaries call these vowels "lax vowels". THE SECRET KEY to lax vowels Most English students do not seem to know about tongue tension. Many of my students... Read more Tongue tension – a secret key
Do those two words seem identical to you? If so, you are not alone. Many English students have difficulty with the difference between short O and short U. These two vowel sounds are similar in some ways, but in English they are decidedly different. The difference between them may seem small to the ear of a... Read more Boss or bus?
Schwa is the name of the most frequently used vowel sound in English. It is used for short U, alternative short O, and reduced vowels. Short U The short U sound is found in many words spelled with a "U", such as: fun, up, just, much, under, bug, shut, must, such, us, but, luck, mud, number, rush,... Read more What is Schwa?
