text:
Il Museo Nazionale del Bardo di Tunisi, dove 23 persone sono state uccise in un attacco terroristico a marzo, sta emergendo dalla tragedia con legami rafforzati con le istituzioni italiane. (Quattro turisti italiani sono morti nelle sparatorie.) Il sindaco della capitale tunisina, Seifallah Lasram, ha firmato a ottobre un accordo per la collaborazione interculturale con il sindaco della città di Torino. Come parte della partnership, il Bardo e il Museo di Arte Orientale di Torino, che ospita la collezione municipale d'arte islamica, dovrebbero pianificare scambi e mostre congiunte.

La Galleria degli Uffizi di Firenze sta anche considerando il prestito di opere, secondo il nostro giornale gemello Il Giornale dell’Arte. Il presidente della Toscana, Enrico Rossi, ha affermato che l'idea fosse "una buona risposta nella lotta contro il terrorismo". Eike Schmidt, il direttore degli Uffizi, dice che i piani sono "in una fase molto iniziale".

Nel frattempo, l'isola di Lampedusa in Sicilia dovrebbe ospitare opere del Bardo in una mostra chiamata Carthage Changes Europe. La mostra, prodotta dalla non-profit First Social Life, aprirà questa primavera. Il Bardo ha inaugurato a novembre la sua galleria di Cartagine restaurata con sculture romane.
translation:
The National Museum of Bardo in Tunis, where 23 people were killed in a terrorist attack in March, is emerging from the tragedy with strengthened ties to Italian institutions. (Four Italian tourists died in the shootings.) The mayor of the Tunisian capital, Seifallah Lasram, signed an agreement in October for intercultural collaboration with the mayor of the city of Turin. As part of the partnership, the Bardo and the Museum of Oriental Art in Turin, which houses the municipal collection of Islamic art, are expected to plan joint exchanges and exhibitions.

The Uffizi Gallery in Florence is also considering the loan of works, according to our sister newspaper Il Giornale dell’Arte. The President of Tuscany, Enrico Rossi, stated that the idea was "a good response in the fight against terrorism." Eike Schmidt, the director of the Uffizi, says that the plans are "in a very early stage."

Meanwhile, the island of Lampedusa in Sicily is set to host works from the Bardo in an exhibition called Carthage Changes Europe. The exhibition, produced by the non-profit First Social Life, will open this spring. The Bardo inaugurated its gallery of restored Roman sculptures in Carthage in November.

text:
JACKSONVILLE, Fla. (AP) — Le autorità sono a caccia di una coppia dopo che un agente di polizia di Jacksonville ha aperto il fuoco contro di loro, sostenendo che avessero cercato di travolgerlo con la loro Jeep.
Le autorità sono state chiamate in un negozio giovedì dopo che i dipendenti avevano riferito che la coppia sembrava sospetta, essendo rimasta seduta in auto per quasi due ore. Quando l'agente si è avvicinato, la donna ha aggredito l'ufficiale. Un investigatore dell'ufficio dello sceriffo di Jacksonville ha dichiarato che il conducente ha accelerato verso la vetrina del negozio.
L'agente B.K. Alwin ha utilizzato il suo Taser, ma questo non ha fermato il conducente. I testimoni hanno riferito che, mentre l'agente indietreggiava, il veicolo ha accelerato verso di lui.
Il Florida Times-Union riferisce che l'agente ha sparato due volte contro il veicolo. Non è chiaro se qualcuno sia stato colpito.
Una Jeep corrispondente alla descrizione è stata recuperata mezz'ora dopo con tracce di sangue all'interno.
Informazioni da: The (Jacksonville) Florida Times-Union, http://www.jacksonville.com
translation:
JACKSONVILLE, Fla. (AP) — Authorities are hunting a couple after a Jacksonville police officer opened fire on them, claiming they tried to run him over with their Jeep.
Authorities were called to a store on Thursday after employees reported that the couple seemed suspicious, having remained in the car for almost two hours. When the officer approached, the woman attacked the officer. An investigator from the Jacksonville Sheriff's Office stated that the driver sped toward the store window.
Officer B.K. Alwin used his Taser, but this did not stop the driver. Witnesses reported that as the officer backed away, the vehicle sped toward him.
The Florida Times-Union reports that the officer fired twice at the vehicle. It is unclear if anyone was hit.
A Jeep matching the description was recovered half an hour later with traces of blood inside.
Information from: The (Jacksonville) Florida Times-Union, http://www.jacksonville.com

text:
Quiz – Sei compassionevole con te stesso?
Parliamo di abuso fisico. Parliamo anche di abuso emotivo. Parliamo ora di auto-abuso. Cos'è l'auto-abuso? Normalmente, quando parliamo di qualsiasi abuso, è coinvolto un agente esterno. Nell'auto-abuso, feriamo noi stessi. Non abbiamo bisogno di alcuna agenzia esterna. I nostri stessi pensieri, il nostro senso di colpa e il nostro auto-flagellarsi lo fanno per noi.
Perché lo facciamo – In parte questo ha a che fare con l'infanzia e in parte con i nostri fallimenti nella vita adulta. Una volta che incontriamo alcuni fallimenti, ci marchiamo come persone fallite. Conosco una persona che non solo definiva se stessa una persona fallita, ma credeva anche che qualsiasi cosa con cui si associasse sarebbe andata incontro a fallimenti. Questo è un fenomeno complesso che comporta la perdita totale della fiducia e del senso del proprio valore.
Cosa dovrebbe essere fatto – Per fermare l'auto-abuso, bisogna agire lentamente. Potrebbe anche essere necessario un supporto esterno. La fiducia che è stata erosa lentamente deve essere recuperata lentamente. Questo non può essere fatto velocemente. Piccoli fallimenti hanno portato alla perdita della fiducia in se stessi. Piccoli successi porteranno a ricostruire la fiducia. Con la lenta ricostruzione della fiducia, dobbiamo liberarci dal nostro senso di colpa. Dobbiamo perdonare noi stessi. Dobbiamo mostrare compassione verso noi stessi. È così: se troviamo una persona ferita, la trattiamo con dolcezza e siamo molto compassionevoli. Dobbiamo fare lo stesso con noi stessi.
Siamo tutti molto preziosi. Siamo preziosissimi per noi stessi. Come un possedimento prezioso che abbiamo con noi, dobbiamo proteggere la nostra dignità e la nostra fiducia. Dobbiamo mostrare la stessa cura. Questa è la compassione per noi stessi.
translation:
Quiz – Are you compassionate with yourself?
Let's talk about physical abuse. Let's also talk about emotional abuse. Now let's talk about self-abuse. What is self-abuse? Normally, when we talk about any abuse, an external agent is involved. In self-abuse, we hurt ourselves. We don't need any external agency. Our own thoughts, our guilt, and our self-flagellation do it for us.
Why do we do it – In part this has to do with childhood and in part with our failures in adult life. Once we encounter some failures, we brand ourselves as failures. I know a person who not only defined themselves as a failure but also believed that anything they associated with would fail. This is a complex phenomenon that involves a total loss of self-confidence and sense of self-worth.
What should be done – To stop self-abuse, one must act slowly. External support may also be necessary. The trust that has been slowly eroded must be recovered slowly. This cannot be done quickly. Small failures have led to a loss of self-confidence. Small successes will lead to rebuilding confidence. With the slow rebuilding of trust, we must free ourselves from our guilt. We must forgive ourselves. We must show compassion towards ourselves. It is like this: if we find an injured person, we treat them gently and are very compassionate. We must do the same to ourselves.
We are all very precious. We are extremely precious to ourselves. Like a precious possession we carry with us, we must protect our dignity and our self-confidence. We must show the same care. This is self-compassion.

text:
25 agenti compaiono davanti a un gran giurì in un caso di combattimenti tra galli
Fino a 25 agenti di polizia di Honolulu hanno testimoniato davanti a un gran giurì federale nell'ambito di un'indagine dell'FBI per accertare se cinque agenti fossero coinvolti in operazioni illegali di combattimenti tra galli, secondo una fonte vicina all'indagine.
Gli agenti che hanno testimoniato provenivano per lo più dal Distretto 2 (North Shore e Central Oahu), secondo la fonte.
C'è stata più di una giornata di testimonianze davanti al gran giurì, l'ultima giovedì, ha riferito la fonte.
Né l'FBI né la polizia di Honolulu hanno confermato che le udienze abbiano avuto luogo.
È stato quasi un anno fa che gli agenti federali hanno iniziato a indagare sugli agenti di polizia che si riteneva fossero coinvolti in operazioni illegali di combattimenti tra galli a North Shore e Windward Oahu.
Nell'ambito dell'indagine, gli agenti dell'FBI hanno fatto irruzione nelle case dei cinque agenti e di un parente di uno degli agenti il 31 marzo e il 6 aprile 2005.
Gli agenti sotto indagine includono un veterano con 28 anni di servizio che era stato assegnato all'Unità di Intelligence Criminale prima di andare in pensione lo scorso settembre. Gli altri agenti sono un sergente veterano con 22 anni di servizio nel reparto scommesse; due membri dell'Unità di Riduzione del Crimine del Distretto 4 (Windward Oahu) — un veterano con sei anni e uno con 20 anni di servizio; e un sergente di pattuglia veterano con 20 anni di servizio del Distretto 2 (Wahiawa-North Shore).
Quando è iniziata l'indagine dell'FBI, l'HPD ha collocato tutti gli agenti in congedo amministrativo retribuito in attesa dell'esito dell'indagine. I funzionari del sindacato di polizia hanno dichiarato che, a gennaio, il totale di nove mesi per pagare gli agenti affinché non lavorassero era stimato in circa 250.000 dollari. Da allora, il sindacato stima che ciascuno dei quattro agenti rimasti sia costato al dipartimento circa 20.000 dollari per ogni mese in cui sono rimasti in congedo.
translation:
25 officers appear before a grand jury in a cockfighting case
As many as 25 Honolulu police officers have testified before a federal grand jury as part of an FBI investigation to determine if five officers were involved in illegal cockfighting operations, according to a source close to the investigation.
The officers who testified were mostly from District 2 (North Shore and Central Oahu), according to the source.
There was more than one day of testimony before the grand jury, the last one on Thursday, the source reported.
Neither the FBI nor the Honolulu police have confirmed that the hearings took place.
It was almost a year ago that federal agents began investigating police officers who were believed to be involved in illegal cockfighting operations in North Shore and Windward Oahu.
As part of the investigation, FBI agents raided the homes of the five officers and a relative of one of the officers on March 31 and April 6, 2005.
The officers under investigation include a veteran with 28 years of service who had been assigned to the Criminal Intelligence Unit before retiring last September. The other officers are a veteran sergeant with 22 years of service in the gambling division; two members of the District 4 Crime Reduction Unit (Windward Oahu)—one with six years and one with 20 years of service; and a veteran patrol sergeant with 20 years of service from District 2 (Wahiawa-North Shore).
When the FBI investigation began, the HPD placed all the officers on paid administrative leave pending the outcome of the investigation. Police union officials stated that in January, the total of nine months to pay the officers not to work was estimated at about $250,000. Since then, the union estimates that each of the four remaining officers has cost the department about $20,000 for each month they have been on leave.

text:
Quali sono i benefici dell'ambra blu?
Depressione, stress, fatica, sistema immunitario, denti, circolazione sanguigna, antidolorifico, intelligenza, protezione
L'ambra blu ha le stesse caratteristiche elettrostatiche dell'ambra gialla. È un emettitore di ioni negativi. Gli ioni negativi agiscono contro lo stress e potenziano le difese immunitarie. L'ambra blu ha proprietà calmanti, facilitando il sonno e aiutando a combattere alcune forme di stress e depressione. Allevia inoltre nei neonati il dolore legato alla dentizione. Aiuta ad attivare la circolazione sanguigna e allevia i dolori muscolari e articolari.
L'ambra blu promuove il pensiero flessibile e l'adattabilità. È utile per le persone che creano opere intellettuali (ricercatori, scrittori). È una pietra protettiva, può guarire le ferite emotive e aiutare ad andare avanti.
Tutte le informazioni contenute in questa pagina sono fornite a scopo indicativo e presentano benefici esoterici e credenze popolari. In nessun modo costituiscono consigli medici e non possono essere utilizzate come sostituto di un trattamento medico. Solo il tuo medico ha le competenze necessarie per diagnosticare una possibile patologia e fare la prescrizione appropriata. Queste informazioni riguardano le proprietà tradizionali delle pietre nella litoterapia come indicato da molti riferimenti.
translation:
What are the benefits of blue amber?
Depression, stress, fatigue, immune system, teeth, blood circulation, painkiller, intelligence, protection
Blue amber has the same electrostatic characteristics as yellow amber. It is an emitter of negative ions. Negative ions act against stress and boost immune defenses. Blue amber has calming properties, facilitating sleep and helping to combat some forms of stress and depression. It also relieves teething pain in infants. It helps activate blood circulation and relieves muscle and joint pain.
Blue amber promotes flexible thinking and adaptability. It is useful for people who create intellectual works (researchers, writers). It is a protective stone, it can heal emotional wounds and help move forward.
All information contained on this page is provided for indicative purposes and presents esoteric benefits and popular beliefs. In no way does it constitute medical advice and cannot be used as a substitute for medical treatment. Only your doctor has the necessary expertise to diagnose a possible illness and make the appropriate prescription. This information concerns the traditional properties of stones in lithotherapy as indicated by many references.

text:
Domanda:

Qualche suggerimento su come sigillare il vuoto tra il cartongesso e il pavimento lungo una stanza, permettendo comunque che la moquette venga infilata sotto i battiscopa? Il vuoto è troppo grande per il silicone e penso che la schiuma espandente sarebbe un casino totale.

tl;dr:

Lo chiedo perché non sono riuscito a localizzare un odore forte che proviene da questa stanza. Un odore unico di muffa o forse di un'infestazione di formiche/insetti che sospetto provenga dalla parete esterna, forse danni da acqua, ma nulla sotto questa stanza mostra perdite d'acqua. Non c'è nulla di evidente che provenga dalla bocchetta dell'aria condizionata o dalla soffitta sopra. Ho persino sollevato un punto sospetto del pavimento ma sotto è tutto pulito. Deve per forza venire dal cazzo di esterno.

Sigillerò i battiscopa con un primer a base d'olio e metterò il silicone tra... in pratica sigillerò la stanza da qualsiasi cosa possa filtrare. Immagino di dover rimuovere i battiscopa per sigillare correttamente. Che esasperazione.

compra solo un deodorante per ambienti e sistema quel cazzo di odore

>>2600454 (OP)

Di cosa è fatta la parete?

Ho avuto un'esperienza simile con una stanza nella casa di mio fratello che stavamo ristrutturando, è risultato che era la vernice sulle pareti. La nostra migliore ipotesi è che la parete non fosse mai stata sigillata e avessero dipinto direttamente sull'intonaco, causando un odore di muffa mentre l'acqua trasudava dietro la vernice.

Di solito trovo che il flusso d'aria sia più utile a risolvere gli odori che sigillarli.

impara a usare l'ozono

>>2600454 (OP)

Descrivi meglio l'odore. È necessario immaginare l'odore.

Proverei con il cordolo di supporto + silicone.

> puzza

Apri le pareti e cerca

• una tanica di pisci e/o

• un secchio di merda

che un appaltatore ha lasciato nel muro.

>>2600454 (OP)

>Lo chiedo perché non sono riuscito a localizzare un odore forte che proviene da questa stanza.

Trova e risolvi l'odore prima. L'odore è il segno di un problema. Mascherare l'odore non risolve il problema.
translation:
Question:

Any suggestions on how to seal the gap between the drywall and the floor along a room, while still allowing the carpet to be tucked under the baseboards? The gap is too big for silicone, and I think expanding foam would be a total mess.

tl;dr:

I'm asking because I haven't been able to locate a strong odor coming from this room. A distinct moldy smell or maybe an ant/insect infestation that I suspect is coming from the exterior wall, perhaps water damage, but nothing under this room shows any water leaks. There's nothing obvious coming from the air vent or the attic above. I even lifted a suspicious spot on the floor, but underneath it's all clean. It has to be coming from the damn outside.

I'll seal the baseboards with an oil-based primer and put silicone between... basically, I'll seal the room from anything that might leak in. I imagine I'll have to remove the baseboards to seal it properly. What a pain.

just buy an air freshener and fix that damn smell

>>2600454 (OP)

What is the wall made of?

I had a similar experience with a room in my brother's house that we were renovating; it turned out to be the paint on the walls. Our best guess is that the wall had never been sealed and they had painted directly onto the plaster, causing a moldy smell as water seeped behind the paint.

I usually find that airflow is more helpful in resolving odors than sealing them.

learn to use ozone

>>2600454 (OP)

Describe the smell better. You need to imagine the smell.

I would try the baseboard trim + silicone.

> stinks

Open the walls and look for

• a bucket of piss and/or

• a bucket of shit

that a contractor left in the wall.

>>2600454 (OP)

>I'm asking because I haven't been able to locate a strong odor coming from this room.

Find and fix the odor first. The odor is a sign of a problem. Masking the odor doesn't solve the problem.

text:
Il Presidente Obama, il cui partito è stato massacrato nelle elezioni di metà mandato dell'anno scorso a causa in parte della scarsa affluenza tra i Democratici, ha sostenuto mercoledì l'idea del voto obbligatorio.
“Sarebbe trasformativo se votassero tutti,” ha detto il Sig. Obama durante un evento pubblico a Cleveland. “Questo contrasterebbe i soldi [delle campagne elettorali] più di ogni altra cosa. Se votassero tutti, cambierebbe completamente la mappa politica di questo paese.” (altro…)
Nel febbraio 2015, i funzionari venezuelani erano indignati quando è emerso che l'Ambasciata degli Stati Uniti in Venezuela stesse cercando di mettere in atto un colpo di stato corrompendo i funzionari. Il Vicepresidente Joe Biden è stato uno degli accusati dal Venezuela – un mese dopo gli Stati Uniti hanno dichiarato il Venezuela una “minaccia alla sicurezza”. (altro…)
FOX31 Denver ha riferito che una telecamera “misteriosa” che era “posizionata per catturare e registrare le targhe e i tratti somatici dei clienti che lasciavano un ufficio postale di Golden” è scomparsa nell'arco di un'ora dal momento in cui è stata osservata. (altro…)
WRC ha già riferito di questo in precedenza – la Turchia ha assistito anche l'ISIS/Al Qaeda…
Martedì, ben 85 militanti feriti del gruppo siriano di Al-Qaeda “Jabhat Al-Nusra” (Fronte della Vittoria) e dell'Esercito Siriano Libero (FSA) sono stati trasportati in ospedali israeliani e giordani dopo un potente attacco congiunto della 9ª Divisione Corazzata dell'Esercito Arabo Siriano e della Forza Aerea Araba Siriana (SAAF). (altro…)
Un giornalista non riesce a trattenere le risate quando la portavoce della Casa Bianca Jen Psaki afferma che gli Stati Uniti hanno una “politica di lunga data” contro il sostegno ai colpi di stato – nonostante il fatto che gli Stati Uniti abbiano creato un colpo di stato spietato in UCRAINA. (altro…)
translation:
President Obama, whose party was massacred in last year's midterms partly due to low Democratic turnout, supported the idea of mandatory voting on Wednesday.
"It would be transformative if everyone voted," Mr. Obama said during a public event in Cleveland. "This would counteract the money [in election campaigns] more than anything else. If everyone voted, it would completely change the political map of this country." (etc.)
In February 2015, Venezuelan officials were outraged when it emerged that the U.S. Embassy in Venezuela was trying to stage a coup by bribing officials. Vice President Joe Biden was one of those accused by Venezuela – a month after the United States declared Venezuela a "security threat." (etc.)
FOX31 Denver reported that a "mysterious" camera that was "positioned to capture and record the license plates and facial features of customers leaving a Golden post office" disappeared within an hour of being observed. (etc.)
WRC has already reported this before – Turkey also witnessed ISIS/Al Qaeda...
On Tuesday, 85 wounded militants from the Syrian Al-Qaeda group "Jabhat Al-Nusra" (Victory Front) and the Free Syrian Army (FSA) were transported to Israeli and Jordanian hospitals after a powerful joint attack by the 9th Armored Division of the Syrian Arab Army and the Syrian Arab Air Force (SAAF). (etc.)
A journalist cannot hold back his laughter when White House spokesperson Jen Psaki states that the United States has a "long-standing policy" against supporting coups – despite the fact that the United States orchestrated a ruthless coup in UKRAINE. (etc.)

text:
Le classifiche ufficiali della UFC sono sempre oggetto di accesi dibattiti. I membri della stampa votano dopo ogni evento e la UFC aggiorna i gradi il lunedì successivo.
Le classifiche sono una cosa positiva. Permettono sia ai combattenti che ai fan di sapere a che punto si trovano nella divisione. Non corrispondono sempre direttamente all'ottenimento di un match per il titolo, ma una volta che un combattente entra nei primi cinque, è chiaro che è in lizza.
Quando si deve decidere chi rimuovere dalle classifiche, non è sempre chiaro. Le divisioni dei pesi mosca e dei pesi gallo femminili sono così disperatamente prive di talento che non si può davvero sostenere che qualcuno debba essere rimosso. Eppure, nelle divisioni più consolidate, ci sono alcune scelte evidenti.
Vengono evidenziati nove combattenti in sei diverse divisioni che semplicemente non c'entrano nulla.
È importante notare che il fatto che un combattente non meriti di stare in classifica non significa che debba essere considerato l'underdog contro qualcuno che è classificato. Le classifiche riguardano lo stato attuale della divisione basandosi su vittorie, sconfitte e prestazioni recenti.
Diamoci un'occhiata a questi nove combattenti UFC che devono essere rimossi dalle classifiche.
translation:
The official UFC rankings are always the subject of heated debate. Members of the press vote after every event, and the UFC updates the rankings the following Monday.
The rankings are a positive thing. They allow both fighters and fans to know where they stand in the division. They don't always directly correspond to getting a title match, but once a fighter is in the top five, it's clear they are in contention.
When it comes to deciding who to remove from the rankings, it's not always clear. The flyweight and women's bantamweight divisions are so desperately lacking in talent that you really can't argue that someone needs to be removed. However, in the more established divisions, there are some clear choices.
Nine fighters are highlighted across six different divisions who simply have nothing to do with it.
It's important to note that the fact that a fighter doesn't deserve to be ranked doesn't mean they should be considered the underdog against someone who is ranked. The rankings reflect the current state of the division based on wins, losses, and recent performance.
Let's take a look at these nine UFC fighters who need to be removed from the rankings.

text:
Una fragranza capace di trasmettere una ventata di fiori selvatici cresciuti in città e una nota di spirito totalmente industriale.
Bond No.9 High Line è un bouquet di note floreali e marine decisamente androgine, in forte contrasto con fiori capaci di resistere a qualsiasi condizione climatica e con le erbe lungo il percorso della High Line. La nota di testa richiama una pianta erbacea, l'eragrostis spectabilis, legata a una nota agrumata di bergamotto e rabarbaro speziato indiano. Il cuore floreale del profumo è composto da rosa a foglia rossa, tulipani “Lady Jane” e giacinto di grape. Le sue note di fondo persistenti combinano la quercia degli alberi locali che offrono riparo e crescono vigorosamente, al muschio marino importato per richiamare la vicinanza del fiume Hudson, insieme a note di muschio e legno di teak, per ricordarci che Bond No. 9 High Line è un profumo metropolitano.
A cura di Davide Pratticò
translation:
A fragrance capable of conveying a breeze of wildflowers grown in the city and a note of totally industrial spirit.
Bond No.9 High Line is a bouquet of decidedly androgynous floral and marine notes, in strong contrast with flowers capable of withstanding any climatic condition and with the grasses along the High Line path. The top note recalls a herbaceous plant, eragrostis spectabilis, linked to a citrus note of bergamot and Indian spiced rhubarb. The floral heart of the fragrance is composed of red-leaf rose, "Lady Jane" tulips, and grape hyacinth. Its persistent base notes combine the oak of local trees that offer shelter and grow vigorously, with imported sea moss to evoke the proximity of the Hudson River, along with notes of moss and teak wood, to remind us that Bond No. 9 High Line is a metropolitan fragrance.
By Davide Pratticò

text:
Test dell'usato – campionesse del lusso: Audi A6 vs BMW Serie 5
Con i loro motori super efficienti, queste berline di lusso tra le più vendute soddisfano sia la testa che il cuore. Ma quale conviene comprare come usato?...
Quanto costeranno?
C'è poco che separi queste due sul prezzo. In effetti, a seconda di dove ti trovi nel paese e di quanto aggressivamente i concessionari locali abbiano prezzato le loro auto, potresti finire per pagare di più per la Serie 5 rispetto all'A6 – anche se, se ti accorgi che è così, probabilmente dovresti provare a cercare più lontano.
In generale, però, è la BMW a superare l'Audi sul prezzo, e riesce a farlo anche in altri ambiti. I dati ufficiali sui consumi di carburante attribuiscono alla Serie 5 una media di 62,8 mpg contro i 57,6 mpg dell'A6, mentre le sue emissioni inferiori di 119 g/km fanno scivolare la BMW nella fascia fiscale di 30 sterline all'anno – le emissioni di 129 g/km dell'Audi significano che dovrai pagare 110 sterline.
Vale la pena notare, tuttavia, che la versione dell'A6 che stiamo testando qui è precedente all'introduzione da parte di Audi della sua versione ad alta efficienza dell'A6, chiamata Ultra, nel 2014. Quel modello riduce la tassa a un livello comparabile e aumenta l'efficienza a 64,2 mpg – anche se, ovviamente, dovrai allungare il budget per potertela permettere, essendo un modello più recente.
Così come testate qui, però, è una vittoria netta per la BMW sia in termini di prezzo d'acquisto che di costi di gestione. Inoltre, sebbene nessuna di queste auto abbia una reputazione particolarmente brillante per quanto riguarda l'affidabilità, la Serie 5 ha la reputazione migliore delle due, con la BMW che si è classificata appena sopra l'Audi nel JD Power Vehicle Dependability Study del 2016.
Tuttavia, l'A6 reagisce almeno con costi di manutenzione più bassi – e dato quanto siano marginali le differenze tra queste due auto in altri settori, questo potrebbe essere sufficiente a spostare l'ago della bilancia a suo favore, a seconda del chilometraggio che percorri.
translation:
Used Car Test – Luxury Champions: Audi A6 vs BMW 5 Series
With their super-efficient engines, these luxury sedans are among the best-selling and satisfy both the head and the heart. But which one is worth buying used?...
How much will they cost?
There is little that separates these two in price. In fact, depending on where you are in the country and how aggressively local dealers have priced their cars, you might end up paying more for the 5 Series than the A6 – although, if you notice that, you probably should try looking further afield.
In general, however, the BMW beats the Audi on price, and it manages to do so in other areas as well. Official fuel consumption data attributes an average of 62.8 mpg to the 5 Series versus 57.6 mpg for the A6, while its lower emissions of 119 g/km slide the BMW into the £30 annual tax bracket – the A6's emissions of 129 g/km mean you will have to pay £110.
It is worth noting, however, that the A6 version we are testing here predates Audi's introduction of its high-efficiency version of the A6, called Ultra, in 2014. That model reduces the tax to a comparable level and increases efficiency to 64.2 mpg – although, obviously, you will have to stretch your budget to afford it, as it is a more recent model.
As tested here, however, it is a clear victory for the BMW both in terms of purchase price and running costs. Furthermore, although neither of these cars has a particularly brilliant reputation for reliability, the 5 Series has the better reputation of the two, with BMW ranking just above Audi in the 2016 JD Power Vehicle Dependability Study.
However, the A6 reacts at least with lower maintenance costs – and given how marginal the differences are between these two cars in other areas, this might be enough to tip the scales in its favor, depending on the mileage you drive.

text:
Abbiamo avuto un supplente di inglese per tutta questa settimana. Sono andato a nuotare e ho fatto 40 vasche.
|1933 - Gene Autry|
Nome di nascita: Orvon Grover Autry
(29 settembre 1907 – 2 ottobre 1998)
"Il Cowboy Cantante" firmò un contratto discografico con la Columbia Records nel 1929.
Dopo aver cantato di tutto, dalla "musica hillbilly" al blues, ebbe finalmente un successo
con "That Silver-Haired Daddy of Mine", in un duetto con Jimmy Long, e che Autry
e Long scrissero insieme. Autry cantò anche il classico successo di Ray Whitley "Back in the Saddle
Again", così come molte canzoni natalizie, tra cui "Santa Claus Is Coming to
Town", la sua composizione "Here Comes Santa Claus", "Frosty the Snowman" e il suo
successo più grande, "Rudolph the Red-Nosed Reindeer". In totale, Autry realizzò 640 registrazioni.
Apparve inoltre in 94 film e 91 episodi della serie televisiva "The Gene Autry Show".
translation:
We have had an English substitute all this week. I went swimming and did 40 laps.
|1933 - Gene Autry|
Birth name: Orvon Grover Autry
(September 29, 1907 – October 2, 1998)
"The Singing Cowboy" signed a record contract with Columbia Records in 1929.
After singing about everything, from "hillbilly music" to blues, he finally had a hit
with "That Silver-Haired Daddy of Mine," in a duet with Jimmy Long, which Autry
and Long wrote together. Autry also sang the classic hit by Ray Whitley "Back in the Saddle
Again," as well as many Christmas songs, including "Santa Claus Is Coming to
Town," his composition "Here Comes Santa Claus," "Frosty the Snowman," and his biggest hit, "Rudolph the Red-Nosed Reindeer." In total, Autry made 640 recordings.
He also appeared in 94 films and 91 episodes of the television series "The Gene Autry Show."

text:
Vedi il tuo amore a distanza grazie ad Alaska Air
È ora di tirarti FUORI dall'Idaho e buttarti NELLE braccia amorevoli della tua cosina!
Mentre siedo qui nella Treasure Valley nel mio ufficio situato a Boise sud-est, non posso fare a meno di chiedermi come il COVID abbia disturbato e causato problemi alle coppie che vivono relazioni a distanza. Le relazioni a distanza NON sono MAI facili. Se hai mai avuto il piacere (lo dico sarcasticamente perché non ce n'è quasi mai... gioco di parole voluto) di starne in una, sai che sono complicate e richiedono molta pazienza. Quelle litigate del sabato sera che scoppiano dopo che entrambi avete preso un paio di shot e di cui vi dimenticate la mattina dopo, diventano telefonate a tarda notte che si trascinano e da cui non è così facile uscire. Altre emozioni come la gelosia possono tendere a farsi sentire. Non fa proprio per me.
Il mio caro amico e collega Mikey qui a 103.5 KISS FM si trova lui stesso in un intreccio a distanza e gli ho suggerito di partecipare a questo fantastico concorso!
Come dice Alaska Airlines stessa riguardo al concorso:
Se hai un amore a distanza iniziato durante il lockdown o se siete stati separati dagli ordini di restare a casa, vogliamo sentirlo. Invia la tua storia qui sotto per avere la possibilità di vincere uno dei 100 biglietti di andata e ritorno per un po' di faccia a faccia nella vita reale. Condividi la tua storia entro il 5 febbraio 2021 per avere la possibilità di vincere.
Ovviamente, oggi è il 5 febbraio, quindi fatevi svelti a inviare la domanda! Per quanto ne sappia, non ci sono requisiti su che tipo di relazione o su quanto debba essere seria per qualificarsi—quindi un booty call a distanza? Dacci dentro! Oppure inventati una storia sul tuo "fidanzato" che per caso vive alle Bahamas?
Per partecipare, clicca QUI.
translation:
See your long-distance love thanks to Alaska Air
It's time to get YOU OUT of Idaho and throw yourself INTO the loving arms of your sweetie!
While I sit here in the Treasure Valley in my office located in southeast Boise, I can't help but wonder how COVID has disrupted and caused problems for couples in long-distance relationships. Long-distance relationships ARE NEVER easy. If you've ever had the pleasure (I say this sarcastically because it almost never happens... intentional wordplay) of being in one, you know they are complicated and require a lot of patience. Those Saturday night fights that erupt after you've both had a couple of shots and forget about them the next morning turn into late-night calls that drag on and aren't so easy to get out of. Other emotions like jealousy can tend to surface. It's just not for me.
My dear friend and colleague Mikey here at 103.5 KISS FM is himself in a long-distance entanglement, and I suggested he enter this fantastic contest!
As Alaska Airlines itself says about the contest:
If you have a long-distance love that started during lockdown or if you were separated by stay-at-home orders, we want to hear about it. Send in your story below for a chance to win one of 100 round-trip tickets for some real-life face time. Share your story by February 5, 2021, for a chance to win.
Obviously, today is February 5th, so hurry up and submit your entry! As far as I know, there are no requirements on what kind of relationship or how serious it has to be to qualify—so a long-distance booty call? Go for it! Or make up a story about your "boyfriend" who happens to live in the Bahamas?
To participate, click HERE.

text:
Sono conosciuti come i Quattro Cavalieri. E sì, proprio come nell'apocalisse. Si potevano vedere ogni martedì sera mentre facevano di tutto per passare del tempo insieme, generalmente combinando un guaio o l'altro. Ogni leader nell'edificio li conosceva per nome. E uno di loro era il mio.
Ma chi è questo Iron Pol?
Un ex marinaio fuori forma, che è diventato un maratoneta, poi un triatleta, Ironman e ultramaratoneta. Ora, la vita mi ha spinto verso il pattinaggio di velocità su pista corta. Più che i titoli, ciò che conta è lo stile di vita e condividerlo con gli altri.
translation:
They are known as the Four Knights. And yes, just like in the apocalypse. You could see them every Tuesday evening while doing everything to spend time together, usually getting into some trouble or another. Every leader in the building knew them by name. And one of them was mine.
But who is this Iron Pol?
A former unfit sailor, who became a marathon runner, then a triathlete, Ironman, and ultramarathon runner. Now, life has pushed me towards short-track speed skating. More than the titles, what matters is the lifestyle and sharing it with others.

text:
Yulara (303 km)
Alice Springs (473 km)
Parcheggio di Kings Canyon
Parcheggio di Kings Canyon
Tutto l'anno, ma se le temperature previste superano i 36° Celsius devi iniziare la camminata entro le 9:00 per evitare il caldo eccessivo.
La camminata lungo il bordo (Rim walk) di Kings Canyon offre l'opportunità di avere una vista a volo d'uccello sul paesaggio desertico. La Rim walk è un percorso a senso unico, contrassegnato da frecce blu, e inizia con una salita piuttosto ripida dal parcheggio attraverso una serie di gradini di pietra fino alla cima del canyon.
Oltre a essere un modo per gestire il flusso di persone sulla cima del canyon, assicura anche che chi non è abbastanza in forma per affrontare questa camminata si ritiri presto. Per gli escursionisti in forma, questa camminata non presenterà problemi, ma se non rientri in questa categoria o hai bambini piccoli, potresti fare meglio a fare la camminata di 2,6 km di Kings Creek. Se decidi di portare i bambini in cima al canyon, tienili d'occhio attentamente perché ci sono dei precipizi seri con cui fare i conti.
Una volta fatto tutto il lavoro duro all'inizio, passerai la maggior parte del tempo a percorrere il bordo del canyon verso vari punti panoramici che offrono viste spettacolari. L'altitudine massima in questa camminata varierà a seconda di quanto vorrai esplorare la cima del canyon. Puoi rimanere sulla cima del bordo del canyon per tutta la camminata prima di scendere di nuovo al parcheggio, oppure hai l'opzione di scendere nel Giardino dell'Eden circa a metà percorso. Il Giardino dell'Eden è essenzialmente un'oasi, completa di acqua nel mezzo del canyon. E semplicemente bellissimo!
Il colore e le formazioni rocciose in questa camminata, come in gran parte dei parchi circostanti, sono spettacolari e, come fanatico della corteccia, ci sono alcuni ghost gum e altri alberi occasionali davvero incredibili che puoi osservare da vicino. Anche se non valuto questa camminata quanto quella alla base di Uluru, consiglierei comunque di trovare il tempo per farla.
Segnaletica del percorso con valutazione del comfort termico
Mappa della segnaletica interpretativa
La camminata inizia con una bella e grande serie di scale di roccia
Marcatori del sentiero – frecce blu
Uno dei molti punti panoramici
Amo la corteccia degli alberi anche quando è morta
Vista da uno dei punti panoramici sulla pianura sottostante
Cartello del Giardino dell'Eden
Guardando giù nel Giardino dell'Eden; molta acqua
Vista del Giardino dell'Eden
Vista del canyon che mostra altri escursionisti e parte delle infrastrutture
Molte persone faranno questa camminata come parte di un tour a Uluru o come parte di un viaggio on the road più ampio. Watarrka (Kings Canyon) è accessibile anche da Yulara (mappa di Google Maps)
Questa camminata è stata intrapresa dal team di Australian Hiker
translation:
Yulara (303 km)
Alice Springs (473 km)
Kings Canyon Parking
Kings Canyon Parking
All year round, but if the forecast temperatures exceed 36° Celsius you must start the walk by 9:00 am to avoid excessive heat.
The Rim walk of Kings Canyon offers the opportunity for a bird's-eye view of the desert landscape. The Rim walk is a one-way trail, marked with blue arrows, and starts with a rather steep climb from the parking lot through a series of stone steps up to the top of the canyon.
In addition to being a way to manage the flow of people on the canyon rim, it also ensures that those who are not fit enough to tackle this walk retire early. For fit hikers, this walk will not present any problems, but if you do not fall into this category or have small children, you might be better off doing the 2.6 km Kings Creek walk. If you decide to take the children to the top of the canyon, keep a close eye on them because there are serious cliffs to contend with.
Once the hard work at the beginning is done, you will spend most of your time traversing the canyon rim towards various viewpoints that offer spectacular views. The maximum altitude on this walk will vary depending on how much you want to explore the top of the canyon. You can stay on the canyon rim for the entire walk before descending back to the parking lot, or you have the option to descend into the Garden of Eden about halfway through. The Garden of Eden is essentially an oasis, complete with water in the middle of the canyon. And simply beautiful!
The colors and rock formations on this walk, like in most of the surrounding parks, are spectacular, and as a bark fanatic, there are some incredible ghost gums and other occasional trees you can observe up close. Although I do not rate this walk as highly as the one at the base of Uluru, I would still recommend finding the time to do it.
Trail signage with thermal comfort rating
Interpretive signage map
The walk begins with a beautiful and large series of rock steps
Trail markers – blue arrows
One of the many viewpoints
I love the bark of the trees even when they are dead
View from one of the viewpoints over the plains below
Garden of Eden sign
Looking down into the Garden of Eden; lots of water
View of the Garden of Eden
Canyon view showing other hikers and part of the infrastructure
Many people will do this walk as part of a tour of Uluru or as part of a larger road trip. Watarrka (Kings Canyon) is also accessible from Yulara (Google Maps)
This walk was undertaken by the Australian Hiker team

text:
In qualità di Terapeuta del Counseling, utilizzo un approccio integrale e relazionale alla psicoterapia e al counseling di supporto. Sostanzialmente, l'integrale comprende un'integrazione di molti diversi approcci al counseling basati sulla tua visione del mondo e sui tuoi valori. Il relazionale comporta il raccogliere e affinare i tuoi punti di forza, i tuoi doni e le tue capacità per aprirti e guarire il rapporto con te stesso e con le persone nel tuo presente e nel tuo passato. Quando ciò accade, tutti gli altri aspetti della vita vengono influenzati in modo evidente in modi nuovi e stimolanti.
Janet Sheppard MA RCC
translation:
As a Counseling Therapist, I use an integral and relational approach to psychotherapy and supportive counseling. Essentially, the integral involves an integration of many different counseling approaches based on your worldview and your values. The relational involves gathering and refining your strengths, your gifts, and your abilities to open up and heal your relationship with yourself and with people in your present and in your past. When this happens, all other aspects of life are evidently influenced in new and stimulating ways.
Janet Sheppard MA RCC

text:
У меня есть небольшая подработка над новым «Бивисом и Баттхедом», и я слышал, что они ведут переговоры о создании игрового драматического мини-сериала, сосредоточенного на Бивисе, который прокладывает себе путь через колледж после того, как разорвал дружбу с Баттхедом, потому что ему осточертело насилие. Некоторые сценаристы шоу работали над сериалом «Уэнсдэй» на Netflix, а также несколько сценаристов из анимационного сериала «Харли Квинн». Майк не будет режиссером, но дал свое одобрение. Недавно они нашли молодого человека на роль Бивиса и ищут парня или девушку в возрасте примерно 16–19 лет на роль его любовного интереса в сериале. Действие шоу будет происходить вскоре после финала перезапуска, и они надеются на релиз в 2026 году; также в нем будет много научно-фантастических элементов и сюжетов. Идея была выдвинута из-за того, что очень многие фанаты хотят спин-офф про Бивиса без Баттхеда, который фокусируется на нем и является любовным письмом сторонникам Бивиса и фанаткам. Также в какой-то момент будет раскрыто настоящее имя Бивиса.

Я не могу рассказать много, но Кит вернется, и сейчас идут переговоры с актерами на эту роль, имен которых мне не назвали. Также Баттхед будет в тюрьме за убийство и нанесение телесных повреждений, и он отчаянно хочет сманипулировать Бивисом, чтобы тот очистил его имя. Баттхед также будет использовать свое настоящее имя и другое имя, отличное от Баттхеда, которое было прозвищем, данным ему Бивисом, когда они были друзьями в этом сериале; для Баттхеда актер тоже уже подобран. Шоу будет исследовать темы психических заболеваний, стокгольмского синдрома, насилия, зависимости, расстройств обучения и сексуальности.

>Picrel: Тимоти Рассел, человек, который должен сыграть Кита

I have a small side project on the new "Bikini Bottom and Batthead," and I heard they are negotiating to create a dramatic mini-series focused on Bikini who carves his own path through college after breaking up with Batthead because he was sick of the violence. Some show writers worked on the Netflix series "Wednesday," as well as several writers from the animated series "Harley Quinn." Mike won't be the director, but he gave his approval. They recently found a young man for the role of Bikini and are looking for a guy or girl around 16-19 years old for the role of his love interest in the series. The show will take place shortly after the finale of the reboot, and they hope for a 2026 release; it will also have a lot of sci-fi elements and plots. The idea was put forward because so many fans want a spin-off about Bikini without Batthead, focusing on him and being a love letter to Bikini supporters and fangirls. Bikini's real name will also be revealed at some point.

I can't say much, but Kit will return, and negotiations are currently underway with the actors for this role, whose names I haven't been given. Batthead will also be in jail for murder and assault, and he desperately wants to manipulate Bikini into clearing his name. Batthead will also use his real name and another name, different from Batthead, which was the nickname Bikini gave him when they were friends in this series; an actor has also been cast for Batthead. The show will explore themes of mental illness, Stockholm syndrome, violence, addiction, learning disorders, and sexuality.

text:
Энн Миски является главным исполнительным директором Union Station Homeless Services (Union Station), обслуживающим Пасадену и долину Сан-Габриэль (SGV). Union Station — крупнейшее агентство, работающее над ликвидацией бездомности в SGV, которое фокусируется на стратегических, инновационных и эффективных решениях по прекращению бездомности для отдельных лиц и семей. Ранее она работала главным исполнительным директором Женского центра в центре города (Downtown Women’s Center), расположенного в районе Скид-Роу в центре Лос-Анджелеса. Находясь там, она сосредоточилась на создании долгосрочных позитивных изменений для женщин, столкнувшихся с бедностью, насилием и бездомностью.

До переезда в Калифорнию она была первым исполнительным директором Funders Together to End Homelessness — национальной членской организации для спонсоров, ориентированной на лучшие практики по ликвидации бездомности. За время работы там она превратила организацию в процветающую, признанную на национальном уровне структуру, насчитывающую почти 300 фондов, членов и филиалов United Way в Лос-Анджелесе, Сан-Диего, Хьюстоне, Флориде и Канаде.

Энн является признанным на национальном уровне оратором и одним из ведущих национальных экспертов по вопросам системных изменений и бездомности. Она неоднократно приглашалась с выступлениями в Белый дом и работала над инициативой первой леди Мишель Обамы Joining Forces в поддержку ветеранов. Она также сотрудничала с Министерством жилищного строительства и городского развития и Межведомственным советом США по вопросам бездомности для разработки национальной стратегии по борьбе с бездомностью среди молодежи.

Более 25 лет работы как в корпоративном, так и в некоммерческом секторах дали ей уникальный взгляд на роль, которую некоммерческие организации, правительства и сообщества могут совместно сыграть в осуществлении и поддержке решения серьезных социальных проблем.

Уроженка Аризоны, Энн большую часть жизни прожила как в западной, так и в центральной Канаде. Она получила степень бакалавра по истории и театру в Университете Лебриджа в Альберте и степень магистра богословия в Университете Торонто. Она также жила в Испании и Франции.

Она замужем за Робертом, концертным скрипачом, и является матерью Томаса и Элианы. Она — собственность Мичетро, семейного кота, и автор любовных и приключенческих романов.
translation:
Ann Miskey is the Executive Director of Union Station Homeless Services (Union Station), serving Pasadena and the San Gabriel Valley (SGV). Union Station is the largest agency working to eliminate homelessness in SGV, focusing on strategic, innovative, and effective solutions to ending homelessness for individuals and families. Previously, she served as the Executive Director of the Downtown Women’s Center, located in the Skid Row area of downtown Los Angeles. While there, she focused on creating long-term positive change for women facing poverty, violence, and homelessness.

Before moving to California, she was the Executive Director of Funders Together to End Homelessness—a national membership organization for funders focused on best practices in ending homelessness. During her time there, she transformed the organization into a thriving, nationally recognized entity with nearly 300 foundations, members, and United Way affiliates in Los Angeles, San Diego, Houston, Florida, and Canada.

Ann is a nationally recognized speaker and one of the leading national experts on systemic change and homelessness. She has been invited to speak at the White House multiple times and worked on First Lady Michelle Obama's Joining Forces initiative in support of veterans. She has also collaborated with the Department of Housing and Urban Development and the U.S. Interagency Council on Homelessness to develop a national strategy to combat youth homelessness.

More than 25 years of experience in both the corporate and non-profit sectors have given her a unique perspective on the role that non-profit organizations, governments, and communities can play together in implementing and supporting solutions to serious social problems.

An Arizona native, Ann lived for much of her life in both Western and Central Canada. She earned a Bachelor of Arts in History and Theatre from the University of Lethbridge in Alberta and a Master of Divinity from the University of Toronto. She has also lived in Spain and France.

She is married to Robert, a concert violinist, and is the mother of Thomas and Eliana. She is the owner of Mictro, a family cat, and an author of romance and adventure novels.

text:
Я оформил Бараку Хусейна Обаме подарочное годовое членство в NRA, а также ежемесячную подписку на журнал America's 1st. Freedom. Очень надеюсь, что он будет с жадностью вчитываться в этот журнал каждый месяц, так же охотно, как и я.
В последнее время я довольно активно занимаюсь делами NRA.
Сегодня я вступил в организацию в качестве члена Фонда. Затем я оформил подарочное годовое членство для сестры моей жены, а также дополнительное членство для её партнера, девушки (в какие времена мы живем). Ранее я оформил моей жене пожизненное членство в качестве подарка на 30-ю годовщину свадьбы (жемчуг её не особо волнует).
Помимо всей остальной деятельности в NRA, в прошлые выходные я стал сертифицированным инструктором по CP и PPITH и записался на дополнительные курсы.
Примерно час назад мне пришла в голову безумная идея, и я вдруг осознал, что пока NRA проводит свой 142-й ежегодный съезд на этой неделе / выходных в Хьюстоне, штат Техас, есть еще кое-кто, кого мне стоит записать в члены NRA.
Наслаждайтесь членством в NRA, господин Обама!
translation:
I have arranged a gift annual membership in the NRA for Barack Hussein Obama, as well as a monthly subscription to America's 1st. Freedom magazine. I really hope he will devour this magazine every month, just as eagerly as I do.
Lately, I have been quite active in NRA affairs.
Today I joined the organization as a Foundation member. Then I arranged a gift annual membership for my wife's sister, as well as an additional membership for her partner, a girlfriend (what times we live in). Previously, I arranged a lifetime membership for my wife as a gift for our 30th wedding anniversary (pearls don't particularly concern her).
In addition to all the other activities in the NRA, last weekend I became a certified CP and PPITH instructor and signed up for additional courses.
About an hour ago, a crazy idea occurred to me, and I suddenly realized that while the NRA is holding its 142nd annual convention this week/weekend in Houston, Texas, there is still someone I should enroll in the NRA.
Enjoy your NRA membership, Mr. Obama!

text:
Защитники прав на владение оружием провели митинг на ступенях капитолия

В воскресенье защитники прав на владение оружием собрались у Капитолия штата в Харрисберге, чтобы отстоять свои права, гарантированные Второй поправкой. Организация Gun Rights Across America, состоящая из волонтеров — владельцев оружия и активистов, провела митинг на ступенях капитолия. Члены группы заявляют, что хотят отстоять свое конституционное право хранить и носить оружие.

Эрик Патрони, координатор Gun Rights Across America по штату, говорит: «Я считаю, что граждане, владеющие оружием, не являются проблемой и не лежат в основе сути проблемы с оружием. Это люди, которые не владеют оружием законно, создают всем нам, законным владельцам оружия, головную боль и раздражение, заставляя бороться за наше право хранить и носить оружие».

Группа проводит митинги по всей стране, чтобы бороться за свои права по Второй поправке. Среди выступавших на воскресном мероприятии были Ким Столфер, сооснователь и председатель комитета Firearms Owners Against Crime, и сержант армии США в отставке Роберт Мэнсфилд.
translation:
Gun ownership rights defenders held a rally on the steps of the capitol

On Sunday, gun ownership rights defenders gathered at the State Capitol in Harrisburg to defend their rights guaranteed by the Second Amendment. The organization Gun Rights Across America, which consists of volunteers—gun owners and activists, held a rally on the steps of the capitol. Members of the group state that they want to defend their constitutional right to own and carry firearms.

Eric Patroni, the state coordinator for Gun Rights Across America, says: "I believe that law-abiding gun owners are not the problem and are not at the root of the gun problem. It is the people who do not legally own guns who cause us all, legal gun owners, headaches and irritation by forcing us to fight for our right to own and carry firearms."

The group holds rallies across the country to fight for their Second Amendment rights. Among the speakers at Sunday's event were Kim Stolfer, co-founder and chairman of the Firearms Owners Against Crime committee, and retired U.S. Army Sergeant Robert Mansfield.

text:
Некоторые из самых засаленных и зачуханных кинодальнобойщиков, когда-либо появлявшихся на экране, не всегда являются персонажами, которых мы видим на протяжении всего фильма. Нередко у этих водил маленькие, бессмысленные роли, и они нужны лишь для того, чтобы мы на них пялились. Ниже представлены шестеро самых засаленных и зачуханных кинодальнобойщиков всех времен.

«Тупой и еще тупее»
Сибасс из «Тупого и еще тупее» — один из самых зачуханных дальнобойщиков, когда-либо появлявшихся на экране. Он не только обожает плевать соплями в чужую еду, но и любит встречаться с мужиками в туалетных кабинках ранним утром для жесткого секса. Грязнее этого уже ничего не придумаешь.

«Тельма и Луиза»
Водитель грузовика из «Тельмы и Луизы» — еще один засаленный и зачуханный дальнобойщик. Этот лузер не только обожает отпускать двусмысленные комментарии в адрес женщин, которые ему не по зубам, но и всерьез верит, что может с ними перепихнуться, что в итоге приводит к взрыву его грузовика.

«Джей и Молчаливый Боб наносят ответный удар»
Пытаясь добраться до Голливуда, Джей и Молчаливый Боб сталкиваются с таким же автостопщиком, которого сыграл покойный Джордж Карлин. После того как он пытается убедить двух стоунеров, что единственный способ добраться до места назначения — это предложить минет в обмен на поездку, Карлина подбирает засаленный дальнобойщик, который соглашается подвезти его в обмен на сексуальное удовлетворение.

Один из самых зачуханных дальнобойщиков, когда-либо появлявшихся на экране, — не кто иной, как Ред Барр в триллере 1997 года «Слом». Ред Барр — дальнобойщик, который руководит операцией по похищениям, где он и его прихвостни подстраивают поломки в машинах приезжих путешественников. Не сумев завести свои авто, ничего не подозревающие водители соглашаются доехать с Редом до ближайшей закусочной, но вместо этого оказываются в плену в старом заброшенном амбаре.

Один из первых фильмов Стивена Спилберга, «Дуэль», рассказывает о помешанном водителе грузовика, который постоянно преследует водителя среднего возраста (его играет Деннис Уивер). Фильм заканчивается тем, что Уивер обманом заставляет дальнобойщика вылететь с обрыва во время игры в «курицу». Вот что бывает, когда связываешься с Деннисом Уивером!

Во втором фильме серии «Безумный Макс», «Воин дороги», есть сцена, где Мел Гибсон ведет бензовоз по шоссе, в то время как за ним гонятся бандиты. Что делает обычно красавчика Гибсона засаленным и зачуханным? То, что он ведет грузовик посреди раскаленной пустыни, будучи одетым в несколько слоев защитной одежды. А ну да, он еще и Мел Гибсон.
translation:
Some of the filthiest and most disgusting truckers ever to appear on screen are not always characters we see throughout the entire film. Often these drivers have small, meaningless roles, and they are only there for us to stare at. Below are six of the filthiest and most disgusting truckers of all time.

"Dumb and Dumber"
Sebass from "Dumb and Dumber" is one of the most disgusting truckers ever to appear on screen. Not only does he love spitting snot into other people's food, but he also enjoys meeting guys in bathroom stalls early in the morning for rough sex. You can't get any dirtier than that.

"Velma and Louiza"
The truck driver from "Velma and Louiza" is another filthy and disgusting trucker. This loser not only loves making suggestive comments about women who are out of his league, but he also seriously believes he can hook up with them, which ultimately leads to his truck exploding.

"Jay and Silent Bob Strike Back"
While trying to get to Hollywood, Jay and Silent Bob encounter a hitchhiker played by the late George Carlin. After he tries to convince two stoners that the only way to get to their destination is to offer oral sex in exchange for a ride, Carlin picks up a filthy trucker who agrees to give him a ride in exchange for sexual gratification.

One of the most disgusting truckers ever to appear on screen is none other than Red Burr in the 1997 thriller "Shatter." Red Burr is a trucker who runs a kidnapping operation where he and his cronies stage breakdowns in the cars of traveling tourists. Unable to start his own vehicle, unsuspecting drivers agree to ride with Red to the nearest diner, but instead end up imprisoned in an old abandoned barn.

One of Steven Spielberg's early films, "Duel," tells the story of a obsessed truck driver who constantly pursues a middle-aged driver (played by Dennis Weaver). The film ends with Weaver tricking the trucker into flying off a cliff during a game of "chicken." That's what happens when you mess with Dennis Weaver!

In the second film of the "Mad Max" series, "Road Warrior," there is a scene where Mel Gibson drives a fuel tanker down a highway while being chased by bandits. What makes the handsome Gibson dirty and disgusting? The fact that he is driving a truck in the middle of a scorching desert while dressed in several layers of protective gear. Oh yeah, he's also Mel Gibson.

>>21985764 (ОП)

Да ладно, общий тред по опере. Я и не знал, что мы в /lit/. Ходил на «Мессию» в Ройал-Альберт-холл в Страстную пятницу. Сидел рядом с двумя пожилыми американскими туристами, и те, как типичные американцы, завели светскую беседу. сейчас ты еще скажешь, что балет смотришь или типа того.

Я видел «Лебединое озеро» в марте. Что в этом такого? Ставили в моем местном театре.

Кек. Гляньте на этого низкотестостеронового Нэнси-боя. Дай угадаю, ты носишь вычурную трость под мышкой и ежедневно цитируешь древних греков и римлян в разговоре? Кринжовые уроды вроде тебя заслуживают того, чтобы их освистали и избили. Это если тебе еще нет 50.

зззззз

Во-первых, я НЕ неженка, я вообще удерживал рекорд по количеству отстранений в средней школе за драки. А еще я специально врезаюсь в рандомных чуваков, когда иду (под «специально» я имею в виду, что не уступаю дорогу, потому что это для куколдов, так что если они не сдвинутся, мы столкнемся) и пытаюсь завязать с ними драку, если они меня задели. В-третьих, я не веду ежедневных бесед, потому что у меня нет друзей. Я кринжовый урод, но не в том смысле, как ты описал, и я горжусь тем, что никогда не проигрывал в драке, так что попробуй, если сможешь. В любви к классической музыке нет ничего мягкотелого.

Если бы кто-то назвал меня сиськой за любовь к Шуберту, я бы пробил ему нос.

>>21985764 (ОП)

Thirdly, I don't have daily conversations because I have no friends. I'm a creepy freak, but not in the way you described, and I'm proud that I've never lost a fight, so try it if you can. text:
Взаимовыгодные отношения — это своего рода партнерство по типу корейских невест по почте, при котором обе стороны извлекают пользу из романтики. Этот тип отношений обычно не ограничивается эротическими или нежными романами, но может быть и связан с бизнесом.
В рамках взаимопомощных отношений оба партнера должны отдавать и получать в равной степени. Такие отношения могут быть краткосрочными или долгосрочными.
Отношения — это отличный способ познакомиться с людьми и узнать их получше. Тем не менее, крайне важно подходить к таким отношениям искренне. Поскольку люди ненавидят, когда ими манипулируют или их используют, очень важно выстраивать подлинные связи с людьми, имеющими схожие ценности.
Существует несколько типов взаимоэффективных отношений. Некоторые из них являются облигатными, когда один партнер зависит от другого для выживания, в то время как другие являются факультативными.
Примеры симбиотических отношений включают лишайники, укрывающиеся в корневых клубеньках для помощи в фиксации азота, грибы, развивающиеся в бедной почве ради питания, и насекомых, которые ловят и переваривают организмы.
Аналогично, некоторые муравьи питаются падью, вырабатываемой тлями, чтобы сделать её более пригодной в пищу для своих собственных личинок и яиц. Они также защищают тлей от хищников и паразитов, что значительно облегчает сбор пади — своего рода муравьиный эквивалент молочной фермы.
Отличный способ заставить такие связи работать — обеспечить себе доступ к надежной информации, которая предоставляет функциональность в реальном времени и помогает отслеживать действия поставщиков. Это улучшит взаимодействие с дилерами по ссылке https://www.cnn.com/travel/article/south-korea-western-women-seeking-love-intl-hnk-dst/index.html и снизит потребность в ручных процессах, которые часто становятся барьером для эффективной работы цепочки поставок.
translation:
Mutually beneficial relationships are a kind of partnership similar to Korean pen pals, where both parties benefit from the romance. This type of relationship is not usually limited to erotic or tender romances but can also be related to business.
In the framework of mutually supportive relationships, both partners must give and receive equally. Such relationships can be short-term or long-term.
Relationships are a great way to meet people and get to know them better. Nevertheless, it is extremely important to approach such relationships sincerely. Since people hate being manipulated or used, it is very important to build genuine connections with people who share similar values.
There are several types of mutually effective relationships. Some of them are obligate, where one partner depends on the other for survival, while others are facultative.
Examples of symbiotic relationships include lichens sheltering in root nodules to aid in nitrogen fixation, fungi developing in poor soil for nutrition, and insects that catch and digest organisms.
Similarly, some ants feed on honeydew produced by aphids to make it more suitable for their own larvae and eggs. They also protect the aphids from predators and parasites, which significantly facilitates the collection of honeydew—a kind of ant dairy farm.
A great way to make such connections work is to ensure access to reliable information that provides real-time functionality and helps track supplier activities. This will improve interaction with dealers via the link https://www.cnn.com/travel/article/south-korea-western-women-seeking-love-intl-hnk-dst/index.html and reduce the need for manual processes, which often become a barrier to efficient supply chain operation.

text:
Я до сих пор не могу поверить, что моей сладкой малышке уже один год! В эти выходные мы отпраздновали это с семьей и друзьями, которые приехали и издалека, и всё прошло просто идеально. Мы очень благодарны нашим близким, которые нашли время присоединиться к нам на вечеринке в честь её дня рождения, и не можем в полной мере отблагодарить их за всю поддержку, любовь и щедрость. Тема была «всё, что блестит, — золото», и если бы я очень постаралась, то не смогла бы сделать её более стереотипно «девчачьей». Вот подробности того, как я всё это организовала:

Венок на дверь был сделан с помощью подруги, которая специализируется на блестящих вещах. Пара баллончиков с краской, немного ленты и клеевой пистолет — и дело сделано. Эта же подруга подарила все блестки и золотые рамы, которые она мастерила для своей свадьбы в прошлом году.

Офигенные торты приготовила моя милая соседка и подруга. Топпер Mud Pie я заказала на Amazon.

Огромное количество шаров было из одного из моих любимых местных магазинов праздников, Party Couture. У них также продается много розовых и золотых блестящих аксессуаров и одежды от Mud Pie для первого дня рождения, которые я использовала (слюнявчик, корона, баннер «one», праздничный баннер, колпак), но трусики я купила на Amazon, а пачку-туту — в Southern Tots.

Вся еда была спланирована и приготовлена моей крутой мачехой, которая к тому же является шеф-поваром и владелицей магазина специй. Я внесла свой вклад, заказав праздничный сет из Jimmy John, но лимонно-гранатовый салат из шпината с клубникой — это полностью её заслуга.

Затем, конечно, я набрала кучу вещей в моем любимом месте @whoawaitwalmart, включая всю розовую и бирюзовую бумажную посуду (и жевательные шарики для центральной композиции на столе)!

Еще раз спасибо всем, кто присоединился к нашему празднованию! Надеемся, вы получили столько же удовольствия, сколько и мы. И если кто-то знает кого-то с маленькой девочкой, которой скоро исполнится год, у меня, по сути, есть «вечеринка в коробке» со всеми купленными мной розовыми и золотыми вещами Mud Pie. Они всё еще выглядят как новые, и я продам весь набор тому, кто предложит лучшую цену! 🙂
translation:
I still can't believe my sweet little one is already one year old! This weekend we celebrated with family and friends who came from far away, and everything went absolutely perfectly. We are so grateful to our loved ones who took the time to join us for her birthday party, and we can't fully thank them for all the support, love, and generosity. The theme was "all that glitters is gold," and if I had tried harder, I couldn't have made it more stereotypically "girly." Here are the details of how I organized it:

The wreath on the door was made with the help of a friend who specializes in sparkly things. A couple of cans of paint, some ribbon, and a glue gun—and it was done. This same friend gave me all the glitter and gold frames she was making for her wedding last year.

My lovely neighbor and friend made amazing cakes. I ordered the Mud Pie topper on Amazon.

The huge amount of balloons was from one of my favorite local party stores, Party Couture. They also sell a lot of pink and gold sparkly accessories and Mud Pie clothing for a first birthday, which I used (bib, crown, "one" banner, party banner, hat), but I bought the panties on Amazon, and the tutu set from Southern Tots.

All the food was planned and prepared by my awesome stepmother, who is also a chef and spice shop owner. I contributed by ordering a party set from Jimmy John, but the spinach and strawberry lemon-pomegranate salad is entirely her doing.

Then, of course, I picked up a ton of things at my favorite spot @whoawaitwalmart, including all the pink and turquoise paper tableware (and gummy balls for the centerpiece on the table)!

Thanks again to everyone who joined our celebration! We hope you enjoyed it as much as we did. And if anyone knows someone with a little girl who is turning one soon, I essentially have a "party in a box" with all the pink and gold Mud Pie things I bought. They still look new, and I will sell the whole set to whoever offers the best price! 🙂

text:
Что нужно знать об устройствах Juul
читайте далее, чтобы узнать всё о Juul. Поскольку популярность Juul выросла, многие люди знают о нём. Продажи устройств увеличились, когда они появились в первый год. Секрет этих вещей в том, что данные продукты приносят пользователю много пользы. Если вы любите вейпинг, это один из самых популярных продуктов, который вам стоит приобрести. Стартовый набор JUUL (JUUL Starter Kit) — это главное, на что стоит обратить внимание, если вы хотите протестировать устройство.

Вот несколько вещей, которые следует иметь в виду, если вы новичок и хотите получить от устройства максимум. Все ваши потребности будут удовлетворены при использовании стартового набора Juul. Вам не придется покупать ничего другого, так как всё необходимое уже включено в стартовый набор Juul. Таким образом, вы получите удовольствие от использования нового устройства для вейпинга. Когда вы откроете стартовый набор Juul, вы найдете в нем следующие основные вещи. В стартовом наборе Juul будет электронная сигарета Juul с аккумулятором, который можно перезаряжать.

Также при открытии набора вы получите магнитное USB-зарядное устройство. Зарядка будет работать исправно, так как она предназначена для зарядки вышеупомянутого аккумулятора. text:
Среда, 30 октября 2013 г.
Коллекции дьявольских изображений к Ночи Дьявола
Ночь Дьявола берет свое начало в 1940-х годах, когда дети в городских районах выплескивали энергию в актах вандализма. В целом они были довольно безобидными, с минимальным ущербом или вовсе без него для имущества. Типичные «проекты» включали замазывание окон воском, обвешивание ландшафта туалетной бумагой и разбивание случайных тыкв.
К сожалению, когда что-то становится популярным, всегда находится несколько гнилых личностей, которые заходят слишком далеко. К началу 1970-х годов озорство приобрело более серьезный характер с такими деструктивными действиями, как поджоги.
Хотя присвоение имени даже самым темным деяниям или их исполнителям обычно романтизирует их, учитывая, что за намерением Ночи Дьявола стоит одно лишь зло, вполне уместно, что она чествует олицетворение всего бесовского.
Однако сегодня, в духе веселья, а не разрушения, мы отдадим дьяволу должное по этому случаю с этими дьявольскими коллекциями клипартов:
iCLIPART.com Дьявольский клипарт
Acclaim Images Клипарт с дьяволом
iPHOTOS.com Иллюстрации с дьяволом
TOONClipart Мультяшные дьяволы
ClipartGuide Изображения дьявола
ClickArt Online Изображения дьявола
translation:
Wednesday, October 30, 2013
Collections of Devilish Images for Devil's Night
Devil's Night originated in the 1940s when children in urban areas vented their energy in acts of vandalism. Overall, they were quite harmless, with minimal or no damage to property. Typical "projects" included waxing windows, covering landscapes with toilet paper, and smashing random pumpkins.
Unfortunately, when something becomes popular, there are always a few rotten individuals who go too far. By the early 1970s, the mischief had taken on a more serious character with destructive acts such as arson.
Although naming even the darkest deeds or their perpetrators usually romanticizes them, given that the intention behind Devil's Night is purely evil, it is quite fitting that it honors the embodiment of all the demonic.
However, today, in the spirit of fun, not destruction, we will pay tribute to the devil on this occasion with these devilish clipart collections:
iCLIPART.com Devilish clipart
Acclaim Images Devil clipart
iPHOTOS.com Devil illustrations
TOONClipart Cartoon devils
ClipartGuide Devil images
ClickArt Online Devil images

text:
Идея о том, что Малкольм Митчелл будет играть в защите, на данный момент уже за пределами гипотетического. Мы на пороге экспериментов. Давайте двигаться дальше, ладно?

С точки зрения атлетизма я не думаю, что есть какие-то сомнения в том, справится ли Митчелл с этим. В конце концов, по окончании Валдосты его оценивали как корнер номер один.

Преимущество Митчелла перед кем-то вроде Чэмпа, как мне кажется, в том, что у него был год, чтобы впитать атакуансывые нюансы студенческого футбола, а затем перейти на собрания защиты для инструктажа. Я не утверждаю, что схему Грантема и роль в ней усвоить намного проще, чем плейбук Бобо. Но на этой стороне поля больше полагаются на инстинкты.

Митчелл расцветет в роли звезды, играющей в обеих линиях, и даст своим тренерам множество вариантов как в атаке, так и в защите. Для Грантема он может быть полноценным «закрывающим» корнером или помогать по мере необходимости. Для Бобо он может постепенно влиться в роль стартового игрока, а также врываться в хаддл, когда потребуется.

Это беспроигрышный вариант. Верно?
translation:
The idea that Malcolm Mitchell will play defense is currently beyond hypothetical. We are on the verge of experiments. Let's move forward, okay?

From an athleticism standpoint, I don't think there are any doubts about whether Mitchell can handle it. After all, at the end of Valdosta, he was rated as a number one corner.

Mitchell's advantage over someone like Champ, in my opinion, is that he had a year to absorb the attacking nuances of college football and then transition to defense meetings for instruction. I'm not saying that grasping Grantem's scheme and role is much easier than Bobo's playbook. But on this side of the field, instincts are relied upon more.

Mitchell will flourish in the role of a star playing both lines, giving his coaches many options both on offense and defense. For Grantem, he can be a full-fledged "closing" corner or help as needed. For Bobo, he can gradually integrate into the starting player role, and also burst into the huddle when necessary.

It's a win-win situation. Right?
