text:
想在户外寻找一份令人兴奋的工作吗？
现为2019年赛季招聘所有岗位。Northern Waters 在苏必利尔湖提供专业的海洋皮划艇导览之旅。我们位于密歇根州的 Pictured Rocks 国家湖滨，对皮划艇充满热情，并致力于与他人分享这份热爱。目前水上和水下岗位均有空缺。

我们的理想候选人
勤奋、准时、友好且热爱户外活动的人。无论是担任导游还是在办公室/陆地支持部门工作，强大的沟通能力都是必须的。虽然不能保证新员工一定能获得导游岗位，但成为导游并不一定需要海洋皮划艇经验。我们将提供指导以及通过导游培训计划所需的所有装备。我们充满动力且兴奋地想与客人分享苏必利尔湖的美景，希望你也是如此！

导游和办公室职员的职责有所不同。不过，我们倾向于对员工进行交叉培训，以便让他们在行程安排和业务运营方面掌握多样化的知识和技能。作为导游，你的工作将包括处理装备、进行安全/划行讲解，并在密歇根州最美丽的地区之一陪同客人划行。在办公室，你的工作将包括接听电话、安排行程、关注天气预报，并与水上的导游保持沟通。

关于该地区
Munising 位于苏必利尔湖的南岸，是密歇根州 Pictured Rocks 国家湖滨的所在地。Pictured Rocks 以其壮丽的多色砂岩悬崖而闻名，拥有 Miner’s Castle、Lover’s Leap Arch、Chapel Rock 等地标性地貌。在 Munising，你可以度过一个划皮划艇、徒步、骑山地车并探索密歇根州最美丽自然游乐场之一的夏天。快来加入我们的2019年赛季吧！
translation:
Want to find an exciting job outdoors?
We are hiring for all positions for the 2019 season. Northern Waters offers professional sea kayaking tours on Lake Superior. Located at the Pictured Rocks National Lakeshore in Michigan, we are passionate about kayaking and dedicated to sharing this passion with others. We currently have openings for both on-water and underwater positions.

Our ideal candidate
Someone who is hardworking, punctual, friendly, and loves the outdoors. Strong communication skills are essential whether you are working as a guide or in the office/land support department. While we cannot guarantee that new employees will get a guide position, you do not necessarily need sea kayaking experience to become a guide. We will provide training and all the necessary equipment for the guide training program. We are passionate and excited to share the beauty of Lake Superior with our guests, and we hope you are too!

The responsibilities of guides and office staff are different. However, we tend to cross-train our employees so they gain diverse knowledge and skills in trip planning and business operations. As a guide, your job will include handling equipment, giving safety/paddling briefings, and paddling with guests in one of Michigan's most beautiful areas. In the office, your job will include answering phones, scheduling trips, monitoring weather forecasts, and communicating with the on-water guides.

About the area
Munising is on the south shore of Lake Superior, home to the Pictured Rocks National Lakeshore in Michigan. Pictured Rocks is famous for its magnificent multicolored sandstone cliffs, featuring landmarks such as Miner’s Castle, Lover’s Leap Arch, and Chapel Rock. In Munising, you can spend a summer kayaking, hiking, mountain biking, and exploring one of Michigan's most beautiful natural playgrounds. Come join our 2019 season!

text:
MiniGPT-4怎么能有那么好看的示例，然后又吐出这种狗屎？

https://minigpt-4.github.io/

>>92852307 (OP)

因为它是由一个微小的、脑残的模型驱动的，而且他们对结果进行了精选。

>感谢您对我们工作的关注。目前，用户数量已超出我们的预期。

好快啊。

因为示例是从手工挑选的训练数据中精选出来的，目的是为了欺骗投资者并提高融资估值。

直接点链接就行，你是傻逼吗？

没用。四个链接都指向一个空白页。

>>92852307 (OP)

这就是整个AI行业的缩影，真他妈的。

这简直就是一个骗局，用来坑那些钱比脑细胞还多的脑残，希望他们能在一百万年后真的做出点什么。

但就像大多数这样运作的垃圾公司一样——它们往往会死得很惨。

text:
1606年圣诞节前不久，三艘小船离开伦敦的布莱克沃尔码头，前往北美切萨皮克湾建立定居点。其中最大的一艘是武装精良、排水量120吨的商船“苏珊号”（Susan Constant），载有71名乘客和船员，其中包括经验丰富的舰队指挥官克里斯托弗·纽波特船长；他在与西班牙的海战期间是一名非常成功的私掠船长，在16世纪90年代和17世纪初多次前往加勒比地区航行，对美洲海域的了解不亚于当时任何一个在世的英国人。“神速号”（Godspeed）紧随其后，船上载有52人，而垫后的是小型轻快船“发现号”（Discovery），21名男子被挤在补给品和设备之间的任何可用空间里。总计39名海员和105名冒险家出发，旨在建立英国在美洲的第一个永久殖民地。

詹姆斯敦远征并不是在北大西洋沿岸建立殖民地的第一次尝试。1585年，沃尔特·罗利爵士资助在北卡罗来纳州大陆外的罗阿诺克岛建立殖民地，但该定居点在次年被遗弃，尝试宣告结束。1587年在约翰·怀特领导下的另一次尝试同样以失败告终，且导致117名男女老少失踪（后被称为“罗阿诺克失踪殖民地”）。在詹姆斯敦建立的前夕，英国人尚未在美洲成功建立任何一个殖民地。

在某些方面，詹姆斯敦是罗利罗阿诺克冒险活动的迟到延续。1586年冬天，一支小型勘探队从罗阿诺克岛出发，对切萨皮克湾进行了考察。这些人回来后报告称，那里的土地和深水河流非常理想，可以成为远洋船只和私掠船的绝佳港口，从而能够在西班牙宝藏舰队横跨大西洋的途中对其进行劫掠。

当开始计划在切萨皮克湾建立殖民地时，英格兰国王詹姆斯一世已经与西班牙签署了和平条约，不再容忍海盗行为，但他准备允许在北美建立英国定居点，只要这些定居点位于没有其他欧洲人居住的土地上。1606年4月10日，国王授予弗吉尼亚公司一项特许状，允许创建两个殖民地：一个位于北纬34度和41度之间（从现在的北卡罗来纳州到纽约），另一个位于北纬38度和45度之间（从切萨皮克湾到缅因州北部）。伦敦弗吉尼亚公司负责推广和管理南部殖民地。由于监督弗吉尼亚日常事务在实际操作上存在困难，公司设立了一个由每年选举产生的主席领导的地方议会来统治殖民地。

詹姆斯敦远征的目标是确立英国对北美的主权要求，寻找金银矿，寻找通往太平洋（即“另一片海”）的通道，开采土地的自然资源，并与印第安人贸易。定居者于4月26日抵达弗吉尼亚角海域，统治议会选择了爱德华·玛丽亚·温菲尔德作为殖民地的首任主席，他是此次远征的主要推动者之一，且曾在荷兰和爱尔兰的战争中服役。在沿詹姆斯河对土地进行了两周的侦察后，议会在距离切萨皮克湾入口约50英里的一个半岛上选定了一个地点，并于5月14日登陆。他们将定居点命名为詹姆斯敦，以纪念他们的国王。

英国人定居在一个由名为波瓦坦的强大酋长统治的地区。波瓦坦的领地（被印第安人称为Tsenacommacah）从詹姆斯河以南延伸到波托马克河，包括30多个部落，人口约14,000人。殖民者收到公司的指示，在与印第安人打交道时要谨慎，但要尽量保持良好关系，以便鼓励
translation:
Shortly before Christmas in 1606, three small ships left Blackwall Pier in London bound for the Chesapeake Bay in North America to establish a settlement. The largest of these was the well-armed, 120-ton merchant ship "Susan Constant," carrying 71 passengers and crew, including the experienced fleet commander Captain Christopher Newport; he had been a very successful privateer captain during naval battles with the Spanish, sailing to the Caribbean multiple times in the 1590s and early 1600s, with knowledge of the American seas comparable to any Englishman alive at the time. The "Godspeed" followed closely behind, carrying 52 people, and trailing behind was the small, nimble ship "Discovery," where 21 men were crammed into any available space between provisions and equipment. A total of 39 sailors and 105 adventurers set out, aiming to establish the first permanent English colony in America.

The Jamestown expedition was not the first attempt to establish a colony on the North Atlantic coast. In 1585, Sir Walter Raleigh financed the establishment of a colony on Roanoke Island off the coast of North Carolina, but the settlement was abandoned the following year, marking the end of the attempt. Another attempt in 1587, led by John White, also ended in failure, resulting in the disappearance of 117 men and women of all ages (later known as the "Lost Colony of Roanoke"). Prior to the establishment of Jamestown, the English had not successfully established any colony in America.

In some ways, Jamestown was a delayed continuation of the Raleigh Roanoke venture. In the winter of 1586, a small exploratory party departed from Roanoke Island to survey the Chesapeake Bay. Upon their return, they reported that the land and deep rivers there were very ideal, making for an excellent harbor for ocean-going vessels and privateers, allowing them to prey on the Spanish treasure fleets crossing the Atlantic.

When plans began to establish a colony in the Chesapeake Bay, King James I of England had already signed a peace treaty with Spain, no longer tolerating piracy, but he was prepared to allow English settlements in North America as long as these settlements were on land not inhabited by other Europeans. On April 10, 1606, the King granted a charter to the Virginia Company, allowing the creation of two colonies: one located between 34 and 41 degrees North latitude (from present-day North Carolina to New York), and another located between 38 and 45 degrees North latitude (from the Chesapeake Bay to northern Maine). The London Virginia Company was responsible for promoting and managing the southern colony. Due to the practical difficulties in supervising the daily affairs of Virginia, the company established a local assembly led by a chairman elected annually to govern the colony.

The goal of the Jamestown expedition was to establish Britain's claim to sovereignty over North America, to search for gold and silver mines, to find a passage to the Pacific (the "other sea"), to exploit the natural resources of the land, and to trade with the Indians. The settlers arrived in the Virginia Capes area on April 26, and the governing assembly elected Edward Maria Wingfield as the colony's first chairman, one of the main promoters of the expedition, who had served in the wars in the Netherlands and Ireland. After two weeks of scouting the land along the James River, the assembly selected a site on a peninsula about 50 miles from the entrance to the Chesapeake Bay and landed on May 14. They named the settlement Jamestown in honor of their king.

The English settled in an area ruled by a powerful chief named Powhatan. Powhatan's territory (known to the Indians as Tsenacommacah) extended from the James River south to the Potomac River, encompassing over 30 tribes with a population of about 14,000. The colonists received instructions from the company to be cautious when dealing with the Indians but to maintain good relations as much as possible to encourage

text:
2011年11月11日
随着感恩节的临近，针对2012年选举周期，两种截然不同的美国观开始形成。在左翼，我们看到了“占据”愚蠢运动，它正迅速退化为幼稚的混乱和暴力。Powerline今天早上很好地总结了“占据”运动的腐朽：
如果你曾经好奇一个完全由自由主义者组成的社会会发生什么，那么“占据”运动给出了答案：退化。
* 在波特兰，一名“占据者”因向一座建筑的楼梯间投掷莫洛托夫鸡尾酒（汽油弹）而被捕。
* 在伦敦，圣保罗大教堂的员工不得不清理“占据者”在教堂内留下的排泄物。（这些“占据者”怎么回事，怎么总有厕所问题？）
* 在波特兰，又一起药物过量事件。
* 在佛蒙特州，一名男子在伯灵顿的“占据”营地被枪杀。
更不用说在加州奥克兰发生的致命枪击事件了。这就是那些根本无法承担个人责任的左翼疯子所展示的美国愿景。就像他们这种任性的孩子一样，他们想要分得他人辛勤工作的成果——而且现在就要！
是啊，我正想离开我住了20年的中上阶级家庭去那里。这就是我们奋斗一生为四个孩子留下的未来。没有什么比那些腐烂了数周的帐篷城市更能代表美国的可能性了。我简直等不及了。
堆积如山的债务、高税收、阶级（实际上是“成功”）嫉妒、压制性的政府、政府救济金取代工作——这就是自由主义想象力中这个美妙的噩梦。简直就像整个民主党是由蒂姆·波顿的克隆人经营的一样。
现在，右翼崛起了一位出身极其简单的人。赫曼·凯恩（Herman Cain）是家政工和司机的儿子（除了其他许多才干），他凭借勤奋和奉献，从中产阶级的最底层爬到了这个国家的最高层。在这一过程中，他保持了荣誉、忠诚和人格。他是美国自力更生、勤奋工作和体面风范的缩影。作为一名忠诚的丈夫和父亲，这个男人显然在攀登成功之路上，没有染上左翼似乎总会招惹的那些污点。
从家庭角度来看——赫曼·凯恩绝不是比尔·克林顿！
凯恩让我们所有人回想起青年时代的一些基本原则（至少是对我们这些年满半世纪或即将年满半世纪的人来说）。在20世纪70年代，我们当时的美国青年被两种截然相反的观点所冲击，就像现在的美国一样。我们当时还笼罩在“最伟大的一代”——二战一代的光环之中。这是我父母那一代人，我的父亲是少数几位在北大西洋、支持北非入侵以及在南太平洋与真正的邪恶作战的幸存老兵之一。那一代人最完美的写照就在诺曼·洛克威尔的画作中，既展现了人类缺陷中近乎滑稽的一面，又散发出社区的温暖。洛克威尔的图像同时展现了力量和谦卑的缺陷。
与这种在《生活多美好》等电影中看到的标志性美国意象相冲突的，是当时美国的另一面。那是叛逆且远没有那么伟大的嬉皮士文化，它涵盖了越南战争抗议运动。遗憾的是，这场运动在当时吞噬了民权运动，使左翼从善良变得无能。
民权运动诞生于二战一代的经验，在战场上，种族并不决定荣誉、勇敢或勇气。生死决战往往能烧掉那些废话，二战中就发生了这种情况。正是通过并肩作战，种族主义的神话开始破碎。马丁·路德·金和杰克·肯尼迪（一名二战英雄）都对美国在结束种族隔离并成为一个民族后的前景持有美妙的愿景。
而今天我们可以诚实地说——除了左翼和右翼的边缘疯子（例如黑豹党和三K党）之外——那些梦想已经实现了。
然而，在当时，反战运动也篡夺了民权运动，
translation:
November 11, 2011
As Thanksgiving approached, two starkly different views of America began to form for the 2012 election cycle. On the left, we saw the "Occupy" movement, which was rapidly degenerating into childish chaos and violence. Powerline summarized the decay of the "Occupy" movement well this morning:
If you were ever curious what a society composed entirely of liberals would be like, the "Occupy" movement provided the answer: decay.
* In Portland, an "occupier" was arrested for throwing a Molotov cocktail (gas bomb) into a building stairwell.
* In London, staff at St. Paul's Cathedral had to clean up excrement left by "occupiers" inside the church. (What is wrong with these "occupiers," why is there always a bathroom issue?)
* Another overdose incident in Portland.
* A man was shot in the "Occupy" camp in Burlington, Vermont.
Not to mention the fatal shooting in Oakland, California. This is the vision of America presented by these left-wing lunatics who are incapable of taking personal responsibility. Like these spoiled children, they want to reap the rewards of others' hard work—and they want it now!
Yes, I'm thinking of leaving the middle-to-upper-class family I've lived in for 20 years to go there. This is the future we've worked our whole lives for four children. Nothing represents the possibility of America more than those tent cities that have rotted for weeks. I can't wait.
Mounting debt, high taxes, class (or rather, "success") envy, a suffocating government, government handouts replacing work—this is the beautiful nightmare in the liberal imagination. It's as if the entire Democratic Party is run by clones of Tim Burton.
Now, a man from extremely humble beginnings has risen on the right. Herman Cain, the son of a housekeeper and a driver (among many other talents), climbed from the very bottom of the middle class to the highest levels of this country through hard work and dedication. In this process, he maintained honor, loyalty, and character. He is the epitome of American self-reliance, hard work, and dignity. As a loyal husband and father, this man clearly did not acquire the stains that the left seems to attract.
From a family perspective—Herman Cain is no Bill Clinton!
Cain reminded all of us of some fundamental principles from our youth (at least for those of us who are fifty or about to be fifty). In the 1970s, the young Americans of our time were impacted by two diametrically opposed views, just like America today. We were still shrouded in the aura of the "Greatest Generation"—the WWII generation. That was my parents' generation; my father was one of the few surviving veterans who fought in the North Atlantic, supported the invasion of North Africa, and fought the real evil in the South Pacific. The perfect depiction of that generation is in Norman Rockwell's paintings, showing both a nearly comical aspect of human flaw and the warmth of community. Rockwell's images simultaneously depict the flaws of strength and humility.
Contrasting with this iconic American image seen in movies like *It's a Wonderful Life* was the other side of America at the time. That was the rebellious and far less great hippie culture, which encompassed the Vietnam War protests. Unfortunately, this movement consumed the Civil Rights Movement at the time, turning the left from benevolent to impotent.
The Civil Rights Movement was born from the experience of the WWII generation; on the battlefield, race did not determine honor, bravery, or courage. Life-or-death battles often burn away such nonsense, and that happened in WWII. It was through fighting side-by-side that the myth of racism began to crumble. Martin Luther King Jr. and Jack Kennedy (a WWII hero) both held beautiful visions for the future of America in ending segregation and becoming a nation.
And today we can honestly say—apart from the fringe lunatics on the left and right (such as the Black Panther Party and the KKK)—those dreams have come true.
However, at the time, the anti-war movement also usurped the Civil Rights Movement,

text:
CD 代表 Compact Disc（紧凑型光盘）。CD 是一种由索尼 (Sony) 和飞利浦 (Philips) 从 1979 年开始开发的光盘格式。它最初被开发为一种存储音频的格式，曾是主流和独立唱片公司发行录制音乐最畅销的介质。然而，美国的 CD 销售率已从峰值下降了约 50%，CD 普遍正被其他形式的数字存储和分发方式所取代。

CD 的特点
一张音频 CD 最多可容纳 80 分钟的音频数据，使用 16 位 PCM 在 44100 Hz 的采样率下存储。标准 CD 的直径约为 120 毫米，但也有直径 80 毫米的光盘，可存储约 20 分钟的音频。

这项技术最终被改编并扩展，涵盖了数据存储 CD-ROM、一次写入音频和数据存储 CD-R、可擦写介质 CD-RW、视频紧凑光盘 (VCD)、超级视频紧凑光盘 (SVCD)、PhotoCD、PictureCD、CD-i 以及增强型 CD。

什么是 CD-R？
CD-R 代表 Compact Disc - Recordable（最初命名为 CD Write-Once，即一次写入光盘）。它是一种一次写入的可记录 CD 介质，适用于创建音频或数据 CD 合辑 (CD-ROM)。虽然 CD-RW 光盘可以被擦除并重新写入，但许多 CD 播放机和其他设备通常在处理 CD-R 介质时性能更好（在购买 CD 播放机之前，请务必检查其是否支持 CD-RW）。标准 CD-R 的直径为 120 毫米，容量通常为 640MB 或 700MB。

一张 CD-R 可存储 74 或 80 分钟的 CD 音频。CD-RW 代表 Compact Disc - Rewritable（可擦写光盘）。它是一种可重复写入的 CD 介质，适用于数据 CD 合辑 (CD-ROM)。虽然 CD-RW 光盘可以被擦除并重新写入，但许多 CD 播放机和其他设备通常在处理 CD-R 介质时性能更好（在购买 CD 播放机之前，请务必检查其是否支持 CD-RW）。标准 CD-RW 的直径为 120 毫米，容量通常为 640MB 或 700MB。一张 CD-RW 可存储 74 或 80 分钟的 CD 音频，但如前所述，它与 CD 播放机的兼容性远低于 CD-R。

什么是 CD-ROM？
CD-ROM 常用于分发计算机软件，包括游戏和多媒体应用程序，不过任何数据都可以存储在其中（直到达到光盘的容量限制）。有些 CD 同时包含计算机数据和音频，其中后者可以在 CD 播放机上播放，而数据（如软件或数字视频）只能在计算机上使用（例如 ISO 9660 格式的 PC CD-ROM）。这些被称为增强型 CD。

CD-ROM 光盘在外观上与音频 CD 完全相同，数据的存储和检索方式也非常相似（仅在存储数据所使用的标准上与音频 CD 不同）。光盘由 1.2 毫米厚的聚碳酸酯塑料盘制成，表面有一层薄薄的铝以形成反射面。CD-ROM 光盘最常见的尺寸是直径 120 毫米，不过也有直径 80 毫米的较小 Mini CD 标准，以及许多非标准尺寸和形状（例如名片大小的介质）。数据以一系列微小的凹坑形式存储在光盘上。

激光照射在光盘的反射面上，以读取凹坑和平地的图案（“pits”指凹坑，而它们之间的间隙被称为“lands”即平地）。由于凹坑的深度大约是用于读取光盘的激光波长的四分之一到六分之一，反射光束相对于入射光束发生了相位偏移，导致相消干涉并降低了反射光束的强度。这种反射光束强度变化的图案被转换为二进制数据。

一个 CD-ROM 扇区包含 2,352 个字节，分为 98 个 24 字节的帧。与音乐 CD 不同，CD-ROM 不能依赖插值进行错误掩盖，因此要求检索数据的可靠性更高。为了实现更好的纠错和检测，CD-ROM 具有第三层里德-所罗门 (Reed-Solomon) 纠错。一个具有完整三层纠错数据的 Mode-1 CD-ROM 包含净 2,048 字节
translation:
CD stands for Compact Disc. A CD is a disc format developed by Sony and Philips starting in 1979. It was initially developed as a format for storing audio and was once the best-selling medium for major and independent record labels to release recorded music. However, CD sales in the United States have dropped by about 50% from their peak, and CDs are generally being replaced by other forms of digital storage and distribution.

Features of CDs
An audio CD can hold a maximum of 80 minutes of audio data, stored using 16-bit PCM at a sampling rate of 44100 Hz. The standard CD has a diameter of about 120 mm, but there are also 80 mm diameter discs that can store about 20 minutes of audio.

This technology was eventually adapted and expanded to cover data storage CDs (CD-ROM), write-once audio and data storage CDs (CD-R), rewritable media CDs (CD-RW), Video Compact Discs (VCD), Super Video Compact Discs (SVCD), PhotoCDs, PictureCDs, CD-i, and Enhanced CDs.

What is CD-R?
CD-R stands for Compact Disc - Recordable (originally named CD Write-Once). It is a write-once recordable CD medium used for creating audio or data CD compilations (CD-ROMs). Although CD-RW discs can be erased and rewritten, many CD players and other devices perform better when handling CD-R media (be sure to check if your CD player supports CD-RW before purchasing). The standard CD-R has a diameter of 120 mm and typically has a capacity of 640MB or 700MB.

A CD-R can store 74 or 80 minutes of CD audio. CD-RW stands for Compact Disc - Rewritable. It is a rewritable CD medium used for data CD compilations (CD-ROMs). Although CD-RW discs can be erased and rewritten, many CD players and other devices perform better when handling CD-R media (be sure to check if your CD player supports CD-RW before purchasing). The standard CD-RW has a diameter of 120 mm and typically has a capacity of 640MB or 700MB. A CD-RW can store 74 or 80 minutes of CD audio, but as mentioned, its compatibility with CD players is much lower than that of CD-R.

What is CD-ROM?
CD-ROMs are commonly used for distributing computer software, including games and multimedia applications, although any data can be stored on them (up to the disc's capacity limit). Some CDs contain both computer data and audio, where the latter can be played on a CD player, while the data (such as software or digital video) can only be used on a computer (e.g., PC CD-ROM in ISO 9660 format). These are called Enhanced CDs.

CD-ROM discs look identical to audio CDs, and the method of storing and retrieving data is also very similar (only differing in the standard used for data storage compared to audio CDs). The disc is made of a 1.2 mm thick polycarbonate plastic disc with a thin layer of aluminum on the surface to form a reflective surface. The most common size for a CD-ROM disc is a diameter of 120 mm, but there are also smaller Mini CD standards with a diameter of 80 mm, as well as many non-standard sizes and shapes (such as business card-sized media). Data is stored on the disc in the form of a series of tiny pits.

When a laser shines on the reflective surface of the disc, it reads the pattern of pits and lands (pits refer to the indentations, and the spaces between them are called lands). Because the depth of the pits is about one-quarter to one-sixth of the wavelength of the laser used to read the disc, the reflected light beam undergoes a phase shift relative to the incident beam, causing destructive interference and reducing the intensity of the reflected beam. This pattern of changes in reflected light intensity is converted into binary data.

A CD-ROM sector contains 2,352 bytes, divided into 98 frames of 24 bytes each. Unlike music CDs, CD-ROMs cannot rely on interpolation for error masking, thus requiring higher reliability in data retrieval. To achieve better error correction and detection, CD-ROMs have a third layer of Reed-Solomon error correction. A Mode-1 CD-ROM with complete three-layer error correction contains a net of 2,048 bytes.

text:
关于本研究所
本研究所满足了医疗保健领域的一项核心需求，提供客观且相关的见解与研究，从而加速对关键信息的理解与创新，这对做出正确决策和改善人类健康结果至关重要。凭借 IQVIA 的机构知识、先进分析、技术以及无与伦比的数据，本研究所与广泛的医疗保健利益相关者（包括政府机构、学术机构、生命科学产业和支付方）协同工作，共同推动专注于人类数据科学的研究议程。

IQVIA 人类数据科学研究所
IQVIA 研究所将人类科学专业知识与数据科学相结合，为医疗保健行业提供公正且基于事实的见解。请听执行主任 Murray Aitken 介绍 IQVIA 研究所，并由研究主任 Michael Kleinrock 讲解研究所如何利用实际数据，通过算法艺术将人类数据科学具体化。

IQVIA 研究所利用公共和私营部门的协作关系，通过基于事实的医疗保健讨论，为在全球范围内推进人类科学提供市场清晰度。
translation:
About This Institute
This institute meets a core need in the healthcare field by providing objective and relevant insights and research, thereby accelerating the understanding and innovation of key information, which is crucial for making correct decisions and improving human health outcomes. Leveraging IQVIA's institutional knowledge, advanced analytics, technology, and unparalleled data, this institute collaborates with a wide range of healthcare stakeholders (including government agencies, academic institutions, life science industries, and payers) to jointly drive the research agenda focused on human data science.

IQVIA Institute for Human Data Science
The IQVIA Institute combines human science expertise with data science to provide fair and fact-based insights to the healthcare industry. Please listen to Executive Director Murray Aitken introduce the IQVIA Institute, and to Research Director Michael Kleinrock explain how the Institute utilizes real-world data to materialize human data science through algorithmic art.

The IQVIA Institute leverages public-private partnerships to provide market clarity for advancing human science globally through fact-based healthcare discussions.

They're like silly little kids, and for some reason, I actually like them.

But if more smart lurkers could post/reply, this board would benefit too.

So if you're reading this, consider sharing your wisdom and knowledge.

I would be grateful.

If you press the . and , keys on YouTube, you can watch the video frame by frame. Now go, my child, spread my technical wisdom.

>>93056762 (OP)

This is a relatively good spot in the garbage dump. Although most of it still smells like garbage, you can occasionally find good stuff.

>But if more smart lurkers could post/reply, this board would benefit too.

>So if you're reading this, consider sharing your wisdom and knowledge.

>I would be grateful.

It would be very beneficial if this board could be split into consumers and developers. Having a separate board for consumers would allow them to discuss new AI models, new hardware, and anything they are about to consume, so /g/ could focus on actually doing something with technology, whether it's programming, DIY hardware, or even penetration testing and hacking.

text:
我应该推迟我的假期吗？
随着春假和暑假的临近，旅行者们开始对预订下一次假期感到担忧。
每天都有关于 2019 冠状病毒病 (COVID-19) 的新进展出现，导致旅行者之间产生不确定性。人们开始围绕一个大问题来评估他们的旅行计划：“我会安全吗？”
旅行社代理已成为这种新疾病的新发言人，他们向客户普及冠状病毒的相关知识，并告知在没有旅行限制的国家出国旅行的风险相对较小。
“旅行者担心经过主要机场，或者仅仅是身处飞机上被数百人包围这一事实。作为旅行代理，我们的工作是让客户保持知情，并使用可靠的资源，以便我们能跟进这种新病毒的最新进展，”Costa Rica Dream Adventures 和 Duluth Travel 的首席执行官 Arthur Salus 说道，这两家公司主要预订政府、企业和休闲旅行。
根据疾病控制与预防中心 (CDC) 的说法，由于飞机上的空气循环和过滤方式，大多数病毒和其他病菌在飞机上不容易传播。Salus 先生说：“在决定取消即将到来的假期之前，我们建议旅行者等待观察事态的发展。”
Salus 鼓励现在预订旅行的人考虑购买旅行保险。他说：“‘因任何原因取消’的保险政策可以帮助旅行者应对冠状病毒爆发带来的不确定性。”
风险评估级别
CDC 已建议旅行者避免所有前往中国、伊朗、意大利、韩国和大多数欧洲国家的非必要旅行。这些旅行通知是基于对前往特定地区可能涉及的健康风险的评估。
带有旅行通知的目的地列表可在 此处 获取
广泛持续（进行中）传播且限制进入美国：CDC 建议旅行者避免所有前往以下目的地的非必要旅行。来自这些目的地的外国国民入境已被暂停：中国、伊朗和大多数欧洲国家（3 级旅行健康通知）。
广泛持续（进行中）传播：CDC 建议旅行者避免所有前往以下目的地的非必要旅行：韩国（3 级旅行健康通知）。
持续（进行中）社区传播：CDC 建议老年人或患有慢性疾病的人考虑推迟前往以下目的地的旅行：全球爆发通知（2 级旅行健康通知）。
更多信息请参阅：旅行期间的暴露风险
如果我取消行程，能获得退款吗？
每家公司制定自己的退款政策。一些公司可能会根据 CDC 的旅行健康通知来制定政策。
许多航空公司正在提供豁免，允许人们在无需支付通常罚金的情况下更改航班。
如果您前往的是没有旅行限制的目的地，请注意，旅行社可能不接受取消，而是免除未来旅行计划的更改费。
在这种情况下，每种情况将根据旅行日期进行个案分析。大多数旅行社提供在 6 到 12 个月内预订假期的抵用金。如果价格上涨，您可能需要支付差价。
Costa Rica Dream Adventures 正在更改其政策，并为新预订提供灵活的旅行计划。“现在预订，以后旅行”计划对于在 2020 年 4 月 30 日之前预订的新假期套餐不收取任何罚金。
Costa Rica Dream Adventures 的销售总监 D’jibia Joseph 建议未来的旅行者留意旺季。Joseph 女士说：“客户希望保留他们的旅行计划，并在今年晚些时候访问哥斯达黎加。我们强烈建议留意像节假日这样的旺季。届时价格会更高，而且我们可能会面临房源/机位不足的问题。”
希望能
translation:
Should I postpone my vacation?
As spring and summer breaks approach, travelers are beginning to worry about booking their next vacation.
New developments regarding the 2019 coronavirus (COVID-19) emerge daily, causing uncertainty among travelers. People are starting to assess their travel plans around one big question: "Will I be safe?"
Travel agency agents have become new spokespersons for this new disease, educating clients about coronavirus-related knowledge and informing them that traveling abroad to countries with no travel restrictions carries a relatively low risk.
"Travelers are worried about passing through major airports, or simply the fact of being surrounded by hundreds on an airplane. As travel agents, our job is to keep clients informed and use reliable resources so we can follow the latest developments of this new virus," said Arthur Salus, CEO of Costa Rica Dream Adventures and Duluth Travel, both of which primarily book government, corporate, and leisure travel.
According to the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention (CDC), most viruses and other pathogens are not easily transmitted on airplanes due to the way air is circulated and filtered. Mr. Salus said, "Before deciding to cancel an upcoming vacation, we advise travelers to wait and observe the situation."
Salus encourages those booking travel now to consider purchasing travel insurance. He said, "An 'cancel for any reason' insurance policy can help travelers cope with the uncertainty brought by the coronavirus outbreak."
Risk Assessment Level
The CDC has advised travelers to avoid non-essential travel to China, Iran, Italy, South Korea, and most European countries. These travel advisories are based on an assessment of potential health risks associated with traveling to specific areas.
A list of destinations with travel advisories can be found here.
Widespread sustained (ongoing) transmission and entry restrictions to the U.S.: The CDC advises travelers to avoid non-essential travel to the following destinations. Entry for foreign nationals from these destinations has been suspended: China, Iran, and most European countries (Level 3 Travel Health Notice).
Widespread sustained (ongoing) transmission: The CDC advises travelers to avoid non-essential travel to the following destinations: South Korea (Level 3 Travel Health Notice).
Sustained (ongoing) community transmission: The CDC advises older adults or people with chronic illnesses to consider postponing travel to the following destinations: Global Outbreak Alert (Level 2 Travel Health Notice).
For more information, see: Exposure Risks While Traveling
Can I get a refund if I cancel my trip?
Each company has its own refund policy. Some companies may formulate policies based on the CDC's travel health notices.
Many airlines are offering waivers that allow people to change flights without paying usual penalties.
If you are traveling to a destination with no travel restrictions, please note that travel agencies may not accept cancellations but may waive change fees for future travel plans.
In this case, each situation will be analyzed on a case-by-case basis depending on the travel dates. Most travel agencies offer a credit for vacations booked within 6 to 12 months. If prices increase, you may have to pay the difference.
Costa Rica Dream Adventures is changing its policy and offering flexible travel plans for new bookings. The "Book Now, Travel Later" plan has no penalties for new vacation packages booked before April 30, 2020.
D’jibia Joseph, Sales Director at Costa Rica Dream Adventures, advises future travelers to be mindful of peak season. Ms. Joseph said, "Clients want to keep their travel plans and visit Costa Rica later this year. We strongly recommend being mindful of peak seasons like holidays. Prices will be higher then, and we may face issues with availability/seats."
Hopefully

这是一篇代表国家剧院发布的赞助贴。

《绝望之谴》是一个快节奏的冒险故事，在通往天堂或地狱的道路上疾驰。它对信仰和爱的变革力量进行了一次颠覆性的，且有时是狂欢式的探索。

隐士 Paulo 痴迷于自身的救赎，将十年时间奉献给了虔诚的忏悔。当他的信仰产生动摇时，时刻监视着的魔鬼趁机说服他，他与一个名叫 Enrico 的人有着相同的命运——后者是一个注定要下地狱的拿波里臭名昭著的黑帮分子。Paulo 誓要复仇，他向上帝发起猛烈攻击，并集结了一帮敌对的法外之徒。

这部剧由伟大的西班牙剧作家 Tirso de Molina 于 1635 年创作，由屡获殊荣的剧作家 Frank McGuinness 在新版本中赋予了生动的生命。一群非凡的角色在意大利的土地上飞驰，享受着命运的不可预测性。

想赢取一对观看该剧的门票吗？只需在下方输入您的姓名和电子邮件地址。

本次活动现已结束。

获胜者将于 9 月 21 日星期五下午 5 点随机抽取。获胜者的门票适用于 2012 年 10 月 2 日至 28 日的所有场次。视票务情况而定。主办方保留在必要时将奖品更换为等值或更高价值奖品的权利。适用常规的 Londonist 竞赛政策。

《绝望之谴》将于 10 月 2 日在奥利维尔剧院开演。票价 12 英镑、22 英镑、32 英镑。
translation:
This is a sponsorship post published by the National Theatre.

"The Penance of Despair" is a fast-paced adventure story that races along the path to heaven or hell. It is a subversive, and at times frenetic, exploration of the transformative power of faith and love.

The hermit Paulo is obsessed with his own salvation, dedicating ten years to devout repentance. When his faith begins to waver, the ever-present devil takes the opportunity to convince him that he shares the same fate as a man named Enrico—a notorious Neapolitan gangster destined for hell. Paulo vows revenge, launching a fierce assault on God and gathering a band of hostile outlaws.

The play was written by the great Spanish playwright Tirso de Molina in 1635 and brought to vivid life in a new version by the award-winning playwright Frank McGuinness. A cast of extraordinary characters races across the Italian landscape, embracing the unpredictability of fate.

Want to win a pair of tickets to see the play? Just enter your name and email address below.

This event has now ended.

Winners will be randomly drawn on Friday, September 21st, at 5 PM. Winner's tickets are valid for all performances from October 2nd to October 28th, 2012. Subject to availability. The organizer reserves the right to substitute prizes with equivalent or higher value prizes if necessary. Standard Londonist competition policies apply.

"The Penance of Despair" opens on October 2nd at the Olivier Theatre. Tickets are £12, £22, £32.

text:
《夜色之中》(Out In The Night)
8月4日周一 下午1:30 2号厅
2013年 75分钟 导演：Blair Doroshwalther
2006年8月的一个炎热夜晚，在纽约市一个对同性恋友好的社区里，四名年轻的非裔美国女同性恋在街上遭到一名男子的暴力和性威胁。她们采取了自卫，随后在法庭和媒体的审判中被指控并定罪为“女同杀手帮”。在活动人士圈子里，她们被称为“新泽西四人组”。通过这些年轻女性的生活，《夜色之中》揭示了她们的种族、性别认同和性取向是如何在主流新闻媒体和刑事司法系统中被刑事化的。

《家庭永恒》(FAMILIES ARE FOREVER)
导演：Vivian Kleiman
当虔诚的摩门教父母发现他们13岁的儿子是同性恋时，会发生什么？
translation:
Out In The Night
Monday, August 4th, 1:30 PM, Hall 2
2013, 75 minutes, Director: Blair Doroshwalther
On a hot night in August 2006, four young Black lesbian women were subjected to violence and sexual threats by a man in a gay-friendly community in New York City. They defended themselves, and were subsequently accused and convicted as a "lesbian killer gang" in court and the media. In activist circles, they were known as the "New Jersey Four." Through the lives of these young women, Out In The Night reveals how their race, gender identity, and sexual orientation were criminalized by mainstream media and the criminal justice system.

FAMILIES ARE FOREVER
Director: Vivian Kleiman
What happens when devout Mormon parents discover their 13-year-old son is gay?

text:
Philip Seymour Hoffman 和 Julianne Moore 出现在《The Hunger Games: Mockingjay – Part 1》中。
这段视频只有一分钟长；Peeta (Josh Hutcherson)、Johanna (Jena Malone)、Haymitch (Woody Harrelson) 和 Finnick (Sam Claflin) 全都没出现；而 Katniss Everdeen (Jennifer Lawrence) 只说了四个词。尽管如此，《The Hunger Games: Mockingjay – Part 1》的第一支先导预告片仍然通过对《The Hunger Games: Catching Fire》事件后果的阴暗且紧张的瞥见，成功地吸引了观众。
该预告片于周五在圣迭戈动漫展 (San Diego Comic-Con) 的一场特别预览中首次亮相，这是与 Samsung 深度促销联动的一部分。粉丝们必须排队走过一个特别的 Mockingjay 展馆，那里有全息投影的 Peeta 和 Johanna 的旋转动态肖像，之后才能观看预告片。然后，粉丝们被引导进入一个完全由白色装饰的特殊房间，坐在球形舱内，拿到一台 Samsung 平板电脑，并被邀请戴上耳机观看预告片。这次体验精致且令人印象深刻，但与预告片本身却有一种奇怪的违和感，而该预告片已于周日深夜向公众发布。
3. 在这里观看预告片：
4. 预告片以 Plutarch Heavensbee (Philip Seymour Hoffman) 和 13 区的领导人 President Coin (Julianne Moore) 的对话开场，两人在争论 Katniss 是否准备好成为反抗那个毒害且物质至上的 Capitol 的反叛象征。
5. 事实上，我们几乎完全没看到 Katniss 的脸，因为她当时正在战火摧毁的 8 区视察一家临时医院。
6. 这段预告片中的对白非常少，而已故的 Hoffman 说了其中大部分。
7. 这段简短的预览还让我们首次看到了《Game of Thrones》明星 Natalie Dormer 饰演的 Cressida，她的任务是记录 Katniss 的生活。
8. 我们还看到了 Gale 的一个简短镜头，因为有 Liam Hemsworth 在。
9. 我们看到 Katniss 降落在 8 区，那里看起来像……匹兹堡，也许？
10. Beetee (Jeffrey Wright) 身后的这个显示屏似乎与地下的 13 区有关。
或者也许它只是一个非常酷的屏幕保护程序？
11. 这个镜头看起来也像是来自 13 区。
原著粉丝应该能大概猜到这里发生了什么。提示：情况不妙！
12. 我们还看到了一些反叛行动本身……
13. 随着 Mockingjay 标志变得具有更深远的意义。
14. 而 President Snow (Donald Sutherland) 试图摧毁它……
16. 预告片以一名血迹斑斑（且非常年轻）的 8 区公民询问 Katniss 为结尾，基本上是在问她整个预告片期间都跑哪去了。
17. 然后 Katniss 终于说了四个词：
Katniss 看起来惊魂未定且缺乏自信，这与 Suzanne Collins 的原著非常一致。《Mockingjay》很大程度上围绕着 Katniss 如何缓慢地从一场令人瘫痪的创伤后应激障碍中摆脱出来，这使她脱离了大部分行动——这一点在预告片中我们看到的 Katniss 如此之少中得到了体现。
这对你来说足够了吗？
20. 《The Hunger Games: Mockingjay – Part 1》将于 11 月 21 日上映。
- 在科罗拉多斯普林斯的一家 Planned Parenthood 发生的枪击事件中，至少有三人死亡，其中包括一名警察。嫌疑人已被警方拘留。 ›
- 在尼日利亚，一名自杀式袭击者袭击了数百人的什叶派穆斯林游行队伍，导致至少 15 人死亡。 ›
- 你对本周新闻中发生的事情了解多少？参加我们的测验。 ›
translation:
Philip Seymour Hoffman and Julianne Moore appear in The Hunger Games: Mockingjay – Part 1.
This video is only one minute long; Peeta (Josh Hutcherson), Johanna (Jena Malone), Haymitch (Woody Harrelson), and Finnick (Sam Claflin) do not appear at all; and Katniss Everdeen (Jennifer Lawrence) only says four words. Nevertheless, the first teaser trailer for The Hunger Games: Mockingjay – Part 1 successfully captivated audiences with a dark and tense glimpse into the aftermath of the events in The Hunger Games: Catching Fire.
The trailer premiered for the first time at a special preview at San Diego Comic-Con on Friday, as part of a deep promotion collaboration with Samsung. Fans had to queue through a special Mockingjay exhibit featuring holographic rotating portraits of Peeta and Johanna before they could watch the trailer. Then, fans were guided into a special room decorated entirely in white, sat inside a spherical pod, received a Samsung tablet, and were invited to put on headphones to watch the trailer. The experience was elaborate and impressive, but there was a strange dissonance with the trailer itself, which was released to the public late on Sunday.
3. Watch the trailer here:
4. The trailer opens with a conversation between Plutarch Heavensbee (Philip Seymour Hoffman) and District 13 leader President Coin (Julianne Moore), as they debate whether Katniss is ready to be the symbol of rebellion against the Capitol, which is toxic and materialistic.
5. In fact, we barely see Katniss's face because she is inspecting a temporary hospital in District 8, which is being ravaged by war.
6. There is very little dialogue in this trailer, and Hoffman says most of it.
7. This short preview also gives us our first look at Cressida, played by Game of Thrones star Natalie Dormer, whose task is to document Katniss's life.
8. We also see a brief shot of Gale because Liam Hemsworth is in it.
9. We see Katniss landing in District 8, which looks like... Pittsburgh, maybe?
10. The screen behind Beetee (Jeffrey Wright) seems to be related to the underground District 13.
Or maybe it's just a really cool screensaver?
11. This shot also looks like it's from District 13.
Book fans should be able to guess what's happening here. Hint: Things are bad!
12. We also see some of the rebellion itself...
13. As the Mockingjay symbol takes on a deeper meaning.
14. And President Snow (Donald Sutherland) tries to destroy it...
16. The trailer ends with a blood-splattered (and very young) District 8 citizen asking Katniss, basically asking where she's been during the entire trailer.
17. Then Katniss finally says four words:
Katniss looks shaken and insecure, which is very consistent with Suzanne Collins' original book. Mockingjay is largely about how Katniss slowly recovers from paralyzing PTSD, which takes her out of most of the action—something reflected in how little we see of Katniss in the trailer.
Is that enough for you?
20. The Hunger Games: Mockingjay – Part 1 is set for release on November 21.
- At a shooting at Planned Parenthood in Colorado Springs, at least three people died, including a police officer. The suspect has been detained by police. ›
- In Nigeria, a suicide bomber attacked a Shiite Muslim procession of hundreds, killing at least 15 people. ›
- How much do you know about what happened in this week's news? Take our quiz. ›

我永远无法理解收集鞋子的风潮。它们几乎看起来都蠢得要死，不过我从高中起就一直穿 vans，所以我懂个屁

公平地说，我们也不吃鞋子。

>>19170885 (OP)

笑死，你的鞋子需要处于一个通风良好的环境中。这黑鬼是个脑残。把它放在路边，然后在 Craigslist 上通知那些收废品的。中午之前这玩意儿就会被搬走。

喷漆和贴贴纸真的算是在“DIY”冰箱吗？

>>19170885 (OP)

糟糕的主意，除非他在里面放了一桶除湿剂，但你需要空气流通，否则这些鞋子顶多会变得发霉。

我的意思是，我喜欢有很多双鞋，但主要是为了适应不同的环境或活动。

>运动鞋用于锻炼/院子活

>舒适的日常鞋用于工作和休闲

>徒步鞋用于自然漫步

>舞鞋

>拖鞋/居家鞋

>凉鞋用于炎热天气和游泳

无法想象只拥有大量同一类型的鞋子

你有舞鞋？

这些都能理解。但拥有上百万双看起来很蠢的运动鞋对我来说毫无意义

但这和仅仅因为某个品牌就收集贵得离谱的鞋子是不一样的。冰箱里的那些鞋子肯定都在 100 到 500 美元的价格区间，但可能更高

既然东西的主要用途，以及人们看到它们的唯一方式，就是通过在地上穿而弄脏它们，那你为什么要收集它们？你没看到那个泥坑，你被雨淋了，有人踩了你的后跟，你的鞋就完蛋了。意义何在？

年轻的黑人男性经常从事一种被称为“孔雀开屏”的行为

他们试图尽可能地招摇和显眼，以展示社会支配地位。一个迷人的物种。

>>19170885 (OP)

应该把这个给制造他那些宝贝鞋子的奴隶们看看，好让他们知道自己的工作得到了认可。

现在已经没有奴隶了，而且美国黑人是唯一的奴隶。

>$500

>“贵得离谱”

笑死



我也是，不过把舞鞋换成正装鞋，把牛仔靴换成骑马靴（即使我不再有马了，我依然保留着骑马靴，以防我决定去骑别人的马）。另外，加上园艺鞋和浴室拖鞋。

我很惊讶现在竟然有这么多男人只有运动鞋而没有别的。每个人都需要一双正装鞋。

而且，为什么现在每个人都想表现得这么俗气，给这些品牌提供免费广告？你付钱给他们，为了获得像个行走广告牌一样走来走去的特权，让他们标志无处不在地出现在你身上。这真的很庸俗。停止这种行为。

保持干净并不难。而且即使磨损了，它们看起来依然不错。

>舞鞋

>牛仔靴就是为了拥有牛仔靴

超级基佬

等不及要把“舞鞋”加入到我下次的 larp 扮演里了，真他妈的

>现在已经没有奴隶了，而且美国黑人是唯一的奴隶。

这是机器人发的帖还是 JIDF 发的帖？美洲原住民也被抓去做奴隶，但考虑到他们频繁想要逃跑或在尝试中死去，这通常被认为是个糟糕的主意。白人也经常生活在技术上的奴隶制下，那是合同制的，你最终可以脱身，希望如此。
translation:
White people don't put shoes in the refrigerator!

>>19170885 (OP)

This black guy is quite cunning.

I mean, I think this is better than letting them rust in the yard.

>>19170885 (OP)

I can never understand the trend of collecting shoes. They all look almost stupid, but I've worn Vans since high school, so I know squat.

>>19170885 (OP)

LMAO, your shoes need to be in a well-ventilated environment. This black guy is an idiot. Put them by the roadside and notify the junk collectors on Craigslist. They'll be gone before noon.

>>19170885 (OP)

Bad idea, unless he put a dehumidifier in it, but you need air circulation, otherwise these shoes will at best get moldy.

I mean, I like having many pairs of shoes, but mainly to suit different environments or activities.

>Sneakers for working out/yard work

>Comfortable everyday shoes for work and leisure

>Hiking boots for nature walks

>Cowboy boots just for having cowboy boots

>Dance shoes

>Slippers/house shoes

Do you have dance shoes?

These are understandable. But owning millions of pairs of stupid-looking sneakers is meaningless to me.

But that's different from collecting shoes that are ridiculously expensive just because of a brand. Those shoes in the refrigerator are probably in the $100 to $500 range, but maybe higher.

Since the main purpose of the items, and the only way people see them, is by wearing them on the ground and getting them dirty, why collect them? You don't see that mud puddle, you get rained on, someone steps on your heel, and your shoes are ruined. What's the point?

Young black men often engage in behavior called "peacocking."

>>19170885 (OP)

Should show this to the slaves who make those precious shoes, so they know their work is appreciated.

There are no slaves anymore, and Black Americans are the only slaves.

>$500

>"Ridiculously expensive"

LMAO

I'm surprised there are so many men now who only have sneakers and nothing else. Everyone needs a pair of dress shoes.

And why does everyone want to look so tacky now, providing free advertising for these brands? You pay them to have the privilege of walking around like a walking billboard, letting their logos be everywhere on you. It's really vulgar. Stop this behavior.

Keeping clean isn't hard. And even if they get worn, they still look good.

>Dance shoes

>Cowboy boots just for having cowboy boots

Super gay

Is this post from a bot or JIDF? Indigenous Americans were also captured and enslaved, but considering they frequently tried to escape or died in the attempt, it's usually considered a bad idea. White people also often live under technological slavery, which is contractual, and you can eventually get out, hopefully.

text:
我得把我地下室浴室的地板换了，马桶底座周围在漏水。但我可能得雇个人来弄，因为这已经是第三次糟糕到需要把地板全部拆掉的地步了。之前雇的两个人都坚持说马桶本身没啥明显问题。地板很结实，法兰盘没问题，那个叫什么环的东西也没问题。

有人遇到过类似的问题吗？怎么解决的？我想让这次成为我最后一次处理这破事。

你确定是马桶在漏水吗？

我以前有个马桶我也以为在漏水。结果是截止阀的管道在缓慢渗水，因为水都积在马桶底座，所以看起来像是马桶在漏。

在截止阀下面放个杯子，过几天检查一下。

是的，我确定。有时候冲水后，水会从马桶底座周围的地板上方渗出来，而阀门在比较远的地方，而且是干的。

>>2608003 (楼主)

换个他妈的新马桶吧你这个白痴，那是你看不见的地方裂了

他妈的亚人类猿猴

如果你住在闷热潮湿的地方，也可能是水箱滴下的冷凝水。这玩意儿把我给坑了，让我换了一个根本不需要换的蜡环。

马桶唯一可能漏水的地方就是环周围。你可以用两个环，把地板和马桶接触面上的旧蜡清理干净（用WD40效果极佳），然后叠两个环，用吹风机把它们弄软，然后把马桶放下去，确保密封得死死的。

如果这样还解决不了，那水就是从其他地方来的。

不，可能只是冷凝水。楼主又要把底板拆了。给我注意看。

我简直没法理解你们这些所谓的“人”了

也许是时候走掉了

>如果你住在闷热潮湿的地方，也可能是水箱滴下的冷凝水。

或者即使你洗个热水澡或淋浴也会这样。
translation:
I need to replace the floor in my basement bathroom; it's leaking around the toilet base. But I probably have to hire someone to do it because this is the third time it's been so bad that I have to tear up the whole floor. The two people I hired before insisted that the toilet itself had no obvious problems. The floor is solid, the flange is fine, and that ring thingy is fine too.

Has anyone encountered a similar problem? How did you solve it? I want this to be the last time I deal with this crap.

Are you sure the toilet is leaking?

I had a toilet like that before and thought it was leaking too. It turned out the supply line valve was slowly seeping, and because the water was pooling around the toilet base, it looked like the toilet was leaking.

Put a cup under the supply valve and check in a few days.

Yes, I'm sure. Sometimes after flushing, water seeps out from under the toilet base onto the floor, and the valve is far away and dry.

>>2608003 (OP)

Just replace the damn toilet, you idiot, it's cracked in a place you can't see.

Fucking subhuman ape.

If you live in a hot and humid place, it could also be condensation dripping from the tank. This thing screwed me over and made me replace a wax ring that didn't need replacing.

The only place the toilet can leak is around the ring. You can clean off the old wax from the contact surface of the floor and the toilet using two rings (WD40 works great), then stack two rings, soften them with a hairdryer, and then set the toilet down, making sure it's sealed tight.

If that doesn't solve it, the water is coming from somewhere else.

No, it's probably just condensation. The OP is going to tear up the base again. Pay attention.

I seriously can't understand you so-called "humans."

Maybe it's time to leave.

>>If you live in a hot and humid place, it could also be condensation dripping from the tank.

Or even if you take a hot shower.

这就是我健身的原因。

你为什么健身？

>在“让你的奴隶做所有事日”扮演奴隶

>Eruv ([(ʔ)eˈʁuv]; 希伯来语：עירוב，字面意思是“混合”，也译作 eiruv 或 erub，复数：eruvin [(ʔ)eʁuˈvin] 或 eruvim) 是一种为了允许在安息日通常被禁止的活动（由于禁止 hotzaah mereshut lereshut）而设立的仪式性哈拉卡围栏，具体而言：将物品从私人领域搬运到半公共领域 (carmelit)，以及在半公共领域内搬运四肘或以上的物品。这种围栏在一些犹太社区，尤其是正统犹太社区中设立。

>Eruv 通过用 mechitzas 将许多私人财产和空间（如街道和人行道）象征性地整合到一个更大的“私人领域”中，从而避免了在不同领域之间转移的限制。通常，构建 eruv 的团体会从当地政府获得所需土地的租赁权。[1]

>Eruv 允许犹太人携带房屋钥匙、纸巾、药物或婴儿，并使用婴儿车和手杖。因此，eruv 的存在与否尤其影响到行动不便的严格遵守教义的犹太人，以及负责照顾婴儿和幼儿的人。

>An Eruv ([(ʔ)eˈʁuv]; Hebrew: עירוב, literally meaning "mixture," also translated as eiruv or erub, plural: eruvin [(ʔ)eʁuˈvin] or eruvim) is a ritual Halakhic enclosure established to permit activities usually forbidden on the Sabbath (due to the prohibition of hotzaah mereshut lereshut), specifically: moving items from a private domain to a semi-public domain (carmelit), and moving items of four cubits or more within a semi-public domain. translation:

Suitable for Any Wine

To keep your wine in ideal climate conditions, the Sunpentown WC-0802H 8-bottle thermoelectric wine cooler utilizes double-layer insulated glass doors, saving you energy costs by maintaining the temperature.

text:
世界经济论坛刚刚在达沃斯举行了年会。世界经济论坛宣称的目的是通过吸引商业、政治、学术以及社会其他领导人来制定全球、区域和行业议程，从而改善世界状态。

参加达沃斯会议的以色列代表团成员包括总统西蒙·佩雷斯和总理本雅明·内塔尼亚胡。伊朗的参会人员包括总统哈桑·鲁哈尼和外交部长贾瓦德·扎里夫。两代表团之间没有计划进行任何会晤。

内塔尼亚胡谈到了以色列作为世界经济强国的新兴角色。鲁哈尼谈到了伊朗在世界上的角色，表示他希望与“所有我们正式承认的国家”保持良好关系。显然，这将排除以色列，因为在接连几任领导人的领导下，伊朗一直挑战以色列的合法性。

针对鲁哈尼的演讲，佩雷斯表示：“最显著的言论是他没有说出的那些，特别是没有表达对中东和平的支持。”

佩雷斯说：“他本可以宣布，既然他不想拥有核弹，那么他将停止制造能够携带核弹头的远程导弹。他没有宣布伊朗将停止成为我们这个时代的恐怖主义中心。”

佩雷斯宣布以色列准备与伊朗讲和，且从历史上看，两国人民从未是敌人。以色列准备与伊朗讲和这件事可能让内塔尼亚胡感到惊讶，因为内塔尼亚胡在官方职责中负责制定外交政策。

佩雷斯是以色列和平阵营中最后一位具有影响力的支持者。他与内塔尼亚胡之间存在积怨。他被视为内塔尼亚胡的对立面，这一立场为佩雷斯赢得了国际声望。

世界经济论坛将“达沃斯精神奖”授予佩雷斯，以表彰他对和平、经济和技术的贡献，这便说明了这一点。世界经济论坛创始人兼执行主席克劳斯·施瓦布称佩雷斯为“独特的政治家”。具有象征意义的是，内塔尼亚胡没有被邀请参加颁奖仪式。

在外交部年度大使会议的一次讲座中，佩雷斯说：“巴勒斯坦总统马哈茂德·阿巴斯是一个和平伙伴。我认识他30年了。没有人能改变我的想法，”并补充道，“即使他们告诉我，因为我是总统，所以我不能表达我的观点。”这段补充是由于内塔尼亚胡的支持者评论称，佩雷斯此前对内塔尼亚胡发起抨击时，已经超出了其非党派总统的职责范围。

佩雷斯对内塔尼亚胡的谈判策略发出了最后一击。他称内塔尼亚胡坚持要求巴勒斯坦承认以色列是一个犹太国家是“不必要的”，并且可能是和平谈判的障碍。

这再次提出了仅针对以色列的双重标准问题。为什么可以存在“伊斯兰共和国”，为什么巴勒斯坦国家必须是“无犹太人的”（judenrein），而以色列却不能是一个犹太国家？

佩雷斯的“和平伙伴”阿巴斯已经宣布：“我们不会承认并接受以色列的犹太特性。”巴勒斯坦权力机构外交部长里亚德·马尔基在一次采访中重申了这一点，他说：“阿拉伯国家永远不会承认一个犹太国家。”

为什么在谈判过程中发表这些声明？一个逻辑结论是，巴勒斯坦人，无论是权力机构、法塔赫还是哈马斯，都继续坚持他们的立场：“从河流到大海，巴勒斯坦将获得自由。”

盖特斯通研究所研究员哈立德·阿布·图阿梅在一篇“祝贺”阿巴斯进入其四年权力机构总统任期的第十年的专栏文章中，就阿巴斯作为和平伙伴的合法性提出了一个极好的观点。他指出，阿巴斯在任期结束后仍掌握权力，这给哈马斯和其他巴勒斯坦人提供了一个很好的借口，让他们可以主张他没有授权与以色列签署和平协议。图阿梅问道：“当许多巴勒斯坦人已经在指出他们的总统甚至没有授权代表他们行动或发言时，[国务卿约翰]·克里怎么能指望阿巴斯签署任何宣布与以色列冲突结束的文件？”
translation:
The World Economic Forum just held its annual meeting in Davos. The World Economic Forum claims its purpose is to improve the state of the world by shaping global, regional, and industry agendas by attracting leaders from business, politics, academia, and other sectors of society.

The Israeli delegation attending the Davos meeting included President Simon Peres and Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu. Iran's attendees included President Hassan Rouhani and Foreign Minister Javad Zarif. There were no plans for any meetings between the two delegations.

Netanyahu spoke about Israel's emerging role as a global economic power. Rouhani spoke about Iran's role in the world, stating his desire to maintain good relations with "all countries we formally recognize." This clearly excludes Israel, as Iran has consistently challenged Israel's legitimacy under several successive leaders.

In response to Rouhani's speech, Peres said, "The most telling statements are the ones he didn't make, especially his failure to express support for Middle East peace."

Peres said, "He could have announced that since he does not want nuclear weapons, he will stop manufacturing long-range missiles capable of carrying nuclear warheads. He did not announce that Iran will stop being a center of terrorism in our era."

Peres announced that Israel was prepared to make peace with Iran, and that historically, the peoples of the two countries have never been enemies. This news of Israel's readiness to reconcile with Iran might surprise Netanyahu, as Netanyahu is responsible for formulating foreign policy in his official capacity.

Peres is the last influential supporter in the Israeli peace camp. He has a long-standing feud with Netanyahu. He is seen as Netanyahu's opposite, a stance that has earned Peres international prestige.

The World Economic Forum awarded Peres the "Davos Spirit Award" in recognition of his contributions to peace, economy, and technology, which speaks volumes. Klaus Schwab, founder and executive chairman of the World Economic Forum, called Peres a "unique statesman." Symbolically, Netanyahu was not invited to the award ceremony.

In a lecture at the annual ambassador meeting of the Foreign Ministry, Peres said, "Palestinian President Mahmoud Abbas is a peace partner. I have known him for 30 years. No one can change my mind," adding, "even if they tell me that because I am the president, I cannot express my views." This addition came after supporters of Netanyahu commented that Peres had exceeded the scope of his non-partisan presidential duties when he previously criticized Netanyahu.

Peres delivered a final blow to Netanyahu's negotiation strategy. He called Netanyahu's insistence that Palestine recognize Israel as a Jewish state "unnecessary" and potentially an obstacle to peace negotiations.

This once again raises the issue of double standards applied only to Israel. Why can there be an "Islamic Republic," but the Palestinian state must be "Judenrein" (free of Jews), while Israel cannot be a Jewish state?

Peres's "peace partner," Abbas, has stated, "We will not recognize or accept the Jewish character of Israel." Riyad al-Mariki, the Foreign Minister of the Palestinian Authority, reiterated this in an interview, saying, "Arab countries will never recognize a Jewish state."

Why make these statements during negotiations? One logical conclusion is that the Palestinians, whether in the PA, Fatah, or Hamas, continue to hold their position: "From the river to the sea, Palestine will be free."

Khalid Abu Touameh, a researcher at the Gates Institute, put forward an excellent point about the legitimacy of Abbas as a peace partner in a column celebrating Abbas's tenth year as PA president. He pointed out that Abbas retains power even after his term ends, which provides a good excuse for Hamas and other Palestinians to argue that he was not authorized to sign a peace agreement with Israel. Touameh asked, "When many Palestinians are already pointing out that their president is not even authorized to act or speak on their behalf, how can [Secretary of State John] Kerry expect Abbas to sign any document declaring the end of the conflict with Israel?"

text: “贝多芬花了四年时间才写完那部交响曲。有些事情不能操之过急。好音乐和好酒一样。Paul Masson的Emerald Dry，一款美味的白葡萄酒。Paul Masson的葡萄酒味道如此之好，是因为它们在酿造时如此用心。Paul Masson本人在近一个世纪前所说的话在今天依然适用：‘在时机成熟之前，我们绝不出售任何葡萄酒’。”
translation: "Beethoven took four years to complete that symphony. Some things cannot be rushed. Good music is like good wine. Paul Masson's Emerald Dry, a delicious white wine. The wine of Paul Masson tastes so good because it is made with such care during the winemaking process. What Paul Masson himself said nearly a century ago is still true today: 'We never sell any wine before it is ready.'"

text:
马桶溢水是导致水损的最主要五个原因之一。溢水可能是由马桶盆内的堵塞或水箱故障引起的。无论原因如何，造成的损害都可能是巨大的。损害可能仅限于马桶周围，也可能通过地板和墙壁蔓延到其他区域。对此类情况的清理需要经过认证的修复公司的帮助。

发生溢水时您该怎么办？
如果马桶开始溢水，房主应该怎么做？为了避免损害，请关闭水源。首先检查水箱内部，看拍盖（flapper）是开启还是关闭状态。如果拍盖开启，请将其按下，以密封水箱与马桶盆之间的连接。如果拍盖已经关闭，那么房主需要关闭水源。水箱内部有一个小阀门，应将其逆时针旋转以停止水流进入水箱。如果在旋转阀门后水位仍在上升，请关闭全屋的进水总阀。检查其他马桶是否出现同样的问题，如果它们也出现了同样的问题，这可能意味着房主的房屋主下水道发生了堵塞。

评估损害
一个常见的问题是人们低估了损失的程度和性质。在处理马桶溢水造成的损害时，情况几乎总是如此。这是可以理解的，因为除非你有专业的设备，否则很难评估损害。
在房主关闭水源并确定堵塞原因后，需要开始评估损害。评估的第一步是清理积在地面上的所有水。这可以通过湿式真空吸尘器、抹布或拖把来完成。监测马桶周围和下方的区域，观察是否出现变色或水洼。因为这些迹象表明损害已经蔓延。留意该位置出现的异常气味。请注意，潮湿通常闻起来有霉味。在此过程中，请务必拍摄清理过程以及因溢水而造成的任何损害的照片。

水损分类
水损有特定的分类方式。分为 3 个类别和 4 个等级。
- 第 1 类水 —— “净水”。这种水对人类没有实质性威胁。例如水管破裂以及浴缸/洗手盆溢水。
- 第 2 类水 —— “灰水”。这种水含有大量的化学、生物或物理污染物，在饮用或接触时会导致不适或疾病。例如含有尿液（无粪便）的马桶盆和潜水泵故障。
- 第 3 类 —— “黑水”。这种水是不卫生的，含有可导致严重不适或疾病的细菌和真菌。例如来自污水、海水和积水的水源。

等级 —— 根据受影响材料的蒸发率决定
- 第 1 级 —— 此等级的特点是蒸发率慢。仅房间的一部分受到影响。材料吸收的水分最少。
- 第 2 级 —— 此等级的蒸发率较快。水影响了房间内的整个地毯和衬垫。水可能已沿墙壁蔓延（不超过 2 英尺）。
- 第 3 级 —— 此等级的蒸发率最快。在此等级中，水通常来自上方，影响房间内的所有物品。
- 第 4 级 —— 此等级属于特殊的干燥情况。此等级通常涉及实木地板、混凝土和爬行空间等材料。在此等级中，干燥需要特定的条件。

所以，您的房子受损了，现在该怎么办？
如果马桶溢水确实给房屋造成了损害，房主需要做几件事。首先要做的是给他们的保险公司打电话。保险公司随后会派人到家中检查并评估损害，看是否在保单覆盖范围内。之后，他们会给房主发送一份关于他们认为的估价单
translation:
Toilet overflow is one of the top five causes of water damage. Overflow can be caused by a clog in the toilet bowl or a toilet tank malfunction. Regardless of the cause, the resulting damage can be significant. The damage may be limited to the area around the toilet or it may spread to other areas through the floor and walls. Cleanup for such situations requires the help of a certified restoration company.

What to do when an overflow occurs?
What should a homeowner do if the toilet starts to overflow? To prevent damage, shut off the water supply. First, check inside the tank to see if the flapper is open or closed. If the flapper is open, press it to seal the connection between the tank and the bowl. If the flapper is already closed, the homeowner needs to shut off the water supply. There is a small valve inside the tank that should be turned counterclockwise to stop water from entering the tank. If the water level continues to rise after turning the valve, shut off the main water supply to the entire house. Check other toilets to see if they have the same problem; if they do, it may indicate a clog in the main sewer line of the homeowner's house.

Assessing the Damage
A common issue is that people underestimate the extent and nature of the loss. This is almost always the case when dealing with damage caused by a toilet overflow. This is understandable because it is difficult to assess the damage without professional equipment.
After the homeowner shuts off the water supply and determines the cause of the clog, damage assessment needs to begin. The first step in assessment is to clean up all the water on the floor. This can be done with a wet/dry vacuum, rags, or a mop. Monitor the area around and under the toilet for any discoloration or puddles, as these signs indicate that damage has spread. Watch for any unusual odors in the area. Note that dampness often smells musty. During this process, be sure to take photos of the cleanup process and any damage caused by the overflow.

Water Damage Classification
Water damage has specific classifications. It is divided into 3 categories and 4 levels.
- Category 1 Water – "Clean Water." This water poses no significant threat to humans. Examples include a burst pipe or a bathtub/sink overflow.
- Category 2 Water – "Gray Water." This water contains a large amount of chemical, biological, or physical contaminants that can cause discomfort or illness if ingested or contacted. Examples include toilet bowl water containing urine (but no feces) and sump pump failure.
- Category 3 – "Black Water." This water is unsanitary and contains bacteria and fungi that can cause serious discomfort or illness. Examples include water from sewage, seawater, and standing water.

Levels – Determined by the Evaporation Rate of the Affected Material
- Level 1 – This level is characterized by a slow evaporation rate. Only a portion of the room is affected. The material absorbs the least amount of water.
- Level 2 – This level has a faster evaporation rate. Water has affected the entire carpet and padding in the room. Water may have spread up the walls (no more than 2 feet).
- Level 3 – This level has the fastest evaporation rate. In this level, water usually comes from above and affects all items in the room.
- Level 4 – This level is a special drying situation. This level typically involves materials such as hardwood floors, concrete, and crawl spaces. Drying in this level requires specific conditions.

So, your house is damaged, what now?
If the toilet overflow has indeed caused damage to the house, the homeowner needs to do a few things. The first thing to do is call their insurance company. The insurance company will then send someone to the home to inspect and assess the damage to see if it is covered by the policy. Afterward, they will send the homeowner an estimate of what they believe the cost will be.

text:
作者：Marianne Arens，2019年9月12日
孔特二世内阁将继续前政府那杀人的难民政策、军事化以及由欧盟和意大利银行强加的紧缩措施。

作者：Peter Schwarz，2019年8月30日
如果新政府真的成立，它只会加速意大利政治向右转的趋势。
作者：Mike Head，2019年8月29日
这次结盟是为了防止提前举行选举，并为紧缩预算铺路，以便对工人阶级实施更深层次的削减。
作者：Marianne Arens，2019年8月22日
新政府最重要的任务是在10月15日之前提交一份符合欧盟要求的预算，这将需要以牺牲工人阶级为代价进行大规模削减。
作者：Peter Schwarz，2019年8月21日
国际工人阶级整体面临的问题和任务在意大利被揭示得就像在显微镜下一样清晰。
作者：Marianne Arens，2019年8月14日
在极右翼内政部长 Matteo Salvini 破坏执政联盟后，参议院将于8月20日对现任政府进行信任投票。
作者：Marianne Arens，2019年8月10日
在一场出人意料的政变中，Lega 的领导人正试图推动向右转，并准备建立法西斯式的统治形式。
作者：Marianne Arens，2019年8月3日
在工会的全力支持下，意大利政府和主要投资者正准备以维持公司作为“国家航空公司”为名，对 Alitalia 的员工实施全面攻击。
作者：Marianne Arens，2019年7月1日
在逮捕发生几个小时后，那不勒斯市长 Luigi di Magistris 将一场帆船游行献给勇敢的船长“以及所有其他遭受不公正迫害的男女”。
作者：Marianne Arens，2019年6月20日
Pia Klemp 在总共六次任务中营救了约 5,000 名遇险人员，她面临最高 20 年的监禁和巨额罚款。
作者：Peter Schwarz，2019年6月14日
在欧洲选举之后，关于意大利国家债务的争端再次升级。
作者：Allison Smith，2019年4月9日
西班牙消防员 Miguel Roldán Espinosa 正在接受刑事调查，并可能面临长期的监禁。
作者：Marianne Arens，2019年4月6日
那些在意大利政府支持下变得胆大妄为的法西斯分子，在民众中几乎没有支持。
作者：Marianne Arens，2019年3月22日
“reddito di cittadinanza”（公民收入）是共同执政的五星运动的一个虚荣项目，它无法改变意大利严重的社会不平等。
作者：Marianne Arens，2019年3月11日
上周六，约 20 万人在米兰举行游行，反对右翼联盟政府，该政府关闭了对移民船只的港口，任由人们在地中海溺亡。
作者：Marianne Arens，2019年2月26日
法国和意大利之间剧烈的紧张关系背后存在着具体的物质利益，这导致法国在2月召回了其驻罗马大使。
作者：Marianne Arens，2019年2月14日
这次游行得到了希望反抗政府右翼政策的工人、退休人员和学生的支持。但工会领导人、民主党代表和伪左翼政治家让这次集会带上了亲企业的倾向。
作者：Alex Lantier，2019年2月8日
召回法国驻意大利大使的决定表明，欧洲主要帝国主义强国之间的关系正在加速崩溃。
作者：Bill Van Auken，2019年1月16日
玻利维亚在这次相当于法外遣返行动中所扮演的角色，标志着拉丁美洲残存的“粉红浪潮”政府正剧烈向右转。
作者：Bill Van Auken，2018年12月14日
内塔尼亚胡将意大利极右翼内政部长 Salvini 称作“以色列的一位伟大朋友”，这证明了这种联系

The Conte II cabinet will continue the previous government's murderous refugee policy, militarization, and austerity measures imposed by the EU and Italian banks.

This government is cobbled together through backroom deals to avoid elections while continuing austerity policies and attacking refugees; it is fundamentally no different from the previous far-right government.
Five Star Movement and the Socialists will continue to attack the Italian working class in the new government coalition
Author: Peter Schwarz, August 30, 2019
If the new government is formed, it will only accelerate the trend of Italy turning to the right.
Author: Mike Head, August 29, 2019
This alliance is to prevent early elections and pave the way for budget austerity to implement deeper cuts to the working class.

The most important task for the new government is to submit a budget compliant with EU requirements before October 15, which will require massive cuts at the expense of the working class.

The problems and tasks facing the international working class as a whole are revealed in Italy with microscopic clarity.

After far-right Interior Minister Matteo Salvini undermined the governing coalition, the Senate will hold a vote of confidence in the current government on August 20.

With the full support of the unions, the Italian government and major investors are preparing a full-scale attack on Alitalia employees under the guise of maintaining the company as a "national airline."

"reddito di cittadinanza" (citizens' income) is a vanity project of the Five Star Movement in the coalition government and cannot change Italy's severe social inequality.

text:
哪个神话路径最强，哪个最烂，为什么分别是巫妖和魔鬼？

不知道，我还没玩到那儿。

那得死好多人。

我在这儿都能闻到你显卡冒烟的味道。

巫妖离最强还差得远。整个故事你都得给Zach的小骨头舔屁股。

传奇，Wayne先生。

为什么？你甚至不能升天。

所以魔鬼是守序邪恶且来自地狱，而恶魔是混乱邪恶且来自深渊，但那他妈的魔裔是什么？

被某些黑暗之神杀掉并重生的凡人信徒。

所以是魔鬼？因为新魔鬼就是这么诞生的，不是吗？

永恒（但仅限二周目或之后）> 天使 = 恶魔 > 巫妖 > 其他 > 阿扎塔。

>>636151224 (OP)

我喜欢我的游侠阿扎塔，因为同时有个巨龙和猛禽好基友。

一直想尝试用武僧巫妖重玩一遍，搞搞功夫骷髅动作戏。

鳞拳武僧 + 龙血术士的组合非常契合，和巫妖也很搭。近战巫妖绝对可行。

我心爱的Ember。

噢不不不，牛头人兄弟们。

还有什么东西是没被青蛙和硬核Wojak给污染的吗？

没有。

我不明白。

它被绊倒了。

物质平面之外的所有东西基本上都是由灵魂组成的，所以专注于那个方面没什么用。

魔鬼是由灵魂回收并揉成一种叫作“低级魔”的魔鬼黏液。这种黏液然后在等级制度中攀升，随着晋升获得新的形态。

魔裔是被冲到阿巴顿海岸的迷失灵魂，然后开始吞噬其他流浪灵魂。它们在吞噬过程中也会改变形态并成长。魔裔存在的时间足够长，以至于自然形成了以四骑士为首的等级制度，但这只是结果，而不是像魔鬼那样有明确的目的。魔鬼可能会篡位取代其主人，而没有什么能阻止魔裔彻底颠覆阿巴顿目前的秩序。

行，但笑点在哪？

所以阿巴顿就是廉价版的虚圈，而魔裔就是些没劲的虚圈空洞？

>>636151224 (OP)

>最烂：金龙

你不仅在游戏后期才拿到这个，晚到愚蠢的程度，而且它还烂得像屎一样。只有角色扮演癖才玩。

除非你认为久保创造了犹太秘术传说。

空洞真的很时髦。

魔裔应该长成那样。

我的吸血鬼猎人D角色应该选天使还是永恒？顺便说一下，这是我的一周目。

两条路都挺好，但天使会有很多内置的神圣能力，绝对能把不死生物干碎。

玩诡计师能欺负Regill吗？

>>636151224 (OP)

天使

龙/魔鬼

只有在结局时。但你知道他在整个故事过程中一直气急败坏。

牛头人完全是软柿子。他们的豁免低得可怜，很容易被一级法术控制。

>天使

>长翅膀的无聊烂男人，而不是眼睛之轮或其他天使本来的怪物形态。

我讨厌天使路径。

圣经里有不同类型的天使。那些来到地球并与人类交配产生拿非利人的，看起来就像长翅膀的巨型男人。

>>636151224 (OP)

诡计师他妈的是什么？

某种星界发帖人？

一个Reddit用户。

基本上就是个发帖人。

最接近的解释就是，团里那个懂得利用规则漏洞为自己谋利，并能说服DM配合演戏的玩家。
translation:
Which mythical path is the strongest, and which is the worst, and why are they the Lich and the Devil?

I don't know, I haven't gotten that far yet.

That would require killing a lot of people.

I can smell your graphics card smoking from here.

The Lich is far from the strongest. You have to lick Zach's little butt through the whole story.

Legendary, Mr. Wayne.

Why? You can't even ascend.

So the Devil is lawful evil and comes from hell, while the Demon is chaotic evil and comes from the abyss, but what the hell is a Spawn?

A mortal believer killed and reborn by some dark god.

So it's a Devil? Because new Devils are born like that, aren't they?

Eternal (but only in the second playthrough or later) > Angel = Demon > Lich > Others > Azata.

>>636151224 (OP)

I like my Ranger Azata because he has a great buddy who is both a dragon and a raptor.

I've always wanted to try replaying with a Monk Lich to do some kung fu skeleton action scenes.

The combination of Scaled Fist Monk + Dragon Blood Sorcerer is very fitting, and it goes well with the Lich too. A melee Lich is definitely doable.

My beloved Ember.

Oh no no, Tauren brothers.

Is there anything that hasn't been contaminated by frogs and hardcore Wojak?

No.

I don't get it.

It was tripped.

Everything outside the material plane is basically made of souls, so focusing on that aspect is useless.

Devils are made from souls that are recycled and mashed into a devilish goo called "low-grade devil." This goo then climbs the hierarchy, gaining new forms as it advances. Spawns are lost souls washed up on the Abaddon coast, and they start devouring other wandering souls. They also change form and grow during the process of devouring. Spawns have existed long enough that a hierarchy led by the Four Knights has naturally formed, but this is just a result, not like the Devil which has a clear purpose. A Devil might usurp its master, and nothing can stop a Spawn from completely overturning the current order of Abaddon.

Okay, but what's the joke?

So Abaddon is a cheap version of the Outer Planes, and Spawns are pointless Outer Plane voids?

>>636151224 (OP)

>Worst: Gold Dragon

You not only get this in the late game, but you're too late to be stupid, and it's as shitty as shit. Only role-players play it.

Unless you think Kubo created the Jewish esoteric legend.

Voids are really trendy.

Spawns should be like that.

Should my Vampire Hunter D character choose Angel or Eternal? By the way, this is my first playthrough.

Both paths are pretty good, but Angels have a lot of built-in divine abilities that can absolutely crush undead.

Can a Trickster bully Regill?

>>636151224 (OP)

Angel

Dragon/Devil

Only at the end. But you know he's been furious throughout the whole story.

Tauren are complete pushovers. Their saves are pitifully low, and they are easily controlled by level one spells.

>Angel

>A boring winged man, not the original monstrous form of the Eye of the Wheel or other angels.

I hate the Angel path.

The Bible has different types of angels. Those who came to Earth and mated with humans to produce Nazarites look like giant winged men.

>>636151224 (OP)

What the hell is a Trickster?

Some kind of star-plane poster?

A Reddit user.

Basically just a poster.

The closest explanation is a player in a group who knows how to exploit loopholes to benefit themselves and can convince the DM to play along.

text:
据 Sky News 消息人士透露，一名被认为处于伦敦 Tottenham Court Road 炸弹惊魂事件中心的男子被确定为 49 岁的 Michael Green。
警方拒绝确认除嫌疑人年龄以外的任何信息。
正午前不久，一名被认为胸前绑有多个气罐的男子进入了一间办公室并威胁要自爆，伦敦大都会警察局接到报案赶往伦敦市中心 Tottenham Court road 的 Shropshire House。
随后披露，这些办公室属于一家名为 Advantage 的重型货车（HGV）许可公司，该男子被认为在该公司考试失败，并要求退款。
有物品从该建筑五楼的窗户被扔出，包括电器和纸张。
一段由当时在建筑内的某人拍摄的视频已被上传至 YouTube。
“发生的情况是我们当时在办公室里，有人进来，我们问他叫什么名字。我认出他了，因为他是我们之前的客户之一，”Advantage 的培训和运营主管、27 岁的 Abby Baafi 在由现场的 Huffington Post UK 执行编辑 Stephen Hull 录制的视频中说道。
“他就那样带着汽油罐出现了。他威胁要炸掉办公室。他说他不关心自己的生命，什么都不在乎，他要把所有人都炸死。”
她说该男子在找她，但因为她说自己怀孕了，他才放她走。
translation:
According to sources at Sky News, a man believed to be at the center of the bomb scare incident on Tottenham Court Road in London has been identified as 49-year-old Michael Green.
Police declined to confirm any information other than the suspect's age.
Shortly before noon, a man believed to have multiple gas canisters strapped to his chest entered an office and threatened to blow himself up. The Metropolitan Police in London received the report and rushed to Shropshire House on Tottenham Court Road in central London.
It was later revealed that these offices belonged to a heavy goods vehicle (HGV) licensing company called Advantage, and the man was believed to have failed an exam with the company and was demanding a refund.
Items, including appliances and paper, were thrown out of a window on the fifth floor of the building.
A video shot by someone inside the building at the time has been uploaded to YouTube.
"What happened is we were in the office, someone came in, we asked him his name. I recognized him because he was one of our previous clients," said 27-year-old Abby Baafi, Training and Operations Manager at Advantage, in a video recorded by Stephen Hull, the executive editor of Huffington Post UK on the scene.
"He just showed up with gas cans. He threatened to blow up the office. He said he didn't care about his life, didn't care about anything, he was going to kill everyone."
She said the man was looking for her, but he let her go because she told him she was pregnant.

text:
如果你还没有开始储存和节约用水，那么在我们的国家遭受这场已达到史诗级规模的干旱时，这绝对应该是你生存准备的首要任务。暂时忘掉那些豆子和米饭吧——如果没有水，你打算怎么煮它们？

从生存角度来看，你绝对必须专注于长期的水源。如果你在自己的房产上没有水权、没有雨水收集系统、没有第二和第三备用水源，以及可靠的净化系统，那么你所有精心制定的计划都将化为乌有。安全的市政用水（虽然考虑到所有有毒添加剂，“安全”二字值得商榷）可能很快就会成为过去式。

美国正面临水危机，这一点毫无争议。在生产大部分农产品的西海岸，加利福尼亚州州长 Jerry Brown 宣布进入紧急状态，并下令在全州范围内限制用水。在东海岸，水资源虽然丰富，但被化学品泄漏（如西弗吉尼亚州所示）和放射性泄漏（如南卡罗来纳州所示）所污染。在底特律，数千名无力支付账单的人家中已经没有自来水了。

三年前，Michael Snyder 写过关于 2012 年无尽干旱的文章，称其为美国历史上最大的自然灾害。他预言了一场将改变地球上每个人的生活的水短缺。

现在看来，他确实是对的。

你每天用多少水？

人们并不总是停下来思考的一件事是，他们每天究竟使用了多少水。生存准备圈的每个人都知道每人每天 1 加仑的格言，但这仅仅是冰山一角。它没有包括我们习惯用于卫生目的的大量用水。这段视频展示了一个普通的美国人每天如何轻而易举地用掉至少 100 加仑的水。

显然，在脱离电网（off-grid）的情况下，视频中的许多活动将无法实现。但如果情况略有不同呢——也许你的供水被公共事业公司配给并限制了？（这种情况实际上现在正发生在加利福尼亚州的一个小镇上——每户家庭被严格限制在每人每天 50 加仑。）无论限制如何，你仍然需要干净的衣服、干净的餐具和干净的身体。你会希望在冲厕所时不需要用掉你一天“配额”的一半水。

节水技巧

这里有几个减少日常用水量的建议。这些以及更多建议可以在我的新书《生存主义者用水生存指南》（The Prepper’s Water Survival Guide）中找到。这个列表绝非详尽无遗，而且并非所有解决方案都适用于每个人的情况。

首先，向那些没有自来水生活的人学习。试想一下：如果你必须亲手获取家中使用的每一滴水，无论是从井里手动抽水，还是从水源地搬运，你早就已经采取了许多这些低技术手段。

- 重复利用烹饪用水——如果你煮了面条或蔬菜，可以用这些水来做汤。这样你可以保留第一次烹饪时留在水中的部分营养和风味。
- 使用在你当地自然生长的植物进行景观布置。它们应该几乎不需要额外的浇水。你的县推广办公室通常可以提供帮助。你也可以去徒步，寻找许多在无论何种气候下都能茁壮成长的美丽植物。
- 种植有机作物。化学肥料会增加植物对水的需求。（本书中关于有机抗旱园艺有一些极好的技巧。）
- 部分衣物用手洗——这比用洗衣机省水得多。记得把洗衣服的水留作其他用途。
- 刮胡子时，在杯子里冲洗剃须刀，而不是在流动的水下冲洗。
- 放弃洗碗机，用手洗碗。
- 不要用流动的水冲洗每个盘子，而是将一侧填满...
translation:
If you haven't started storing and conserving water, then when our country suffers this epic-scale drought, this should absolutely be your top priority for survival preparation. Forget about those beans and rice for a while—how are you going to cook them without water?

From a survival perspective, you absolutely must focus on long-term water sources. If you don't have water rights on your property, a rainwater harvesting system, a second and third backup water source, and a reliable purification system, all your carefully laid plans will go down the drain. Safe municipal water (though the word "safe" is debatable considering all the toxic additives) may soon become a thing of the past.

The United States is facing a water crisis, and there is no dispute about that. On the West Coast, where most of the nation's agricultural products are produced, California Governor Jerry Brown has declared a state of emergency and ordered statewide water restrictions. On the East Coast, while water resources are abundant, they are contaminated by chemical spills (as seen in West Virginia) and radioactive leaks (as seen in South Carolina). In Detroit, thousands of low-income households have run out of tap water.

Three years ago, Michael Snyder wrote an article about the 2012 drought, calling it the largest natural disaster in American history. He predicted a water shortage that would change the lives of everyone on Earth.

It seems he was right.

How much water do you use every day?

It's not something people always stop to think about: how much water they actually use every day. Everyone in the survivalist community knows the adage of one gallon per person per day, but that's just the tip of the iceberg. It doesn't include the large amount of water we habitually use for hygiene purposes. This video shows how an average American can easily use at least 100 gallons of water a day.

Obviously, many of the activities in the video would be impossible off-grid. But what if the situation were slightly different—what if your water supply was rationed and restricted by the utility company? (This is actually happening right now in a small town in California—households are strictly limited to 50 gallons per person per day.) Regardless of the restrictions, you still need clean clothes, clean dishes, and a clean body. You wouldn't want to use half of your daily "quota" just to flush the toilet.

Water Saving Tips

Here are a few suggestions to reduce daily water consumption. These, and more suggestions, can be found in my new book, *The Prepper’s Water Survival Guide*. This list is by no means exhaustive, and not all solutions apply to everyone's situation.

First, learn from those who live without running water. Imagine: if you had to personally fetch every drop of water used in your home, whether by manually pumping from a well or hauling it from a source, you would have already adopted many of these low-tech methods.

- Reuse cooking water—if you boil pasta or vegetables, you can use that water to make soup. This allows you to retain some of the nutrients and flavor left in the water from the initial cooking.
- Landscape with plants native to your local area. They should require almost no extra watering. Your county extension office can usually help. You can also go hiking and find many beautiful plants that thrive in any climate.
- Grow organic crops. Chemical fertilizers increase a plant's water demand. (This book has some excellent tips on organic drought-resistant gardening.)
- Handwash some clothes—this uses much less water than a washing machine. Remember to save the wash water for other uses.
- When shaving, rinse your razor in a cup instead of under running water.
- Give up the dishwasher and wash dishes by hand.
- Don't rinse every plate under running water; instead, fill one side...

text:
(FoxNews.com) - 一名联邦法官裁定，纽约州北部的一个城镇在三年前一名康涅狄格州男子因在一张175美元的超速罚单上写脏话而被指控加重骚扰并被逮捕时，侵犯了该男子的第一修正案权利。

在上周发布的裁决中，美国地方法官 Cathy Seibel 允许 Willian Barboza 对纽约州 Liberty 村提起的诉讼继续进行。该诉讼称，这个位于纽约市西北方向100英里、人口约1万人的城镇未能就言论自由对警察进行适当培训。

代表 Barboza 的纽约公民自由联盟于周二公开了审判记录。

据《纽约时报》报道，Barboza 在初次被捕时年仅22岁，他于2012年5月在17号公路上因超速被拦截。在付款单上，Barboza 划掉了该镇的名字，并在原处写上了“暴政”。随后，他写下了“操你们这个烂镇的婊子们”这句话。

在 FoxNews.com 阅读更多内容。
translation:
(FoxNews.com) - A federal judge ruled that a town in upstate New York violated a Connecticut man's First Amendment rights when he was charged with aggravated harassment and arrested for swearing on a $175 speeding ticket three years ago.

In a ruling released last week, U.S. District Judge Cathy Seibel allowed the lawsuit filed by Willian Barboza against the town of Liberty, New York, to proceed. The lawsuit claims that the town, located 100 miles northwest of New York City with a population of about 10,000, failed to adequately train its police on free speech.

The New York Civil Liberties Union, representing Barboza, made the trial records public on Tuesday.

According to The New York Times, Barboza was only 22 years old when he was first arrested. He was pulled over for speeding on Route 17 in May 2012. On the payment slip, Barboza crossed out the town's name and wrote "Tyranny" in its place. He then wrote the phrase, "Fuck you bitches in this rotten town."

Read more at FoxNews.com.

text:
我还记得 Vin Diesel 刚在动作片领域出现的时候，我有个朋友对他推崇备至。他们看过 Diesel 演的一部短片，在那里面他展现出了相当不错的演技。但在他之后的大部分职业生涯中，我都没看到过这种水准，所以我很兴奋能有机会看看他的处女作，这部电影也是由 Diesel 编剧并导演的。遗憾的是，我依然没在 Diesel 身上看到严肃的演技，但我确实看到了他为什么应该坚持演戏，而永远不要再尝试编剧或导演长篇电影的原因。

《Strays》将 Vin Diesel 作为 Rick 介绍给电影世界，Rick 是一个小规模的毒贩，身边围绕着一群毫无价值的烂人，这些人的人生都迷失了，就像流浪动物一样。然而，正如电影反复告诉我们的那样，Rick 正试图改变自己的生活，处于人生的十字路口。在 Rick 心中，通往更好生活的途径是 Heather，一个比他那些典型的一夜情对象更有内涵的女孩。对他来说幸运的是，尽管两人来自不同的世界，且除了为了推动剧情之外，Heather 对他产生兴趣完全没有任何理由，但她同样被 Rick 吸引。

《Strays》的问题太多了，以至于很难找到从哪里开始吐槽。作为一部低成本电影，我会忽略一些明显的摄影和声音编辑错误，以及像门关不上之类的小失误，以及低成本电影经常遇到的其他场景问题。这些问题确实存在，但是可以原谅的，更不用说与折磨这部电影的深层问题相比，这些简直微不足道。

正如你从上面的剧情描述中可以推断出的，这部电影很大程度上遵循的是“只说不做”的哲学。我将此归咎于 Diesel 作为一个新手编剧，他似乎不知道如何推动故事发展，或者如何通过间接刻画来赋予角色深度。我们知道 Rick 处于转型期，是因为他告诉一个女孩他处于转型期，而不是因为我们真的看到他有所转变。而且，无论你引用多少次《出租车司机》和《愤怒之牛》，都不能让你的角色变得强悍，尽管有一场戏显示 Rick 无缘无故地袭击一群小混混，最终完成了这个任务。然而，叙事中没有任何东西能让 Heather 和 Rick 之间那种自动建立的关系变得合理，而这又是故事如此关键的一部分，你必须得让它合理，才能相信 Rick 试图转型的努力。

另一方面，我们知道 Rick 的朋友们毫无价值，是因为我们看到他们什么都不干。电影的大量时间都花在看着他们无所事事上，以至于电影的节奏简直糟糕透顶。电影的前五分钟，Rick 的三个主要朋友分别试图占用他的公寓以便能和女孩独处，结果全部失败。其中一次这样做就能达到目的，但把这个梗重复三次简直是折磨。

然而，我对《Strays》最大的不满在于电影那糟糕的标语，这个标语在电影中出现了好几次，但从未得到令人满意的解释。在电影的几个片段中，Rick 讲了一个故事，说他小时候从母亲的一个男朋友那里得到了一本关于牛的书，对方在封面上写道：“生活是一个斗牛士。”听着，生活不是一个斗牛士。生活可能是一头牛，生活可能是一件红披风，生活甚至可能是斗牛士用来刺牛的剑，但生活绝不是一个斗牛士。这是一个完全不通的隐喻，散发着一种拼命想创造一个让无知青少年觉得很酷并没完没了重复的口号的绝望感。谢天谢地，这个口号没火起来，要么是因为这部电影没什么名气，要么是因为这个隐喻就像听起来一样明显地愚蠢。

我喜欢 Vin Diesel 作为动作明星的样子，而且我认为如果他能拿到合适的角色，他作为严肃演员仍有潜力。然而，Diesel 绝不是一个讲故事的人。谢天谢地，有些流浪动物没有被领养，而是在收容所被仁慈地处死了。尽管最初受到了 Sundance 的关注，但那...
translation:
I remember when Vin Diesel first appeared in action films, I had a friend who highly praised him. They watched a short film Diesel acted in, where he showed quite good acting skills. But in most of his subsequent career, I haven't seen that level, so I was excited to have the chance to see his debut, a film that Diesel also wrote and directed. Unfortunately, I still didn't see serious acting from Diesel, but I did see why he should stick to acting and never try writing or directing feature films again.

Strays introduces Vin Diesel as Rick to the film world. Rick is a small-time drug dealer surrounded by a group of worthless scumbags whose lives are lost, like stray animals. However, as the film repeatedly tells us, Rick is trying to change his life, standing at a crossroads in life. In Rick's mind, the path to a better life is Heather, a girl with more substance than his typical one-night stands. Luckily for him, even though they come from different worlds, and Heather has absolutely no reason to be interested in him other than to move the plot forward, she is equally attracted to Rick.

Strays has too many problems to even know where to start complaining. As a low-budget film, I will overlook some obvious cinematography and sound editing errors, small mistakes like a door that won't close, and other set issues common in low-budget films. These problems do exist, but they are forgivable, let alone compared to the deeper issues that torture this film, which are insignificant.

As you can infer from the plot description above, this film largely follows a "all talk and no action" philosophy. I attribute this to Diesel as a novice screenwriter; he seems not to know how to drive the story forward or how to give characters depth through indirect portrayal. We know Rick is in a transitional phase because he tells a girl he is in a transitional phase, not because we actually see him change. And no matter how many times you quote *Taxi Driver* and *Raging Bull*, it doesn't make your character strong, even though one scene shows Rick inexplicably attacking a group of thugs and ultimately succeeding in that task. However, nothing in the narrative makes the automatic connection between Heather and Rick reasonable, and this is such a crucial part of the story that you have to make it reasonable to believe Rick's efforts to change.

On the other hand, we know Rick's friends are worthless because we see them doing nothing. A large amount of time in the film is spent watching them do nothing, making the film's pacing absolutely terrible. In the first five minutes of the film, Rick's three main friends each try to occupy his apartment to be alone with the girl, and all of them fail. One of these attempts would have achieved the goal, but repeating this gag three times is torture.

However, my biggest dissatisfaction with Strays is the film's terrible tagline, which appears several times in the movie but is never satisfactorily explained. In several scenes, Rick tells a story about how he got a book about bulls from his mother's boyfriend when he was a child, and the cover said, "Life is a bullfighter." Listen, life is not a bullfighter. Life might be a bull, life might be a red cape, life might even be the sword a bullfighter uses to stab a bull, but life is never a bullfighter. It is a completely nonsensical metaphor, radiating a desperation to create a slogan that ignorant teenagers would find cool and endlessly repeat. Thank goodness this slogan didn't catch on, either because the film isn't famous or because the metaphor is as obviously stupid as it sounds.

I like Vin Diesel as an action star, and I think he has potential as a serious actor if he gets the right role. However, Diesel is definitely not a storyteller. Thank goodness some strays aren't adopted but are mercifully put down in shelters. Despite initial attention from Sundance, that...

text:
军队是怎么让这么多人突然进入队列，并且在同一时间全部站稳不动的？

>>898044679 (OP)

负责人大喊一声“集合”。

然后，在喊集合的人面前开始形成一个方阵。根据队列规模的不同，如果是一个30多人以上的排，通常是六人或八人一排。这一切都从方阵视角下的右前方的那个兵开始（也就是说，在喊“集合”的人的左边）。

这个兵在队列的右前方就位，然后所有人以他为基准排队。那个喊“集合”的人将处于六人或八人排的中心位置。队列成员有责任以喊“集合”的人为中心进行对齐。之后就全是间距问题，很简单的小事。

太长不看版：全部是以右前方的那个兵为基准形成的。

另外，为了在操演和仪式时好看，他们会选一个能组成完美方阵且没有空缺的合适人数。然后，在排练期间，所有人集合。负责人说“如果你比你前面的人高，就往前移”。然后所有人重新调整位置。接着他说“向右转”，所有人向右转。然后他再次说“如果你比……高之类的话”，他们再次重新调整。这样可以让队列在高度上看起来很均匀，从队列视角来看，最高的人在右前，最矮的人在左后。

这实际上可以追溯到古代的方阵，因为显然你是用盾牌来掩护你左边的人。右前方的那个兵没有人掩护他，所以他最好是那里最高大的人。

至少，我们在陆军里是这么做的。其他军种我就不知道了。

谢谢你，无名氏

没问题，无名氏，很高兴能帮上忙
